TRANSACTION;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue (id, modified_time) SELECT DISTINCT\r\n                                                                              a.id,\r\n                                                                              NOW()\r\nFROM\r\n    ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id\r\nWHERE\r\n    b.r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n  AND b.r_modified_time <= NOW() UNION SELECT id, NOW() FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output WHERE r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n                                                                                            AND r_modified_time <= NOW();\r\nUPDATE dwd_update_tracker\r\nSET last_updated = NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR\r\nWHERE\r\n    table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output (\r\n    id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    batch_code,\r\n    actual_id,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    surface,\r\n    grade,\r\n    inner_grade,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    roll_length,\r\n    group_id,\r\n    group_name,\r\n    group_leader,\r\n    cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    date_time,\r\n    start_time,\r\n    end_time,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    rate             ,\r\n    rate_unit     ,\r\n    rate_type        ,\r\n    theory_use_time,\r\n    actual_use_time,\r\n    send_happened,\r\n    is_ignore,\r\n    manuf_line_code,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    sku_type,\r\n    r_modified_time,r_modified_date,\r\n    is_retention,is_baf, proce_note ,\r\n    flaw_describe,\r\n    split_in_weight,\r\n    yield_rate,next_machine_code ,\r\n    next_sku_code ) SELECT\r\n                        a.id,\r\n                        b.sku_code,\r\n                        sku.sku_name,\r\n                        b.batch_code,\r\n                        b.actual_id,\r\n                        b.steel_grade,\r\n                        b.spec,\r\n                        b.surface,\r\n                        b.grade,\r\n                        b.inner_grade,\r\n                        a.weight,\r\n                        a.quantity,\r\n                        a.meter_num AS roll_length,\r\n                        a.group_id AS group_id,\r\n                        a.group_code AS group_name,\r\n                        mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\r\n                        IFNULL(\r\n                                (\r\n                                    SELECT\r\n                                        d.cat_name\r\n                                    FROM\r\n                                        ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\r\n                                            JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\r\n                                    WHERE\r\n                                        c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n                                      AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\r\n                                      AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\r\n                                    LIMIT 1),\r\n                                'Ųõ╦³') AS cat_name,\r\n                        (SELECT attr_value4 FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND STATUS = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\r\n                        a.end_time AS date_time,\r\n                        a.start_time,\r\n                        a.end_time,\r\n                        CASE\r\n\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id = 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE date(a.end_t"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:30:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,\n                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             a.surface_thickness,\n             a.surface_number,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n             a.attr1\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)\n          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX'\n      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               a.surface_thickness,\n               a.surface_number,\n               sc.contract_month,\n               a.attr1) a\n;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_04_03;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_04_03 (tenant_id,attr1, surface_thickness, surface_number, qx_a_weight, qx_b_weight, qx_c_weight,\n                             qx_d_weight, qx_weight, data_date, sync_time, rk, rk1)\nSELECT aa.tenant_id,\n       a.attr1,\n       aa.surface_thickness,\n       aa.surface_number,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END)                   qx_a_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END)                   qx_b_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END)                   qx_c_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END)                   qx_d_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) qx_weight,\n       CURRENT_DATE                                                 data_date,\n       now()                                                        sync_time,\n       1                                                            rk,\n       1                                                            rk1\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n                      c.surface_thickness,\n                      c.surface_number\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_20_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id,attribute9,\n                      attribute3,\n                      attribute4\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_04_detail a ON aa.surface_thickness = a.surface_thickness and aa.attr1 = a.attr1\n    AND aa.surface_number = a.surface_number\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\nGROUP BY aa.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n         aa.surface_thickness,\n         aa.surface_number;\nUPDATE ads_gx_x"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:40:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_kc_13\nwhere data_date = current_date;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_13\n\nWITH tmp_ads_sc_kc_13_process1 AS (SELECT cs.stock_inst_id,\n                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2)                     AS top_cat_code,\n                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4)                     AS mid_cat_code,\n                                          SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6)                     AS leaf_cat_code,\n                                          cs.sku_code,\n                                          ods_sku.sku_name,\n                                          cs.wh_code,\n                                          ww.wh_name,\n                                          ww.wh_class,\n                                          bi.steel_grade,\n                                          bi.spec,\n                                          bi.surface,\n                                          bi.grade,\n                                          cs.batch_code,\n                                          cs.quantity,\n                                          cs.num,\n                                          cs.out_quantity,\n                                          cs.out_num,\n                                          cs.in_quantity,\n                                          cs.in_num,\n                                          cs.trans_in_quantity,\n                                          cs.trans_in_num,\n                                          cs.trans_out_quantity,\n                                          cs.trans_out_num,\n                                          cs.plan_quantity,\n                                          cs.plan_num,\n                                          cs.disable_quantity,\n                                          cs.disable_num,\n                                          cs.ava_quantity,\n                                          cs.ava_num,\n                                          cs.m_date,\n                                          cs.exp_date,\n                                          cs.STATUS,\n                                          cs.created_by,\n                                          cs.created_time,\n                                          cs.modified_by,\n                                          cs.modified_time,\n                                          cs.tenant_id,\n                                          cs.lock_quantity,\n                                          cs.lock_num,\n                                          cs.log_id,\n                                          cs.stock_status,\n                                          cs.unique_code,\n                                          cs.last_enter_date,\n                                          bi.weight,\n                                          bi.producer,\n                                          bi.act_height,\n                                          bi.act_width,\n                                          bi.tax_amount,\n                                          bi.amount,\n                                          bi.make_order_num,\n                                          bi.next_machine_code,\n                                          bi.project_number,\n                                          DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n                                          cs.r_modified_time\n                                   FROM with_attr_value a\n                                            join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n                                                 ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE2 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE2 = cs.wh_code)\n                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE3 = cs.steel_grade)\n                                                     AND (a.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*' or a.ATTRIBUTE4 = cs.sku_code)\n\n\n                  "
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:50:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,\n                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             a.surface_thickness,\n             a.surface_number,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n            a.attr1\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)\n          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX'\n      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               a.surface_thickness,\n               a.surface_number,\n               sc.contract_month,\n               a.attr1) a\n;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_20_03\nWHERE data_date = CURRENT_DATE;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_20_03 (tenant_id, surface_thickness, surface_number, qx_a_weight, qx_b_weight, qx_c_weight,\n                             qx_d_weight, qx_weight, data_date, sync_time, rk, rk1)\nSELECT aa.tenant_id,\n       a.attr1,\n       aa.surface_thickness,\n       aa.surface_number,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END)                   qx_a_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END)                   qx_b_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END)                   qx_c_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END)                   qx_d_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) qx_weight,\n       CURRENT_DATE                                                 data_date,\n       now()                                                        sync_time,\n       1                                                            rk,\n       1                                                            rk1\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n                      c.surface_thickness,\n                      c.surface_number\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_20_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id,attribute9,\n                      attribute3,\n                      attribute4\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_20_detail a ON aa.surface_thickness = a.surface_thickness and aa.attr1 = a.attr1\n    AND aa.surface_number = a.surface_number\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\n    AND a.data_date = CURRENT_DATE\n    AND a.HOUR = 18\nGROUP BY aa.tenant_id,a.at"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:60:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    with_attr_value\nWHERE\n    scene = 'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8) SELECT\n    *\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT\n            sc.tenant_id,\n            'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 surface,\n            scd.prod_spec4 grade,\n            sc.contract_month,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight/ 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_dj,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped/ 1000  WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_sy\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n                JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n                AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30,50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n                JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'XNY'\n\n        WHERE\n            sc.contract_state in (30,50)\n          AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n          AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n          AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n        GROUP BY\n            sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\nupdate  with_attr_value set  ATTRIBUTE3 = 'A'  WHERE  scene = 'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' and  ATTRIBUTE1 = 'HNHW-WQ2503200037' ;\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_gx_xs_08\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_08 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1, sync_time, is_newest) SELECT\n                                                                                                                                               aa.sync_data_date,\n                                                                                                                                               a.HOUR,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.tenant_id,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.surface,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity  END) a_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                               a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                               a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                            sync_data_date,\n                        a.ten"

cs.plan_quantity,\n                                        cs.plan_num,\n                                        cs.disable_quantity,\n                                        cs.disable_num,\n cs.exp_date,\n                                        cs.STATUS,\n                                        cs.created_by,\n                                        cs.created_time,\n                                        cs.modified_by,\n                                        cs.modified_time,\n                                        cs.tenant_id,\n                                        cs.lock_quantity,\n                                        cs.lock_num,\n                                        cs.log_id,\n                                        cs.stock_status,\n                                        cs.unique_code,\n                                        cs.last_enter_date,\n                                        bi.weight,\n                                        bi.producer,\n                                        bi.act_height,\n                                        bi.act_width,\n                                        bi.tax_amount,\n                      ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))\n                                            END                                          AS data_date,\n                                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n                                        cs.r_modified_time\n                                 FROM with_attr_value a\n                                          join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n                                               ON a.ATTRIBUTE1 = cs.WH_CODE\n                                                   AND a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n                                                   AND a.A"

sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\nupdate  with_attr_value set  ATTRIBUTE3 = 'A'  WHERE                                              SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:90:    "sql_preview": "/* =========================================================\n   CONSUME + LOG + DONEĪ·DELETE ųš╝½─Ż░ÕŻ©ą┤╚ļČį▒╚▒Ē output2Ż®\n   ─┐▒Ļ▒ĒŻ║dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2\n   Čė┴ą▒ĒŻ║dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2Ż©▓╗▒õŻ®\n   ┼·┤¾ąĪŻ║500Ż©ą┤╦└Ż¼▒▄├Ō LIMIT @var ▒©┤ĒŻ®\n   ========================================================= */\n\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\nSET @batch_id := REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '');\nSET @lock_expire_min := 30;\n\n-- 1) Ž¹Ęč╚šųŠŻ║RUNNING\nINSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (\n    task_name,\n    target_table,\n    batch_id,\n    water_from,\n    water_to,\n    start_time,\n    status\n) VALUES (\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2',\n             @batch_id,\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             NOW(),\n             0\n         );\n\n-- 2) ╗ž╩š╦°│¼╩▒Ż©┐╔čĪŻ®\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\nSET status = 0,\n    batch_id = NULL,\n    locked_time = NULL\nWHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND status = 1\n  AND locked_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL @lock_expire_min MINUTE);\n\n-- 3) ╦°ę╗┼· NEWŻ©500Ż®\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 q\nSET q.status      = 1,\n    q.batch_id    = @batch_id,\n    q.locked_time = NOW(),\n    q.attempts    = q.attempts + 1\nWHERE q.table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND q.status = 0\nORDER BY q.updated_time\nLIMIT 500000;\n\n-- 4) picked_count\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET picked_count = (\n    SELECT COUNT(*)\n    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\n    WHERE table_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n      AND status=1\n      AND batch_id=@batch_id\n)\nWHERE task_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id=@batch_id;\n\n-- 5) ų„▒Ē UPSERTŻ©ą┤╚ļ dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2Ż¼Į÷▒Š┼·Ż®\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2(\n    id,\n    sku_code,\n    sku_name,\n    batch_code,\n    actual_id,\n    steel_grade,\n    spec,\n    surface,\n    grade,\n    inner_grade,\n    weight,\n    quantity,\n    roll_length,\n    group_id,\n    group_name,\n    group_leader,\n    cat_name,\n    steel_grade_series,\n    date_time,\n    start_time,\n    end_time,\n    data_date,\n    MONTH,\n    YEAR,\n    tenant_id,\n    rate,\n    rate_unit,\n    rate_type,\n    theory_use_time,\n    actual_use_time,\n    send_happened,\n    is_ignore,\n    manuf_line_code,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    sku_type,\n    r_modified_time,\n    r_modified_date,\n    is_retention,\n    is_baf,\n    proce_note,\n    flaw_describe,\n    split_in_weight,\n    yield_rate,\n    next_machine_code,\n    next_sku_code\n)\nSELECT\n    a.id,\n    b.sku_code,\n    sku.sku_name,\n    b.batch_code,\n    b.actual_id,\n    b.steel_grade,\n    b.spec,\n    b.surface,\n    b.grade,\n    b.inner_grade,\n    a.weight,\n    a.quantity,\n    a.meter_num AS roll_length,\n    a.group_id,\n    a.group_code AS group_name,\n    mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\n\n    IFNULL((\n               SELECT d.cat_name\n               FROM ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\n                        JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\n               WHERE c.sku_code = b.sku_code\n                 AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\n                 AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\n               LIMIT 1\n           ), 'Ųõ╦³') AS cat_name,\n\n    (SELECT attr_value4\n     FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value\n     WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND status = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade\n     LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\n\n    a.end_time AS date_time,\n    a.start_time,\n    a.end_time,\n\n    CASE\n        WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        ELSE DATE(a.end_time)\n        END AS data_date,\n\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y')   AS YEAR,\n\n    b.tenant_id,\n\n    a.rate,\n    a.rate_unit,\n    a.rate_type,\n    a.theory_use_time,\n    TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.start_time, a.end_time) / 60 AS actual_use_time,\n\n    a.send_happened,\n    a"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:100:    "sql_preview": "-- =======================================\n-- ĪŠĄ┌ę╗▓ĮĪ┐ŪÕ┐š ├„ŽĖ▒Ē\n-- =======================================\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail;\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ĪŠĄ┌Č■▓ĮĪ┐▓Õ╚ļ ├„ŽĖ▒ĒŻ©└┤į┤ę╗Ż║ū¬┐ŌĄź╩²Š▌Ż®\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\n\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       t.out_warehouse,\n       ti.cust_code,\n       ti.cust_abbr,\n       ti.batch_code,\n       ti.quantity,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       null                                                           iron_loss,\n       t.transfer_order_code,\n       t.transfer_order_date,\n       IFNULL(rd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       rd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       ti.quantity AS weight,\n       0.0,\n       ww.wh_name,\n       '║■─Ž║Ļ═·'                                                  AS channel,\n       ti.contract_code,\n       CASE\n           WHEN DATE(t.transfer_order_date) IS NULL THEN date(t.approve_date)\n           ELSE DATE(t.transfer_order_date)\n           END                                                     AS data_date,\n       ti.receive_warehouse\n\nFROM ods_crm_sa_transfer_order t\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_transfer_order_detail ti ON t.transfer_order_id = ti.transfer_order_id AND ti.STATUS = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww\n              ON t.in_warehouse_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.STATUS = 1 AND SUBSTR(ww.wh_name, 1, 1) = 'B'\n                  and ww.wh_code <> 2098\n         LEFT JOIN ods_crm_sv_return_detail rd ON ti.contract_code = rd.contract_code AND ti.batch_code = rd.batch_code     and rd.return_detail_status in (20,30,40)\n\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi\n              ON ti.batch_code = bi.batch_code and bi.`status` = 1 and t.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info si ON bi.surface = si.surface and si.silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null\n\nWHERE t.transfer_order_state in (20, 40)\n  AND t.STATUS = 1\n  AND YEAR(t.transfer_order_date) >= '2025'\n  and t.tenant_id in (92,108);\n\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE a.place IS NULL\n;\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE  a.place <> b.receive_warehouse;\n-- =======================================\n-- ĪŠĄ┌╚²▓ĮĪ┐▓Õ╚ļ ├„ŽĖ▒ĒŻ©└┤į┤Č■Ż║┐¬ĄźŽĄ═│╩²Š▌Ż®\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       sdod.wh_code,\n       sdo.cust_code,\n       sdo.CUSt_ABBR,\n       sdod.batch_code,\n       sdod.weight,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       bi.iron_loss,\n       sdo.sales_delivery_order_code                                   transfer_order_code,\n       sdod.sales_delivery_order_date,\n       IFNULL(srd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       srd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       sdod.weight  AS weight,\n       sdod.amount_in_tax,\n       ''                                                           AS wh_name,\n       '║■─Ž║Ļ═·'                                                   AS channel,\n       sdod.contract_code,\n       date(ifnull(sdo.approver_date,sdo.created_time)),\n\n       sdod.receive_warehouse\nFROM ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo\n         join\n     ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code = sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n         and sdod.status = 1 and sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50', '20', '30')\n         JOIN ods_"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:104:    "task_name": "╣ĶĖų▒Ē├µ╩¶ąį(dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info)",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:110:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info (surface, surface_thickness, surface_number, surface_middle_part)\r\nSELECT DISTINCT\r\n    attr_value AS surface,\r\n    REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) AS surface_thickness,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN LOCATE('QW', attr_value) > 0 THEN 'QW'\r\n        ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 2)\r\n        END AS surface_number,\r\n    TRIM(\r\n            REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[^0-9]+', REGEXP_INSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]') + 1, 1)\r\n    ) AS surface_middle_part\r\nFROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value\r\nWHERE attr_id = '1015'\r\n  AND REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'\r\n  AND STATUS = 1\r\nHAVING surface_number IS NOT NULL;\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code\r\n    END,\r\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '╬▐╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'ą┬─▄į┤╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name\r\n        END;\r\n\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'\r\n                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%' THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code\r\n    END,\r\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '╬▐╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'ą┬─▄į┤╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%'\r\n                                                  THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name\r\n        END;\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET attr1 =\r\n        CASE\r\n            WHEN surface_middle_part LIKE '%K%' THEN '┐╠║█'\r\n            ELSE 'ĘŪ┐╠║█'\r\n            END\r\nWHERE silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX';\r\nCOMMIT;\r\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:140:    "sql_preview": "DELETE from  ads_sc_kc_19_detail  ;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_19_detail (\n    sync_data_date,                   -- ═¼▓Į╚šŲ┌\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, -- ╣ĶĖų▓·ŲĘ└Ó▒­├¹│Ų\n    wh_code,                          -- ▓ų┐Ō▒Ó┬ļ\n    wh_name,                          -- ▓ų┐Ō├¹│Ų\n    surface,                          -- ▒Ē├µ\n    surface_thickness,                -- ▒Ē├µ║±Č╚\n    surface_number,                   -- ▒Ē├µ║┼\n    grade,                            -- Ą╚╝Č\n    spec,                             -- ╣µĖ±\n    last_enter_date,                  -- ūŅĮ³╚ļ┐Ō╚šŲ┌\n    days,                             -- į┌┐Ō╠ņ╩²\n    batch_code,                       -- ┼·┤╬║┼\n    quantity                          -- ╩²┴┐\n)\nSELECT\n            CURRENT_DATE AS sync_data_date,\n            silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n            a.wh_code,\n            a.wh_name,\n            a.surface,\n            b.surface_thickness,\n            b.surface_number,\n            a.grade,\n            a.spec,\n            a.last_enter_date,\n            a.days,\n            a.batch_code,\n            a.quantity\nFROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock a\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info b\n              ON a.surface = b.surface\n         JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = '│╔ŲĘ'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n              ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                  AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\nWHERE a.tenant_id = 92;\n\ndelete from ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 ;\ninsert into ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1\nselect a.batch_code, a.data_date,\n       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n           PARTITION BY  a.batch_code\n           ORDER BY a.data_date ASC\n           ) AS rn\nfrom dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = '│╔ŲĘ'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n                                      ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                                          AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\n\n                                          and  a.tenant_id = 92 ;\n\n\nupdate ads_sc_kc_19_detail a join ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 b  on a.batch_code =b.batch_code and rn = 1  set  a.first_enter_date = b.data_date,first_days = datediff(CURDATE(),b.data_date)\n\n;\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_kc_19  ;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_19 (\n    sync_data_date,\n\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    surface,\n    surface_thickness,\n    surface_number,\n    a_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    b_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    c_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    d_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    quantity_1_3m_ton,\n    a_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    b_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    c_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    d_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    quantity_over_3m_ton,\n    flag,\n    flag1,\n    flag2) SELECT\n               sync_data_date,\n\n               silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n               surface,\n               surface_thickness,\n               surface_number,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'A' THEN  quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS a_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'B' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS b_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'C' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS c_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'D' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS d_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(\n                       SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN quantity END) / 1000,\n                       2) AS quantity_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days >"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:150:    "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_silicon_steel_qx_yield_rate_thickness_month;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_silicon_steel_qx_yield_rate_thickness_month\r\n\r\nSELECT\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) month,\r\n    b.surface_thickness,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 hib_in_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 hib_net_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) hib_yield_rate,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 cgo_in_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 cgo_net_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) cgo_yield_rate,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) yield_rate,\r\n    1-sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 )  waste_rate ,\r\n    YEAR ( data_date ) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_material_yield_rate_detail  a  join  dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info b on a.surface=b.surface\r\nWHERE\r\n    steel_grade = 'QX'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    tenant_id,b.surface_thickness,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' )\r\nunion all\r\nSELECT\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    YEAR ( data_date ) month,\r\n    b.surface_thickness,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 hib_in_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 hib_net_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010107' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) hib_yield_rate,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 cgo_in_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / 1000 cgo_net_weight,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code = '0104010209' THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) cgo_yield_rate,\r\n    sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) yield_rate,\r\n    1-sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN net_weight ELSE 0 END ) / NULLIF( sum( CASE WHEN sku_code IN ('0104010107','0104010209') THEN split_in_weight ELSE 0 END ), 0 )  waste_rate ,\r\n    YEAR ( data_date ) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_material_yield_rate_detail  a  join  dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info b on a.surface=b.surface\r\nWHERE\r\n    steel_grade = 'QX'\r\nGROUP BY b.surface_thickness,\r\n         tenant_id,\r\n         YEAR ( data_date )"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:160:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             scd.prod_spec4                    grade,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n\n      WHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               scd.prod_spec4,\n               sc.contract_month) a\n;\n\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_22\nwhere sync_data_date = current_date\n  and hour = hour(now())\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_22 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1,\n                          sync_time, is_newest)\nSELECT aa.sync_data_date,\n       a.HOUR,\n       aa.tenant_id,\n       aa.surface,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity END)         a_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity END)         b_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity END) total_quantity,\n       1                                                        rk,\n       1                                                        rk1,\n       a.sync_time,\n       a.is_newest\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                          sync_data_date,\n                      a.tenant_id,\n                      a.surface\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_22_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n          AND c.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.sync_data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 60 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE,\n                      tenant_id,\n                      attribute2\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_22_detail a ON aa.surface = a.surface\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\n    AND a.sync_data_date = aa.sync_data_date\n    AND a.HOUR = 18\nGROUP BY aa.sync_data_date,\n         a.HOUR,\n         aa.tenant_id,\n         aa.surface,\n         a.sync_time,\n         a.is_newest\nUNION ALL\nSELECT sync_data_date,\n       HOUR,\n       tenant_id,\n       'ū▄╝Ų' AS                                                   surface,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         a_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         b_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) total"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_read.json:170:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    with_attr_value\nWHERE\n    scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8) SELECT\n    *\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT\n            sc.tenant_id,\n            'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 surface,\n            scd.prod_spec4 grade,\n            sc.contract_month,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight/ 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_dj,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped/ 1000  WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_sy\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n                JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n                AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30,50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n                JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n\n        WHERE\n            sc.contract_state in (30,50)\n          AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n          AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n          AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n        GROUP BY\n            sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_gx_xs_09\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_09 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1, sync_time, is_newest) SELECT\n                                                                                                                                                       CURRENT_DATE sync_data_date,\n                                                                                                                                                       HOUR(NOW()) HOUR,\n                                                                                                                                                       aa.tenant_id,\n                                                                                                                                                       aa.surface,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity  END) a_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                                       1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                                       a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                                       a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            a.surface\n        FROM\n            ads_gx_xs_09_detail a\n                JOIN"

WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)\n                                            ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))\n                                            END                                          AS data_date,\n                                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n                                        cs.r_modified_time\n                                 FROM with_attr_value a\n             "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/ods_fair_ums_tenant_read.json:10:    "sql_preview": "delete  from ads_xz_hq_002_detail ;\ninsert  into ads_xz_hq_002_detail\n select oi.output_item_id,a.output_id,\n       a.output_code,\n       a.output_date,\n       a.wh_code,\n       ww.wh_name,\n       a.dept_code,\n       ud.dept_name,\n       oi.sku_code,\n       '' sku_name,\n       '' sku_desc,\n       oi.unit,\n       av3.attr_value_name   unit_desc,\n       oi.unit_price,\n       oi.quantity,\n       oi.purpose,\n       a.rd_flag,\n       av.attr_value_name  AS rd_flag_desc,\n       a.note,\n       a.bill_status,\n       a.tenant_id,\n       ut.tenant_name,\n       a.created_by,\n       a.created_time,\n       a.modified_by,\n       a.modified_time,\n       a.wf_applicant,\n       a.wf_applicant_name,\n       a.wf_proc_inst_id,\n       a.wf_template_code,\n       a.wf_status,\n       av1.attr_value_name AS wf_status_desc,\n       a.wms_output_id\nfrom ods_fair_gm_wh_output a\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_wms_warehouse ww\n                    ON a.wh_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.status = 1 and a.tenant_id = ww.tenant_id\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_ums_dept ud\n                    ON a.dept_code = ud.dept_code AND ud.status = 1 and a.tenant_id = ud.tenant_id\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_ums_tenant ut\n                    ON a.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id AND ut.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av\n                    ON a.rd_flag = av.attr_value AND av.attr_id = 1032 AND av.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av1\n                    ON a.wf_status = av1.attr_value AND av1.attr_id = 1071 AND av1.status = 1\n         join ods_fair_gm_wh_output_item oi on a.output_id = oi.output_id and oi.status = 1\n#          join ods_fair_pm_sku sku on oi.sku_code = sku.sku_code and sku.status = 1\n         LEFT JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av3\n                   ON oi.unit = av3.attr_value AND av3.attr_id = 1017 AND av3.status = 1\nWHERE a.status = 1 ;\n\nupdate  ads_xz_hq_002_detail a join ods_fair_pm_sku sku on a.sku_code = sku.sku_code and sku.status = 1 set a.sku_name =sku.sku_name,a.sku_desc=sku.sku_desc  ;\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/ods_fair_ums_tenant_read.json:20:    "sql_preview": "delete  from ads_xz_hq_001_detail ;\ninsert  into ads_xz_hq_001_detail\nSELECT\n    ei.enter_item_id            AS enter_item_id,\n    a.enter_id                  AS enter_id,\n    a.enter_code                AS enter_code,\n    a.enter_date                AS enter_date,\n    ei.sku_code                 AS sku_code,'',\n    ei.model                    AS model,\n    ei.unit                     AS unit,\n    av3.attr_value_name         AS unit_desc,\n    ei.quantity                 AS quantity,\n    ei.price                    AS price,\n    ei.amount                   AS amount,\n    ei.note                     AS item_note,\n    a.wh_code                   AS wh_code,\n    ww.wh_name                  AS wh_name,\n    a.dept_code                 AS dept_code,\n    ud.dept_name                AS dept_name,\n    a.rd_flag                   AS rd_flag,\n    av.attr_value_name          AS rd_flag_desc,\n    a.note                      AS header_note,\n    a.tenant_id                 AS tenant_id,\n    ut.tenant_name              AS tenant_name,\n    a.created_by                AS created_by,\n    a.created_time              AS created_time,\n    a.modified_by               AS modified_by,\n    a.modified_time             AS modified_time,\n    a.wf_applicant              AS wf_applicant,\n    a.wf_applicant_name         AS wf_applicant_name,\n    a.wf_proc_inst_id           AS wf_proc_inst_id,\n    a.wf_template_code          AS wf_template_code,\n    a.wf_status                 AS wf_status,\n    av1.attr_value_name         AS wf_status_desc,\n    a.wms_enter_id              AS wms_enter_id,\n    a.wf_enter_type             AS wf_enter_type,\n    av2.attr_value_name         AS wf_enter_type_desc\nFROM ods_fair_gm_wh_enter a\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_gm_wh_enter_item ei\n                    ON a.enter_id = ei.enter_id AND ei.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_wms_warehouse ww\n                    ON a.wh_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.status = 1 and a.tenant_id =ww.tenant_id\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_ums_dept ud\n                    ON a.dept_code = ud.dept_code AND ud.status = 1 and a.tenant_id =ud.tenant_id\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_ums_tenant ut\n                    ON a.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id AND ut.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av\n                    ON a.rd_flag = av.attr_value AND av.attr_id = 1032 AND av.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av1\n                    ON a.wf_status = av1.attr_value AND av1.attr_id = 1071 AND av1.status = 1\n         INNER JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av2\n                    ON a.wf_enter_type = av2.attr_value AND av2.attr_id = 1178 AND av2.status = 1\n         LEFT JOIN ods_fair_sys_attr_value av3\n                   ON ei.unit = av3.attr_value AND av3.attr_id = 1017 AND av3.status = 1\nWHERE\n    a.status = 1\n  ;\nupdate  ads_xz_hq_001_detail a join ods_fair_pm_sku sku on a.sku_code = sku.sku_code and sku.status = 1 set a.sku_name =sku.sku_name  ;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:687:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue (id, modified_time) SELECT DISTINCT\r\n                                                                              a.id,\r\n                                                                              NOW()\r\nFROM\r\n    ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id\r\nWHERE\r\n    b.r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n  AND b.r_modified_time <= NOW() UNION SELECT id, NOW() FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output WHERE r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n                                                                                            AND r_modified_time <= NOW();\r\nUPDATE dwd_update_tracker\r\nSET last_updated = NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR\r\nWHERE\r\n    table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output (\r\n    id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    batch_code,\r\n    actual_id,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    surface,\r\n    grade,\r\n    inner_grade,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    roll_length,\r\n    group_id,\r\n    group_name,\r\n    group_leader,\r\n    cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    date_time,\r\n    start_time,\r\n    end_time,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    rate             ,\r\n    rate_unit     ,\r\n    rate_type        ,\r\n    theory_use_time,\r\n    actual_use_time,\r\n    send_happened,\r\n    is_ignore,\r\n    manuf_line_code,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    sku_type,\r\n    r_modified_time,r_modified_date,\r\n    is_retention,is_baf, proce_note ,\r\n    flaw_describe,\r\n    split_in_weight,\r\n    yield_rate,next_machine_code ,\r\n    next_sku_code ) SELECT\r\n                        a.id,\r\n                        b.sku_code,\r\n                        sku.sku_name,\r\n                        b.batch_code,\r\n                        b.actual_id,\r\n                        b.steel_grade,\r\n                        b.spec,\r\n                        b.surface,\r\n                        b.grade,\r\n                        b.inner_grade,\r\n                        a.weight,\r\n                        a.quantity,\r\n                        a.meter_num AS roll_length,\r\n                        a.group_id AS group_id,\r\n                        a.group_code AS group_name,\r\n                        mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\r\n                        IFNULL(\r\n                                (\r\n                                    SELECT\r\n                                        d.cat_name\r\n                                    FROM\r\n                                        ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\r\n                                            JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\r\n                                    WHERE\r\n                                        c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n                                      AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\r\n                                      AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\r\n                                    LIMIT 1),\r\n                                'ÕģČÕ«ā') AS cat_name,\r\n                        (SELECT attr_value4 FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND STATUS = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\r\n                        a.end_time AS date_time,\r\n                        a.start_time,\r\n                        a.end_time,\r\n                        CASE\r\n\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id = 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE date(a.end_t"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:759:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003  where data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day\r\n;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT\r\n                                         a.tenant_id,\r\n                                         a.plate_type,\r\n                                         a.surface,\r\n                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\r\n                                         a.steel_grade_series,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,\r\n                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä') )or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,\r\n                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         DATE_FORMAT( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' ) MONTH,\r\n                                         YEAR ( a.data_date ) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\nWHERE a.plate_type is not null\r\n  and  a.defined_manuf_line_name  is not null\r\n  and a.batch_code is not null\r\n  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore=0\r\n  AND tenant_id IN('80','92')\r\n  AND a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day\r\n\r\n\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1  ,\r\n    a.steel_grade_series,\r\n    bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate ,\r\n    a.plate_type\r\n;\r\n\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT\r\n                                         a.tenant_id,\r\n                                         a.plate_type,\r\n                                         a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,\r\n                                         a.steel_grade_series,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,\r\n                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R')  or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,\r\n                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD'  or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                     "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:799:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003  SELECT\n                                                                         a.tenant_id,\n                                                                         a.plate_type,\n                                                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\n                                                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                         CASE\n                                                                             WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN\n                                                                                 0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)\n                                                                             END average_thickness,\n                                                                         a.data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual c\n             ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\n                 and  a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                 AND c.status = 1\n                 AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\nWHERE\n    a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\n  AND a.plate_type IS NOT NULL\n  AND a.manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,\n    a.data_date;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003 AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END\nSET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 SELECT\n                                                                             a.tenant_id,\n                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                             a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\n  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.data_date,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 AS source ON t"

AS period,\n    data_date,\n    day_weight,\n    day_quantity,\n    day_average_thickness,\n    day_lower_weight,\n    day_lower_quantity,\n    day_breakdown_frequency,\n    day_planned_downtime,\n ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003\nWHERE plate_type IN ('ÕåĘĶĮ¦', 'ń▓ŠÕŖĀÕĘź', 'ńĪģķÆó')\n\nUNION ALL\n\nSELECT\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    group_manuf_line_name,\n    manuf_line_name,\n  'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' AS manuf_line_name,\n    '' AS attr1,\n    period,\n    data_date,\n    SUM(weight) AS weight,\n    SUM(quantity) AS quantity,\n    0 AS average_thickness,\n    SUM(lower_weight) AS /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:861:      "sql_preview": "SET @start_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY, '%Y-%m');\n\nTRUNCATE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 (\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    attr1,\n    `MONTH`,\n    data_date,\n    month_weight,\n    month_quantity,\n    month_average_thickness,\n    month_lower_weight,\n    month_lower_quantity,\n    month_breakdown_frequency,\n    month_planned_downtime,\n    month_unplanned_downtime,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity\n)\nSELECT\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    attr1,\n    month,\n    data_date,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_weight, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    AVG(COALESCE(day_average_thickness, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_weight, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_breakdown_frequency, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_planned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_unplanned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_product, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity, '') AS DECIMAL(40,4)), 0)) OVER w\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined\nWHERE month >= @start_month\nWINDOW w AS (\n    PARTITION BY tenant_id, plate_type, manuf_line_name, attr1, month\n    ORDER BY data_date\n    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW\n);\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nINNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 AS monthly\n    ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id\n    AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type\n    AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name\n    AND target.attr1 <=> monthly.attr1\n    AND target.month = monthly.`MONTH`\n    AND target.data_date = monthly.data_date\nSET\n    target.month_weight = monthly.month_weight,\n    target.month_quantity = monthly.month_quantity,\n    target.month_average_thickness = monthly.month_average_thickness,\n    target.month_lower_weight = monthly.month_lower_weight,\n    target.month_lower_quantity = monthly.month_lower_quantity,\n    target.month_breakdown_frequency = monthly.month_breakdown_frequency,\n    target.month_planned_downtime = monthly.month_planned_downtime,\n    target.month_unplanned_downtime = monthly.month_unplanned_downtime,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    target.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity\nWHERE target.month >= @start_month;\n\nANALYZE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined;\nANALYZE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;\n"

total_month_quantity,\n             avg(month_average_thickness) AS total_month_average_thickness,\n             SUM(month_lower_weight) AS total_month_lower_weight,\n             SUM(month_lower_quantity) AS total_month_lower_quantity,\n             SUM(month_breakdown_frequency) AS total_month_breakdown_frequency,\n             SUM(month_planned_downtime) AS total_month_planned_downtime,\n             SUM(month_unplanned_downtime) AS total_month_unplanned_downtime,\n             SUM(month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS total_month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n             SUM(month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS total_month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n             SUM(month_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS total_month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n             SUM(month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS total_month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n             SUM(month_manufacturing_finished_product) AS total_month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n             SUM(month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS total_month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n             MONTH,\n             YEAR,\n             rk,\n             1\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_define"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1032:      "sql_preview": "delete from  dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail ;\r\ninsert into dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail (\r\n    contract_head_id,\r\n    vendor_name,\r\n    contract_code,\r\n    vendor_contract_code,\r\n    include_tax_amount,\r\n    contract_quantity,\r\n    payment_period,\r\n\t\tpayment_period_sort_order_desc,\r\n    planned_payment_date,\r\n    payment_stage,\r\n    stage_payment_amount,\r\n    payment_ratio,\r\n    sync_time,\r\n    rk\r\n)\r\nselect\r\n    a.contract_head_id,\r\n    b.vendor_name,\r\n    b.contract_code,\r\n    b.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    b.include_tax_amount/10000,\r\n    c.contract_quantity,\r\n    a.payment_period,\r\n\t\trow_number() over ( partition by vendor_contract_code order by payment_period desc ) as payment_period_sort_order_desc ,\r\n    a.planned_payment_date,\r\n    case\r\n        when a.payment_stage = 'advance_charge' then 'ķóäõ╗śµ¼Š' \r\n        when a.payment_stage = 'deliver' then 'ÕÅæĶ┤¦µ¼Š' \r\n    end payment_stage,\r\n    a.stage_payment_amount/10000,\r\n    a.payment_ratio,\r\n    now() sync_time,\r\n    1 rk\r\nfrom\r\n    dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_pay_plan a\r\njoin dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head b \r\n    on a.contract_head_id = b.contract_head_id\r\n    and b.created_by = '2307135' \r\n    and (b.contract_status = 'archived' or b.contract_status = 'approved') \r\n    and b.bu_code = '0070000'\r\n\t\tand year(b.START_DATE) >=2025\r\njoin (\r\n    select contract_head_id, sum(contract_quantity) / 1000 contract_quantity \r\n    from dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material \r\n    group by contract_head_id\r\n) c on a.contract_head_id = c.contract_head_id;\r\nupdate dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail as target\r\ninner join (\r\n\tselect\r\n\t\tsource_number contract_code,\r\n\t\tadvance_amount / 10000 payment_stage, \r\n    sum(stage_payment_amount) stage_payment_amount, \r\n    sum(payment_ratio) payment_ratio, \r\n\t\tsum(advance_amount) ,\r\n    max(sync_time) sync_time,\r\n    2 rk,'ÕÉ”' vendor_contract_code;\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value AS target\r\nINNER JOIN ( SELECT vendor_contract_code, advance_amount FROM dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail
