ads_gx_cg_08_detail SELECT\r\n                                    a.vendor_contract_code,\r\n                                    a.TEXTURE,\r\n                                    a.type,\r\n                                    a.vendor_name,\r\n                                    a.spec,\r\n                                    a.surface,\r\n                                    a.contract_quantity,\r\n                                    a.quantity,\r\n                                    a.diff_quantity,\r\n                                    a.rate,\r\n                                    a.list_order,\r\n                                    a.is_completion,\r\n                                    1 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP' UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    'Õ░ÅĶ«Ī' TEXTURE,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    '' spec,\r\n    '' surface,\r\n    sum( a.contract_quantity ) contract_quantity,\r\n    sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n    sum( a.diff_quantity ) diff_quantity,\r\n    CASE\r\n\r\n        WHEN sum( a.contract_quantity ) = 0 THEN\r\n            0 ELSE sum( a.quantity ) / sum( a.contract_quantity )\r\n        END rate,\r\n    a.list_order,\r\n    a.is_completion,\r\n    2 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    a.list_order UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n    'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' vendor_contract_code,\r\n    'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' TEXTURE,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    '' spec,\r\n    '' surface,\r\n    sum( a.contract_quantity ) contract_quantity,\r\n    sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n    sum( a.diff_quantity ) diff_quantity,\r\n    CASE\r\n\r\n        WHEN sum( a.contract_quantity ) = 0 THEN\r\n            0 ELSE sum( a.quantity ) / sum( a.contract_quantity )\r\n        END rate,\r\n    a.list_order,\r\n    a.is_completion,\r\n    3 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    a.list_order;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1079:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material \nSET line_remark = REPLACE(line_remark, ' ', '') \nWHERE line_remark LIKE '% %';\nUPDATE  dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head\nset vendor_contract_code = REPLACE(vendor_contract_code, ' ', '') \nWHERE vendor_contract_code LIKE '% %';\nDELETE FROM DW_ADS_PRD.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK;\n\n-- ń¼¼1µ«Ą INSERT\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK \nSELECT\n\n   b.vendor_contract_code,\n    TEXTURE                                                  AS line_remark,\n  case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É'   end        AS type,\n    b.vendor_name                                        AS vendor_name,\n    a.dimension                                          AS spec,\n    a.surface                                            AS surface,\n    SUM(a.quantity_ton)                                  AS contract_quantity,\n    COALESCE(c.quantity,0)                               AS quantity,\n    SUM(a.quantity_ton) - COALESCE(c.quantity,0)         AS diff_quantity,\n    COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0)             AS rate,\n    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0) >= 0.95 \n         THEN 'µś»' ELSE 'ÕÉ”' END                        AS is_completion,\n    0                                      AS list_order,\n    1                                                    AS rk,\n    1                                                    AS rk1,\n    CURRENT_DATE                                         AS data_date,\n    NOW()                                                AS sync_time\nFROM dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material a\nJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head b \n  ON a.contract_head_id = b.contract_head_id\nLEFT JOIN (\n    SELECT\n       replace(pa_item.pur_contract_code,' ','')  pur_contract_code,\n        pa_item.spec,\n        pa_item.surface,\n        SUM(pa_item.quantity/1000) AS quantity\n    FROM dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival   pa\n    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival_item pa_item\n      ON pa.arrival_id = pa_item.arrival_id\n     AND pa_item.status = 1\n    WHERE pa.status = 1\n      AND pa.tenant_id = 92\n    GROUP BY pa_item.pur_contract_code, pa_item.spec, pa_item.surface\n) c \n  ON b.vendor_contract_code = replace(c.pur_contract_code,' ','')\n AND a.dimension = c.spec\n AND a.surface = c.surface\n\nWHERE b.contract_class = '14'\n  AND b.contract_status IN ('archived','approved')\n  AND a.dimension <> ''\n \tand b.bu_code = '0070000'\n\tand b.vendor_contract_code <> '' \n\tand b.vendor_contract_code is not null \n\tand a.STEEL_TYPE   in ('QX','WQX')\n\tAND year(a.CREATION_DATE) >= 2025\n\t\n  AND b.vendor_contract_code NOT IN (\n      SELECT attribute1 \n      FROM dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value \n      WHERE scene = 'BI-GX-CG-003-DETAIL-PC'\n  )\nGROUP BY \n    b.vendor_contract_code,\n    TEXTURE,\n    case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É'   end,\n    b.vendor_name,\n    a.dimension,\n    a.surface,\n    c.quantity;\n\n-- ń¼¼2µ«Ą INSERT’╝łÕ¤║õ║Ä created_by=''2307135'' õĖö dimension=''’╝ē \nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK\nSELECT\n     sub.vendor_contract_code,\n    sub.line_remark                               AS line_remark,\n    sub.type                                      AS type,\n    sub.vendor_name                               AS vendor_name,\n    sub.spec                                      AS spec,\n    sub.surface                                   AS surface,\n    MAX(sub.contract_quantity)                    AS contract_quantity,\n    SUM(sub.quantity)                             AS quantity,\n    MAX(sub.contract_quantity) - SUM(sub.quantity) AS diff_quantity,\n    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(sub.quantity) / NULLIF(MAX(sub.contract_quantity),0),2),0) AS rate,\n    sub.is_completion                             AS is_completion,\n   "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1122:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nUPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual\nset lower_amount = 0 where lower_amount <> 0  ;\n\nUPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual a\n    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT a1.attr_value             AS steel_grade,\n                               c.attribute2              AS grade,\n                               COALESCE(c.attribute3, 0) AS lower_amount\n               FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value a1\n                        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value c\n                                  ON a1.attr_value4 = c.ATTRIBUTE1\n                                      AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-003-LOWER-AMOUNT'\n               WHERE a1.attr_id = 1013\n                 AND a1.status = 1) rule\n    ON rule.steel_grade = a.steel_grade\n        AND rule.grade = a.grade\n    join (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code\n          FROM (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code\n                FROM ads_quality_machine_detail\n                where inner_grade not in ('A1', 'A2')\n                UNION ALL\n                SELECT a.tenant_id, a.batch_code\n                FROM dwd_task_prod_actual a\n                         join ads_quality_machine_detail b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                    and a.in_batch_code = b.batch_code\n                    AND b.disposal_method = '30'\n                    AND b.inner_grade not in\n                        ('A1', 'A2')) t) t on a.batch_code = t.batch_code and a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id\nSET a.lower_amount =\n        CASE\n            WHEN  a.inner_grade  = 'A3' THEN\n                a.net_weight / 1000 *\n                CASE\n                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = 'Ķ┐öõ┐«' THEN 80\n                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = 'µö╣ĶŻģ/µö╣ĶĮ¦' THEN 300\n                    ELSE 100\n                    END\n            ELSE\n                CASE\n                    WHEN rule.lower_amount IS NULL THEN NULL\n                    ELSE a.net_weight / 1000 * rule.lower_amount\n                    END\n            END\n;\ntruncate table ads_quality_machine_detail;\ninsert into ads_quality_machine_detail (actual_id,\n                                        batch_code,\n                                        in_batch_code,\n                                        original_batch_code,\n                                        tenant_id,\n                                        tenant_name,\n                                        machine_code,\n                                        machine_name,\n                                        main_defect_name,\n                                        main_defect_desc,\n                                        main_defect_machine,\n                                        steel_grade,\n                                        steel_grade_type,\n                                        spec,\n                                        surface,\n                                        grade,\n                                        inner_grade,\n                                        main_defect_machine_name,\n                                        split_in_weight,\n                                        in_split_in_weight,\n                                        net_weight,\n                                        in_net_weight,\n                                        sku_code,\n                                        sku_name,\n                                        quality,\n                                        output_time,\n                                        data_date,\n                                        main_defect_code,\n                                        lower_amount,\n                                        producer,disposal_method,\n                                        disposal_method_name)\nselect a.actual_id,\n       a.batch_code,\n       a.in_batch_code,\n       a.original_batch_code,\n       a.tenant_id,\n       a.tenant_name,\n       a.machine_code,\n       a.machine_name,\n       a.main_defect_name,\n       a.main_defect_desc,\n       a.main_defect_machine,\n       a.steel_grade,\n       a.steel_grade_type,\n       a.spec,\n       a.surface,\n "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1229:      "sql_preview": "/* =========================================================\n   µ»ÅÕ░ÅµŚČµē¦ĶĪīĶäÜµ£¼’╝ÜÕłĘµ¢░ current + ĶĪźÕŁŚµ«Ą + ÕÄåÕÅ▓ńĢÖµĪŻ’╝łµŚźµ£¤+Õ░ÅµŚČ’╝ē\n   ========================================================= */\n\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\n/* =========================\n   1) ÕłĘµ¢░ current ĶĪ©\n   ========================= */\n\nDELETE FROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock;\n\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_current_stock (\n    stock_inst_id,\n    top_cat_code,\n    mid_cat_code,\n    leaf_cat_code,\n    sku_code,\n    sku_name,\n    wh_code,\n    wh_name,\n    wh_class,\n    steel_grade,\n    spec,\n    surface,\n    grade,\n    batch_code,\n    quantity,\n    num,\n    out_quantity,\n    out_num,\n    in_quantity,\n    in_num,\n    trans_in_quantity,\n    trans_in_num,\n    trans_out_quantity,\n    trans_out_num,\n    plan_quantity,\n    plan_num,\n    disable_quantity,\n    disable_num,\n    ava_quantity,\n    ava_num,\n    m_date,\n    exp_date,\n    `status`,\n    created_by,\n    created_time,\n    modified_by,\n    modified_time,\n    tenant_id,\n    tenant_name,\n    lock_quantity,\n    lock_num,\n    log_id,\n    stock_status,\n    unique_code,\n    last_enter_date,\n    weight,\n    producer,\n    act_height,\n    act_width,\n    tax_amount,\n    amount,\n    make_order_num,\n    next_machine_code,\n    project_number,\n    sync_time,\n    data_date,\n    days,\n    r_modified_time,\n    iron_loss\n)\nWITH invalid_parent_batches AS (\n    SELECT DISTINCT parent_batch_code\n    FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info\n    WHERE `status` = 1\n      AND parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n      AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code\n)\nSELECT\n    cs.stock_inst_id,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2) AS top_cat_code,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4) AS mid_cat_code,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6) AS leaf_cat_code,\n    cs.sku_code,\n    ods_sku.sku_name,\n    cs.wh_code,\n    ww.wh_name,\n    ww.wh_class,\n    cs.steel_grade,\n    cs.spec,\n    cs.surface,\n    cs.grade,\n    cs.batch_code,\n    cs.quantity,\n    cs.num,\n    cs.out_quantity,\n    cs.out_num,\n    cs.in_quantity,\n    cs.in_num,\n    cs.trans_in_quantity,\n    cs.trans_in_num,\n    cs.trans_out_quantity,\n    cs.trans_out_num,\n    cs.plan_quantity,\n    cs.plan_num,\n    cs.disable_quantity,\n    cs.disable_num,\n    cs.ava_quantity,\n    cs.ava_num,\n    cs.m_date,\n    cs.exp_date,\n    cs.`status`,\n    cs.created_by,\n    cs.created_time,\n    cs.modified_by,\n    cs.modified_time,\n    cs.tenant_id,\n    mt.tenant_name,\n    cs.lock_quantity,\n    cs.lock_num,\n    cs.log_id,\n    cs.stock_status,\n    cs.unique_code,\n    cs.last_enter_date,\n    cs.ava_quantity weight,\n    bi.producer,\n    bi.act_height,\n    bi.act_width,\n    bi.tax_amount,\n    bi.amount,\n    bi.make_order_num,\n    bi.next_machine_code,\n    bi.project_number,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    CASE\n        WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)\n        ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))\n        END AS data_date,\n    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n    cs.r_modified_time,\n    bi.iron_loss\nFROM ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww\n              ON cs.wh_code = ww.wh_code\n                  AND cs.tenant_id = ww.tenant_id\n                  AND ww.`status` = '1'\n         JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku ods_sku\n              ON cs.sku_code = ods_sku.sku_code\n                  AND ods_sku.`status` = '1'\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi\n              ON cs.batch_code = bi.batch_code\n                  AND cs.sku_code = bi.sku_code\n                  AND cs.steel_grade = bi.steel_grade\n                  AND cs.surface = bi.surface\n                  AND cs.grade = bi.grade\n                  AND cs.spec = bi.spec\n                  AND cs.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id\n                  AND bi.`status` = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_mdm_tenant mt\n              ON cs.tenant_id = mt.tenant_id\n                  AND mt.`status` = '1'\n         LEFT JOIN invalid_parent_batches ipb\n                   ON cs.batch_code = ipb.parent_batch_code\nWHERE cs.quantity > 0\n  AND cs.ava_quantity > 0\n  AND cs.`status` = 1\n#   AND cs.te"

tax_price = 0\n  and price <> 0\n  and tenant_id in (99, 101) ;\nDELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_26_01;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_26_01\nWITH\n    sales_detail AS (\n        SELECT\n ut.tenant_id,\n            ut.tenant_name,\n            CASE\n                WHEN (w.original_batch_code IS NULL or  w.original_batch_code = '') THEN b.batch_num\n                ELSE w.original_batch_code\n                END AS original_batch_code,\n            b.batch_num AS batch_code,\n            b.producer,\n            b.quantity,\n            b.steel_type,\n            a.creation_date,\n            a.approver_date AS approver_datetime,\n            DATE(a.approver_date) AS approver_date,\n            b.steel_standart,\n            a.internal_type,\n            b.surface,\n            b.tax_price,\n            b.local_tax_price,\n            b.amount_including_tax,\n            b.local_tax_amount,\n            b.local_amount,\n            b.pricing_type,\n            CASE\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 10 THEN 'µīēµĢ░ķćÅĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 20 THEN 'µīēńÉåķćŹĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 30 THEN 'µīēńŻģķćŹĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                END AS pricing_type_desc,\n            b.lilun_weigth_kg,\n            b.weigth_kg,\n            b.delivery_method,\n            b.shipping_address,\n            b.stock_code AS sku_code,\n            b.stock_name AS sku_name,\n            b.unit,\n            a.warehouse,\n            b.contract_code,\n            b.remarks,\n            b.currency\n        FROM ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill a\n                 JOIN ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill_detailed b\n                      ON a.invoice_bill_code = b.invoice_bill_code\n                          AND b.state = 70\n                 LEFT JOIN dim_ums_tenant ut\n                           ON a.plant_code = ut.tenant_code\n                               AND ut.status = 1\n                 LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info w\n                           ON b.batch_num = w.batch_code\n                               AND b.stock_code = w.sku_code\n                               AND b.grade = w.grade\n                               AND b.steel_standart = w.spec\n                               AND b.steel_type = w.steel_grade\n                               AND b.surface = w.surface\n                               AND w.status = 1\n                               AND w.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id\n        WHERE a.plant_code IN ('0110000', '30110000')\n          AND a.creation_date >= '2026-01-01'\n          AND a.invoice_bill_state = 70\n    ),\n    batch_list AS (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            tenant_id,\n            original_batch_code\n        FROM sales_detail\n        WHERE original_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n    ),\n    enter_item AS (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            batch_code,\n            wh_name,\n            tax_amount,\n            tax_price,\n            enter_date,\n            created_time\n        FROM (\n                 SELECT\n                     e.tenant_id,\n                     e.batch_code,\n                     e.wh_name,\n                     e.tax_amount,\n                     CASE\n                         WHEN e.pricing_type = 10 THEN e.tax_amount / NULLIF(e.weight, 0)\n                         ELSE e.tax_price\n                         END AS tax_price,\n                     e.enter_date,\n                     e.created_time,\n                     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n                         PARTITION BY e.tenant_id, e.batch_code\n                         ORDER BY e.created_time ASC\n                         ) AS rn\n                 FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item e\n             ) x\n        WHERE rn = 1\n    ),\n    calc AS (\n        SELECT\n            a.*,\n            b.tax_price AS enter_tax_price,\n            b.enter_date,\n            mp.unit_price AS materi"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1338:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,\n                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             a.surface_thickness,\n             a.surface_number,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n             a.attr1\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)\n          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX'\n      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               a.surface_thickness,\n               a.surface_number,\n               sc.contract_month,\n               a.attr1) a\n;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_04_03;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_04_03 (tenant_id,attr1, surface_thickness, surface_number, qx_a_weight, qx_b_weight, qx_c_weight,\n                             qx_d_weight, qx_weight, data_date, sync_time, rk, rk1)\nSELECT aa.tenant_id,\n       a.attr1,\n       aa.surface_thickness,\n       aa.surface_number,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END)                   qx_a_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END)                   qx_b_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END)                   qx_c_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END)                   qx_d_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) qx_weight,\n       CURRENT_DATE                                                 data_date,\n       now()                                                        sync_time,\n       1                                                            rk,\n       1                                                            rk1\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n                      c.surface_thickness,\n                      c.surface_number\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_20_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id,attribute9,\n                      attribute3,\n                      attribute4\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_04_detail a ON aa.surface_thickness = a.surface_thickness and aa.attr1 = a.attr1\n    AND aa.surface_number = a.surface_number\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\nGROUP BY aa.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n         aa.surface_thickness,\n         aa.surface_number;\nUPDATE ads_gx_x"

a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                               a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                               a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                            sync_data_date,\n      sc.contract_month,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight/ 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_dj,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped/ 1000  WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_sy\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n                JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n                AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30,50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n                JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'XNY'\n\n        WHERE\n            sc.contract_state in (30,50)\n          AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n          AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n          AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n        GROUP BY\n            sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\nupdate  with_attr_value set  ATTRIBUTE3 = 'A'  WHERE  scene = 'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' and  ATTRIBUTE1 = 'HNHW-WQ2503200037' ;\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_gx_xs_21\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_21 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1, sync_time, is_newest) SELECT\n                                                                                                                                               aa.sync_data_date,\n                                                                                                                                               a.HOUR,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.tenant_id,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.surface,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity  END) a_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                               a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                               a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                            sync_data_date,\n                        a.ten"

'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8,\n                             ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT sc.tenant_id,\n       'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n       sc.contract_code,\n       sc.cust_abbr,\n       sc.contract_month,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n       sc.is_signed_by_both\nFROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type in (20,30)\nWHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n  AND sc.STATUS = 1\n  and  scd.sku_code in (select sku_code\n                        from ods_mes_pm_sku sku\n                                 join with_attr_value av1 ON sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n                            AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'  and av1.tenant_id  = 92\n                        where   sku.status = 1  )\nGROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n         sc.contract_code,\n         sc.cust_abbr,\n         sc.contract_month\n;\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8,\n                             ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT sc.tenant_id,\n       'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n       sc.contract_code,\n       sc.cust_abbr,\n       sc.contract_month,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n       sc.is_signed_by_both\nFROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type = 10\nWHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n  AND sc.STATUS = 1\n  and  scd.sku_code in (select sku_code\n                        from ods_mes_pm_sku sku\n                                 join with_attr_value av1 ON sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n                            AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'  and av1.tenant_id  = 92\n                        where   sku.status = 1  )\nGROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n         sc.contract_code,\n         sc.cust_abbr,\n         sc.contract_month\n;\ndelete  from ads_gx_xs_18_08 ;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_08 (\n    cust_abbr,\n    january, february, march, april, may, june, /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1739:      "sql_preview": "\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_01\r\nWHERE\r\n    data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_01 (\r\n    products_category,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    products_type,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    wh_code,\r\n    wh_name,\r\n    dept_code,\r\n    dept_name,\r\n    machine_code,\r\n    machine_name,\r\n    other_machine_code,\r\n    other_machine_name,\r\n    rd_style,\r\n    rd_style_name,\r\n    top_cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    surface,\r\n    surface_thickness,\r\n    surface_number,\r\n    surface_middle_part,\r\n    grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    roll_length,\r\n    iron_loss,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    sync_time,\r\n    bill_type,\r\n    is_production_out) SELECT\r\n                           a.products_category,\r\n                           a.plate_type,\r\n                           a.products_type,\r\n                           a.tenant_id,\r\n                           sku_code,\r\n                           sku_name,\r\n                           wh_code,\r\n                           wh_name,\r\n                           dept_code,\r\n                           dept_name,\r\n                           machine_code,\r\n                           machine_name,\r\n                           other_machine_code,\r\n                           other_machine_name,\r\n\r\n                           rd_style,\r\n                           rd_style_name,\r\n                           top_cat_name,\r\n                           steel_grade_series,\r\n                           steel_grade,\r\n                           surface,\r\n                           surface_thickness,\r\n                           surface_number,\r\n                           surface_middle_part,\r\n                           grade,\r\n                           spec,\r\n                           SUM(weight) AS weight,\r\n                           SUM(quantity) AS quantity,\r\n                           SUM(roll_length) roll_length,\r\n                           avg(iron_loss) iron_loss,\r\n                           data_date,\r\n                           MONTH,\r\n                           YEAR,\r\n                           NOW() AS sync_time,\r\n                           bill_type,\r\n                           is_production_out\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a\r\nWHERE\r\n    verify_status = '2'\r\n  AND bill_type IN (1, 2)\r\n  AND data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY\r\n  AND ((dept_code = '160502005' AND machine_code = 'CS02' AND parent_batch_code NOT LIKE '%-RD')\r\n    OR (dept_code <> '160502005' OR machine_code <> 'CS02'))\r\n\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    wh_code,\r\n    wh_name,\r\n    dept_code,\r\n    dept_name,\r\n    machine_code,\r\n    other_machine_code,\r\n\r\n    rd_style,\r\n    rd_style_name,\r\n    top_cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    surface,\r\n    surface_thickness,\r\n    surface_number,\r\n    surface_middle_part,\r\n    grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    bill_type,\r\n    is_production_out;\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_01    a\r\nSET bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 = NULL  where  bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 is not  NULL  ;\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_01   a\r\nSET bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 =\r\n        CASE\r\n\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.18  THEN\r\n                0.18\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.20 THEN\r\n                0.20\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.23 THEN\r\n                0.23\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.27 THEN\r\n                0.27\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.3 THEN\r\n                0.3\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.35 THEN\r\n                0.35\r\n            WHEN SKU_name = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ'  THEN\r\n                'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ'\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'WQX' and SKU_name <> 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ' THEN\r\n                'ÕģČÕ«āµŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\tEND  \tWHERE\r\n    tenant_id = 92  and machine_code ='TCM';\r\nUPDATE ads_sc"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1810:      "sql_preview": "/* =========================================================\n   CONSUME + LOG + DONEŌåÆDELETE ń╗łµ×üµ©ĪµØ┐’╝łÕåÖÕģźÕ»╣µ»öĶĪ© output2’╝ē\n   ńø«µĀćĶĪ©’╝Üdwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2\n   ķś¤ÕłŚĶĪ©’╝Üdwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2’╝łõĖŹÕÅś’╝ē\n   µē╣Õż¦Õ░Å’╝Ü500’╝łÕåÖµŁ╗’╝īķü┐ÕģŹ LIMIT @var µŖźķöÖ’╝ē\n   ========================================================= */\n\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\nSET @batch_id := REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '');\nSET @lock_expire_min := 30;\n\n-- 1) µČłĶ┤╣µŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜRUNNING\nINSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (\n    task_name,\n    target_table,\n    batch_id,\n    water_from,\n    water_to,\n    start_time,\n    status\n) VALUES (\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2',\n             @batch_id,\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             NOW(),\n             0\n         );\n\n-- 2) Õø×µöČķöüĶČģµŚČ’╝łÕÅ»ķĆē’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\nSET status = 0,\n    batch_id = NULL,\n    locked_time = NULL\nWHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND status = 1\n  AND locked_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL @lock_expire_min MINUTE);\n\n-- 3) ķöüõĖĆµē╣ NEW’╝ł500’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 q\nSET q.status      = 1,\n    q.batch_id    = @batch_id,\n    q.locked_time = NOW(),\n    q.attempts    = q.attempts + 1\nWHERE q.table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND q.status = 0\nORDER BY q.updated_time\nLIMIT 500000;\n\n-- 4) picked_count\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET picked_count = (\n    SELECT COUNT(*)\n    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\n    WHERE table_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n      AND status=1\n      AND batch_id=@batch_id\n)\nWHERE task_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id=@batch_id;\n\n-- 5) õĖ╗ĶĪ© UPSERT’╝łÕåÖÕģź dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2’╝īõ╗ģµ£¼µē╣’╝ē\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2(\n    id,\n    sku_code,\n    sku_name,\n    batch_code,\n    actual_id,\n    steel_grade,\n    spec,\n    surface,\n    grade,\n    inner_grade,\n    weight,\n    quantity,\n    roll_length,\n    group_id,\n    group_name,\n    group_leader,\n    cat_name,\n    steel_grade_series,\n    date_time,\n    start_time,\n    end_time,\n    data_date,\n    MONTH,\n    YEAR,\n    tenant_id,\n    rate,\n    rate_unit,\n    rate_type,\n    theory_use_time,\n    actual_use_time,\n    send_happened,\n    is_ignore,\n    manuf_line_code,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    sku_type,\n    r_modified_time,\n    r_modified_date,\n    is_retention,\n    is_baf,\n    proce_note,\n    flaw_describe,\n    split_in_weight,\n    yield_rate,\n    next_machine_code,\n    next_sku_code\n)\nSELECT\n    a.id,\n    b.sku_code,\n    sku.sku_name,\n    b.batch_code,\n    b.actual_id,\n    b.steel_grade,\n    b.spec,\n    b.surface,\n    b.grade,\n    b.inner_grade,\n    a.weight,\n    a.quantity,\n    a.meter_num AS roll_length,\n    a.group_id,\n    a.group_code AS group_name,\n    mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\n\n    IFNULL((\n               SELECT d.cat_name\n               FROM ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\n                        JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\n               WHERE c.sku_code = b.sku_code\n                 AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\n                 AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\n               LIMIT 1\n           ), 'ÕģČÕ«ā') AS cat_name,\n\n    (SELECT attr_value4\n     FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value\n     WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND status = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade\n     LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\n\n    a.end_time AS date_time,\n    a.start_time,\n    a.end_time,\n\n    CASE\n        WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        ELSE DATE(a.end_time)\n        END AS data_date,\n\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y')   AS YEAR,\n\n    b.tenant_id,\n\n    a.rate,\n    a.rate_unit,\n    a.rate_type,\n    a.theory_use_time,\n    TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.start_time, a.end_time) / 60 AS actual_use_time,\n\n    a.send_happened,\n    a"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1836:      "sql_preview": "\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\n-- 0) Õø║Õ«Üµ£¼µ¼Īń¬ŚÕÅŻ\nSET @to_ts := CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;\n\n-- 1) ńĪ«õ┐Ø tracker_v2 µ£ēĶ»źõ╗╗ÕŖĪĶĪī’╝łķü┐ÕģŹ SELECT FOR UPDATE µ¤źõĖŹÕł░’╝ē\nINSERT INTO dwd_update_tracker_v2(table_name, last_enqueued, last_updated)\nVALUES ('dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output', '2000-01-01 00:00:00', '2000-01-01 00:00:00')\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE table_name = VALUES(table_name);\n\n-- 2) ķöüõĮÅÕģźķś¤µ░┤õĮŹ’╝łķü┐ÕģŹÕ╣ČÕÅæÕģźķś¤ķĆĀµłÉń¬ŚÕÅŻķöÖõ╣▒’╝ē\nSET @from_ts := (\n    SELECT last_enqueued\n    FROM dwd_update_tracker_v2\n    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n        FOR UPDATE\n);\n\n-- 3) ńö¤µłÉµ£¼µ¼ĪÕģźķś¤µŚźÕ┐ŚID’╝łńö© to_ts Õø║Õ«Ü’╝īõŠ┐õ║ÄĶ┐Įµ║»’╝ē\nSET @enqueue_log_id := CONCAT('ENQ_', DATE_FORMAT(@to_ts, '%Y%m%d%H%i%S'));\n\n-- 4) ÕåÖÕģźµŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜRUNNING\nINSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (\n    task_name,\n    target_table,\n    batch_id,\n    water_from,\n    water_to,\n    start_time,\n    status\n) VALUES (\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             @enqueue_log_id,\n             @from_ts,\n             @to_ts,\n             NOW(),\n             0\n         );\n\n-- 5) Õģźķś¤ŌæĀ’╝Üprod_actual ÕÅśµø┤ÕĮ▒ÕōŹÕł░ group_output.id\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)\nSELECT DISTINCT\n    a.id                                   AS id,\n    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,\n    0                                      AS status,\n    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time\nFROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n         JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b\n              ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id\nWHERE IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts\n  AND IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\n                     -- PROCESSING(1) õĖŹµŖóÕŹĀ’╝øDONE(2) ÕģüĶ«ĖÕø×Õł░ NEW(0) õ╗źõŠ┐ķćŹĶĘæ’╝łÕ”éõĖŹÕĖīµ£øķćŹĶĘæ’╝īĶ¦üõĖŗµ¢╣ÕÅ»ķĆēķĪ╣’╝ē\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =\n                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,\n                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,\n                            0),\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =\n                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,\n                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));\n\n-- 6) Õģźķś¤ŌæĪ’╝Ügroup_output Ķć¬Ķ║½ÕÅśµø┤ÕĮ▒ÕōŹÕł░ id\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)\nSELECT\n    a.id                                   AS id,\n    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,\n    0                                      AS status,\n    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time\nFROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\nWHERE IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts\n  AND IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =\n                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,\n                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,\n                            0),\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =\n                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,\n                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));\n\n-- 7) ń╗¤Ķ«Īµ£¼µ¼ĪÕģźķś¤µĢ░ķćÅ’╝łõ╗ź enqueue_time=@to_ts ń╗¤Ķ«Ī’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET enqueue_count = (\n    SELECT COUNT(*)\n    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\n    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n      AND enqueue_time = @to_ts\n)\nWHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id  = @enqueue_log_id;\n\n-- 8) µÄ©Ķ┐øÕģźķś¤µ░┤õĮŹ’╝łÕÅ¬Ķ”üµ£¼õ║ŗÕŖĪµłÉÕŖ¤Õ░▒µÄ©Ķ┐ø’╝øÕż▒Ķ┤źÕø×µ╗ÜÕłÖõĖŹµÄ©Ķ┐ø’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_update_tracker_v2\nSET last_enqueued = @to_ts\nWHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';\n\n-- 9) µŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜSUCCESS\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET end_time     = NOW(),\n    duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()),\n    status       = 1\nWHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id  = "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1863:      "sql_preview": "\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õ║öµŁźŃĆæµĖģń®║ µ▒ćµĆ╗ĶĪ©\n-- =======================================\nDELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_18_01;\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼ÕģŁµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µ▒ćµĆ╗ĶĪ©’╝łµŚź/µ£łµ▒ćµĆ╗’╝ē\n-- =======================================\n-- µŚźµ▒ćµĆ╗\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)\nSELECT\n    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    di.date_id AS data_date,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    'D' AS period\nFROM\n    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE YEAR(date_id) >= 2025 AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) di\n        LEFT JOIN\n    (SELECT DISTINCT silicon_steel_product_category_name FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail where silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null  ) b ON 1=1\n        LEFT JOIN\n    ads_gx_xs_18_detail de ON di.date_id = de.data_date AND b.silicon_steel_product_category_name = de.silicon_steel_product_category_name\n\nGROUP BY\n    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name, di.date_id;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)\n-- µ£łµ▒ćµĆ╗\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7) AS month_date,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    'M' AS period\nFROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail\nGROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7);\nwith ads_gx_xs_18_01_process1 as (SELECT silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n                                         SUBSTR(return_created_time, 1, 7)                                            AS data_date,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) /\n                                         1000                                                                         AS attr2,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n                                         SUM(CASE\n                                                 WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»')\n                                                     THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) /\n                                         1000                                        "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1894:      "sql_preview": "-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õĖĆµŁźŃĆæµĖģń®║ µśÄń╗åĶĪ©\n-- =======================================\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail;\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õ║īµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µśÄń╗åĶĪ©’╝łµØźµ║ÉõĖĆ’╝ÜĶĮ¼Õ║ōÕŹĢµĢ░µŹ«’╝ē\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\n\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       t.out_warehouse,\n       ti.cust_code,\n       ti.cust_abbr,\n       ti.batch_code,\n       ti.quantity,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       null                                                           iron_loss,\n       t.transfer_order_code,\n       t.transfer_order_date,\n       IFNULL(rd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       rd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       ti.quantity AS weight,\n       0.0,\n       ww.wh_name,\n       'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║'                                                  AS channel,\n       ti.contract_code,\n       CASE\n           WHEN DATE(t.transfer_order_date) IS NULL THEN date(t.approve_date)\n           ELSE DATE(t.transfer_order_date)\n           END                                                     AS data_date,\n       ti.receive_warehouse\n\nFROM ods_crm_sa_transfer_order t\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_transfer_order_detail ti ON t.transfer_order_id = ti.transfer_order_id AND ti.STATUS = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww\n              ON t.in_warehouse_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.STATUS = 1 AND SUBSTR(ww.wh_name, 1, 1) = 'B'\n                  and ww.wh_code <> 2098\n         LEFT JOIN ods_crm_sv_return_detail rd ON ti.contract_code = rd.contract_code AND ti.batch_code = rd.batch_code     and rd.return_detail_status in (20,30,40)\n\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi\n              ON ti.batch_code = bi.batch_code and bi.`status` = 1 and t.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info si ON bi.surface = si.surface and si.silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null\n\nWHERE t.transfer_order_state in (20, 40)\n  AND t.STATUS = 1\n  AND YEAR(t.transfer_order_date) >= '2025'\n  and t.tenant_id in (92,108);\n\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE a.place IS NULL\n;\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE  a.place <> b.receive_warehouse;\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õĖēµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µśÄń╗åĶĪ©’╝łµØźµ║Éõ║ī’╝ÜÕ╝ĆÕŹĢń│╗ń╗¤µĢ░µŹ«’╝ē\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       sdod.wh_code,\n       sdo.cust_code,\n       sdo.CUSt_ABBR,\n       sdod.batch_code,\n       sdod.weight,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       bi.iron_loss,\n       sdo.sales_delivery_order_code                                   transfer_order_code,\n       sdod.sales_delivery_order_date,\n       IFNULL(srd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       srd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       sdod.weight  AS weight,\n       sdod.amount_in_tax,\n       ''                                                           AS wh_name,\n       'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║'                                                   AS channel,\n       sdod.contract_code,\n       date(ifnull(sdo.approver_date,sdo.created_time)),\n\n       sdod.receive_warehouse\nFROM ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo\n         join\n     ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code = sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n         and sdod.status = 1 and sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50', '20', '30')\n         JOIN ods_"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1914:      "sql_preview": "delete  from ads_sc_xl_14 ;\ninsert into ads_sc_xl_14\nselect\n       id,manuf_line_code,\n       manuf_line_name,\n       actual_id,\n       group_name,\n       group_leader,\n       machine_code,\n       machine_name,\n       batch_code,\n       steel_grade,\n       spec,\n       grade,\n       roll_length,\n       theory_use_time,\n       actual_use_time,\n       rate,\n       roll_length / NULLIF(actual_use_time, 0) AS actual_rate,\n       roll_length / NULLIF(actual_use_time, 0) / NULLIF(rate, 0) AS speed_rate,\n       rate_unit,\n       rate_type,\n       proce_note,\n       flaw_describe,\n       split_in_weight,\n       yield_rate,\n       next_machine_code,\n       next_machine_name,\n       next_sku_code,\n       next_sku_name,\n       start_time,\n           end_time,\n           data_date\nfrom dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output\nwhere tenant_id = 5\n  and machine_code like 'RJM%'\n  and is_ignore=0\n  AND  send_happened=1\norder by data_date desc\n\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1965:      "sql_preview": "\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined\r\nWHERE\r\n    data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 day;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined (\r\n    data_date,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    surface,\r\n    attr1,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    group_manuf_line_name,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    lower_weight,\r\n    lower_quantity,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR) SELECT\r\n              dr.date_id AS data_date,\r\n              t.tenant_id,\r\n              t.plate_type,\r\n              t.surface,\r\n              t.attr1,\r\n              t.steel_grade_series,\r\n              t.group_manuf_line_name,\r\n              t.manuf_line_name,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.weight, 0) AS weight,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.quantity, 0) AS quantity,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_weight, 0) AS lower_weight,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_quantity, 0) AS lower_quantity,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.MONTH, 'µ£¬ń¤ź') AS MONTH,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.YEAR, 'µ£¬ń¤ź') AS YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE date_id <= CURDATE() AND date_id >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 DAY) AS dr\r\n        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, plate_type, surface, attr1, steel_grade_series, group_manuf_line_name, manuf_line_name FROM ads_sc_xl_13_process1 where data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 350 DAY) AS t\r\n        LEFT JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_process1 orig ON dr.date_id = orig.data_date\r\n        AND t.tenant_id = orig.tenant_id\r\n        AND t.plate_type = orig.plate_type\r\n        AND t.surface = orig.surface\r\n        AND\r\n                                                CASE\r\n\r\n                                                    WHEN t.attr1 IS NULL THEN\r\n                                                        1 = 1 ELSE t.attr1 = orig.attr1\r\n                                                    END\r\n        AND t.steel_grade_series = orig.steel_grade_series\r\n        AND t.group_manuf_line_name = orig.group_manuf_line_name\r\n        AND t.manuf_line_name = orig.manuf_line_name\r\n;\r\ndelete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name ='TCM' and attr1 is null ;\r\ndelete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name in ('1#SACL','2#SACL') and attr1 is null ;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1979:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month",

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1983:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1984:        "dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1987:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month SELECT\n                                                                               a.tenant_id,\n                                                                               a.plate_type,\n                                                                               a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\n                                                                               a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                               CASE\n\n                                                                                   WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN\n                                                                                       0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)\n                                                                                   END average_thickness,\n                                                                               substr(a.data_date,1,7) data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\n        AND c.`status` = 1\nWHERE\n   a.plate_type IS NOT NULL\n  AND manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name ,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,\n    substr(a.data_date,1,7) ;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type\n        AND target.month = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END\nSET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;"

ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_tons)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons     = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_gg_m;\nINSERT INTO a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_nam"

ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n manufacturing_finished_product,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_product          =   a.attr1,\n         data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_product          = source.manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2069:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz SELECT\n                                                                             a.tenant_id,\n                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                             a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\n  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.data_date,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND case when  target.attr1  is null then 1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\n\n\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\n\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg SELECT\n                                                                              a.tenant_id,\n                                                                              b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                              a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                              SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                              SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                              a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n     "

target.day_manufacturing_finished_product = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg SELECT\n                                                                          a.tenant_id,\n                                                                          b.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\n                                                                          a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                          SUM(a.weight) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n                                                                          SUM(a.quantity) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n                                                                          a.data_date\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND (b.attribute2 IN ('*', '') OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 IN ('*', '') OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 IN ('*', '') OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 IN ('*', '') OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 IN ('*', '') OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\n        AND (b.attribute7 IN ('*', '') OR a.other_machine_code = b.attribute7)\n        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n        AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-RD-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND a.rd_style_name = c.attribute1\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,\n    a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND case when  target.attr1  is null then 1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_product = source.manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz SELECT\n                                                                         a.tenant_id,\n                                                                         b.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\n                                                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                         SUM(a.weight) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n                                                                         SUM(a.quantity) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n                                                                         a.data_date\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-FINISHED-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 IN ('*', '') OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 IN ('*', '') OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 IN ('*', '') OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 IN ('*', '') OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 IN ('*', '') OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\n        AND (b.attribute7 IN ('*', '') OR a.other_machine_code = b.attribute7)\n        JOIN w"

  sync_data_date,                   -- ÕÉīµŁźµŚźµ£¤\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, -- ńĪģķÆóõ║¦Õōüń▒╗Õł½ÕÉŹń¦░\n    wh_code,                          -- õ╗ōÕ║ōń╝¢ńĀü\n    wh_name,                          -- õ╗ōÕ║ōÕÉŹń¦░\n    surface,                          -- ĶĪ©ķØó\n    surface_thickness,                -- ĶĪ©ķØóÕÄÜÕ║”\n    surface_number,                   -- ĶĪ©ķØóÕÅĘ\n    grade,                            -- ńŁēń║¦\n    spec,                             -- Ķ¦äµĀ╝\n    last_enter_date,                  -- µ£ĆĶ┐æÕģźÕ║ōµŚźµ£¤\n    days,                             -- Õ£©Õ║ōÕż®µĢ░\n    batch_code,                       -- µē╣µ¼ĪÕÅĘ\n    quantity                          -- µĢ░ķćÅ\n)\nSELECT\n            CURRENT_DATE AS sync_data_date,\n            silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n            a.wh_code,\n            a.wh_name,\n            a.surface,\n            b.surface_thickness,\n            b.surface_number,\n            a.grade,\n            a.spec,\n            a.last_enter_date,\n            a.days,\n            a.batch_code,\n            a.quantity\nFROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock a\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info b\n              ON a.surface = b.surface\n         JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = 'µłÉÕōü'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n              ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                  AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\nWHERE a.tenant_id = 92;\n\ndelete from ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 ;\ninsert into ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1\nselect a.batch_code, a.data_date,\n       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n           PARTITION BY  a.batch_code\n           ORDER BY a.data_date ASC\n           ) AS rn\nfrom dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = 'µłÉÕōü'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n                                      ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                                          AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\n\n                                          and  a.tenant_id = 92 ;\n\n\nupdate ads_sc_kc_19_detail a join ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 b  on a.batch_code =b.batch_code and rn = 1  set  a.first_enter_date = b.data_date,first_days = datediff(CURDATE(),b.data_date)\n\n;\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_kc_19  ;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_19 (\n    sync_data_date,\n\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    surface,\n    surface_thickness,\n    surface_number,\n    a_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    b_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    c_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    d_qty_1_3m_ton,\n    quantity_1_3m_ton,\n    a_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    b_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    c_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    d_qty_over_3m_ton,\n    quantity_over_3m_ton,\n    flag,\n    flag1,\n    flag2) SELECT\n               sync_data_date,\n\n               silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n               surface,\n               surface_thickness,\n               surface_number,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'A' THEN  quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS a_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'B' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS b_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'C' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS c_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'D' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS d_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(\n                       SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN quantity END) / 1000,\n                       2) AS quantity_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days >"
