a.data_date,\n        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2\n    FROM\n        dwd_wh_output_item a\n            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n            AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n            AND (\n                                          (b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                                              AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))\n    WHERE\n        a.bill_type = '2'\n      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©')\n    GROUP BY\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2) -- µø┤µ¢░ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest\n    JOIN temp_out_quantity AS src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©'\n        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date\nSET dest.qx_out_quantity = src.out_quantity\nWHERE\n    dest.period = 'D';\nWITH temp_out_quantity AS (\n    SELECT\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2\n    FROM\n        dwd_wh_output_item a\n            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n            AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n            AND (\n                                          (b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                                              AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))\n    WHERE\n        a.bill_type = '2'\n      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©')\n    GROUP BY\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2) -- µø┤µ¢░µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest\n    JOIN temp_out_quantity AS src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©'\n        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date\nSET dest.wqx_out_quantity = src.out_quantity\nWHERE\n    dest.period = 'D';\nWITH temp_out_quantity AS (\n    SELECT\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2\n    FROM\n        dwd_wh_output_item a\n            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n            AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n            AND (\n                                          (b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                                              AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))\n    WHERE\n        a.bill_type = '2'\n      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©')\n    GROUP BY\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2) -- µø┤µ¢░µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest\n    JOIN temp_out_quantity AS src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©'\n        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date\nSET dest.xny_out_quantity = src.out_quantity\nWHERE\n    dest.period = 'D';\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09\nSET qx_practical_enter = qx_weight - qx_out_quantity,\n    wqx_practical_enter = wqx_weight - wqx_out_quantity,\n    xny_practical_enter = xny_weight - xny_out_quantity;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2245:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS xny_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.xny_pending_delivery_quantity = source.xny_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS qx_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.qx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.qx_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS wqx_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date  - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\n\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2267:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name where  data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name (\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    group_manuf_line_name,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    attr1,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    average_thickness,\r\n    lower_weight,\r\n    lower_quantity,\r\n    breakdown_frequency,\r\n    planned_downtime,\r\n    unplanned_downtime,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR)  SELECT\r\n               a.tenant_id,\r\n               a.plate_type,\r\n               a.group_manuf_line_name,\r\n               a.manuf_line_name,\r\n               a.attr1,\r\n               a.data_date,\r\n               SUM(a.weight) weight,\r\n               SUM(a.quantity) quantity,\r\n               '0.0' average_thickness,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_weight) lower_weight,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_quantity) lower_quantity,\r\n               '0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n               '0.0' planned_downtime,\r\n               '0.0' unplanned_downtime,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n               SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_length) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n               substr(a.data_date, 1, 7) MONTH,\r\n               YEAR(data_date) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined a\r\nWHERE\r\n    a.manuf_line_name <> ''\r\n  and a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    a.plate_type,\r\n    a.manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.attr1,\r\n    a.data_date;"

`day_manufacturing_finished_product`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity`,\r\n    `month`,\r\n    `year`,\r\n    `rk`,\r\n    `remark`) SELECT\r\n                  d.`tenant_id`,\r\n                  d.`plate_type`,\r\n                  d.`group_manuf_line_name`,\r\n                  d.`manuf_line_name`,\r\n                  d.attr1,\r\n                  d.`data_date`,\r\n                  d.`weight` AS day_weight,\r\n                  d.`quantity` AS day_quantity,\r\n                  d.`average_thickness` AS day_average_thickness,\r\n                  d.`lower_weight` AS day_lower_weight,\r\n                  d.`lower_quantity` AS day_lower_quantity,\r\n                  d.`breakdown_frequency` AS day_breakdown_frequency,\r\n                  d.`planned_downtime` AS day_planned_downtime,\r\n                  d.`unplanned_downtime` AS day_unplanned_downtime,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_tons` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                  d.`lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n                  DATE_FORMAT(d.`data_date`, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\r\n                  YEAR(d.`data_date`) AS YEAR,\r\n                  d.`rk`,\r\n                  d.`remark`\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name d\r\n        join (SELECT tenant_id,attribute4 FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene in('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')  )b\r\n             on d.tenant_id =b.tenant_id and d.manuf_line_name=b.attribute4\r\nWHERE\r\n    d.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY  ;\r\n\r\n\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (SELECT tenant_id, attribute5 plate_type, attribute4 manuf_line_name, list_order FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene IN ('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')) AS monthly ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name\r\n        AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type\r\nSET target.rk = monthly.list_order;\r\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2312:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from   ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE ;\nINSERT into   ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' type,\n    case when qx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(qx_a_weight/qx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end a_rate ,\n    qx_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when qx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( qx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end qx_rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    qx_practical_enter UNION ALL\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' type,\n    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(wqx_a_weight/wqx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,\n    wqx_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( wqx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    wqx_practical_enter UNION ALL\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' type,\n    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(xny_a_weight/xny_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,\n    xny_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( xny_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    xny_practical_enter ;\n\n\n\n\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            a.month,\n            a.days/b.days*100 actually_rate\n        from\n            (SELECT tenant_id,month,max(day(data_date)) days from  ads_sc_xl_09 where period='D' group by tenant_id,month) a\n                join\n\n            (SELECT substr(date_id,1,7) month ,max(day)  days from dim_date_info  group by substr(date_id,1,7) ) b  on a.month=b.month\n\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND  source.month  = target.month\nSET\n    target.actually_rate = source.actually_rate ;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2337:      "sql_preview": "-- Õ╗║Ķ««’╝ÜµĖģń®║ĶĪ©ńö© TRUNCATE µø┤Õ┐½’╝łµ£ēÕż¢ķö«µŚČÕåŹńö© DELETE’╝ē\nDELETE  FROM ads_gx_xs_18_06;\n\n/* µśÄń╗åµÅÆÕģź */\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_06 (\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    data_date,\n    cus_name,\n    surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity,\n    avg_amount_in_tax,\n    rk\n)\nWITH av_one AS (\n    SELECT\n        attribute1 AS place,\n        MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(attribute3), '')) AS attr3\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_018_detail_qx_downstream_customer_t92_di'\n    GROUP BY attribute1\n),\n     base AS (\n         SELECT\n             a.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             a.data_date,\n             /* õĮĀÕÉÄń╗ŁµĆ╗µś»µŖŖÕēŹń╝Ćµö╣µłÉŌĆ£µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║-ŌĆØ’╝īĶ┐Öķćīńø┤µÄźń╗¤õĖĆ */\n             CONCAT('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║-', a.cust_abbr, '-', COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(av.attr3), ''), a.place)) AS cus_name,\n             a.surface,\n             a.grade,\n             a.weight,\n             a.amount_in_tax\n         FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n                  LEFT JOIN av_one av\n                            ON av.place = a.place\n         WHERE a.silicon_steel_product_category_name = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæńĪģķÆóµłÉÕōü'\n           AND a.data_date >= DATE('2025-01-01')\n         -- Õ”éµ×£õĮĀÕÅ¬Ķ”üŌĆ£õ╗ŖÕż®ŌĆØ’╝īµöŠÕ╝ĆõĖŗķØóĶ┐ÖõĖĆĶĪī\n         -- AND a.data_date = CURRENT_DATE\n     ),\n     agg_detail AS (\n         /* µśÄń╗å’╝Üµīē cus_name + surface + µŚźµ£¤ ĶüÜÕÉł’╝łÕÉ½ a/b/c/d ÕÅŖµĆ╗ķćÅŃĆüÕØćõ╗Ę’╝ē */\n         SELECT\n             silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             data_date,\n             cus_name,\n             surface,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,\n             /* ÕÉ½ń©ÄÕØćõ╗Ę = µĆ╗ÕÉ½ń©ÄķóØ / µĆ╗ķćŹķćÅ * 1000’╝øķś▓ķøČķÖż */\n             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,\n             1 AS order_type\n         FROM base\n         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface\n     ),\n     agg_total AS (\n         /* ÕÉłĶ«Ī’╝Üµīē µŚźµ£¤ µ▒ćµĆ╗’╝łcus_name='ÕÉłĶ«Ī'’╝īsurface=''’╝ē */\n         SELECT\n             silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             data_date,\n             'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' AS cus_name,\n             ''     AS surface,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,\n             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,\n             2 AS order_type\n         FROM base\n         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date\n     )\n\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type\nFROM agg_detail\nUNION ALL\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type\nFROM agg_total;\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2357:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS qx_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæµłÉÕōüÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            date(sdod.created_time)) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.qx_product_shipment = source.qx_product_shipment\nWHERE\n    target.period = 'D';\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS wqx_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæµłÉÕōüÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.wqx_product_shipment = source.wqx_product_shipment;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS fl_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'Õ║¤µ¢ÖÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n                AND (c.attribute5 = '*' OR sdod.sku_name = c.attribute5)\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n          AND sdod.sku_name IN ('õĖĆń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'õ║īń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'õĖēń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'Õøøń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö')\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.fl_product_shipment = source.fl_product_shipment;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JO"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2386:      "sql_preview": "delete  from ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 ;\r\ninsert into ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name) AS machine_group,\r\n    a.attribute3 AS steel_grade,\r\n    MAX(a.list_order) AS list_order\r\nFROM with_attr_value a\r\n         JOIN ods_mes_mm_machine b\r\n              ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n                  AND a.attribute1 = b.machine_code\r\n                  AND b.status = 1\r\nWHERE a.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name),\r\n    a.attribute3;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM ads_sc_zl_07_04 where data_date >= current_date - interval  30 day ;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_04 (tenant_id, machine_group, steel_grade, split_in_weight, net_weight,\r\n                             yield_rate, waste_rate, waste_t_weight, data_date, list_order)\r\nWITH recent_dates AS (\r\n    SELECT date_id\r\n    FROM dim_date_info\r\n    WHERE date_id >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY and  date_id <= CURRENT_DATE\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    av.tenant_id,\r\n    av.machine_group,\r\n    av.steel_grade,\r\n    SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS split_in_weight,\r\n    SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS net_weight,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0\r\n        ELSE SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0))\r\n        END AS yield_rate,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0\r\n        ELSE 1 - (SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)))\r\n        END AS waste_rate,\r\n    (SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0))) / 1000 AS waste_t_weight,\r\n    d.date_id AS data_date,\r\n    av.list_order\r\nFROM recent_dates d\r\n         JOIN ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 av\r\n         LEFT JOIN ads_material_yield_rate_detail m\r\n                   ON m.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n                       AND m.machine_group = av.machine_group\r\n                       AND m.steel_grade = av.steel_grade\r\n                       AND m.data_date = d.date_id\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    av.tenant_id,\r\n    av.machine_group,\r\n    av.steel_grade,\r\n    d.date_id,\r\n    av.list_order;\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2407:        "with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2408:        "dim_date_info",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2411:      "sql_preview": "-- ń╗ōÕÉłµŚźµ£¤ÕłåÕī║’╝īÕćÅÕ░æµē½µÅÅ\r\nDELETE FROM ads_sc_kc_09\r\nWHERE data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY AND period = 'D';\r\n\r\n-- µē╣ķćÅµÅÆÕģźķü┐ÕģŹķĆÉĶĪīµÅÆÕģź\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_09(\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    dept_class,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    amount,\r\n    scfl_amount,\r\n    fscfl_amount,\r\n    period,\r\n    amount_rank,\r\n    scfl_amount_rank,\r\n    fscfl_amount_rank\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    av.tenant_id,\r\n    av.dept_class,\r\n    date.date_id AS data_date,\r\n    IFNULL(a.amount, 0) AS amount,\r\n    IFNULL(a.scfl_amount, 0) AS scfl_amount,\r\n    IFNULL(a.fscfl_amount, 0) AS fscfl_amount,\r\n    'D' AS period,\r\n    IFNULL(a.amount_rank, 999) AS amount_rank,\r\n    IFNULL(a.scfl_amount_rank, 999) AS scfl_amount_rank,\r\n    IFNULL(a.fscfl_amount_rank, 999) AS fscfl_amount_rank\r\nFROM\r\n    (SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, attribute2 AS dept_class FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT') av\r\n        LEFT JOIN (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE date_id >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) date ON 1 = 1\r\n        LEFT JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            dept_class,\r\n            data_date,\r\n            amount,\r\n            scfl_amount,\r\n            fscfl_amount,\r\n            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS amount_rank,\r\n            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY scfl_amount DESC) AS scfl_amount_rank,\r\n            RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY fscfl_amount DESC) AS fscfl_amount_rank\r\n        FROM\r\n            (SELECT\r\n                 tenant_id,\r\n                 dept_class,\r\n                 data_date,\r\n                 SUM(amount) AS amount,\r\n                 SUM(CASE WHEN is_scsku = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS scfl_amount,\r\n                 SUM(CASE WHEN is_scsku = 1 THEN 0 ELSE amount END) AS fscfl_amount\r\n             FROM\r\n                 dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item\r\n             GROUP BY\r\n                 tenant_id,\r\n                 dept_class,\r\n                 data_date\r\n            ) AS aggregated_data\r\n    ) a ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND av.dept_class = a.dept_class AND date.date_id = a.data_date\r\nWHERE\r\n    av.dept_class IS NOT NULL;\r\n\r\n-- ÕłĀķÖżµ£łÕ║”µĢ░µŹ«\r\nDELETE FROM ads_sc_kc_09 WHERE period = 'M';\r\n\r\n-- µē╣ķćÅµÅÆÕģźµ£łÕ║”ĶüÜÕÉłµĢ░µŹ«\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_09(\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    dept_class,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    amount,\r\n    scfl_amount,\r\n    fscfl_amount,\r\n    period,\r\n    amount_rank,\r\n    scfl_amount_rank,\r\n    fscfl_amount_rank\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    dept_class,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS amount,\r\n    SUM(scfl_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS scfl_amount,\r\n    SUM(fscfl_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, dept_class, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY data_date) AS fscfl_amount,\r\n    'M' AS period,\r\n    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS amount_rank,\r\n    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY scfl_amount DESC) AS scfl_amount_rank,\r\n    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, data_date ORDER BY fscfl_amount DESC) AS fscfl_amount_rank\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_09\r\nWHERE\r\n    period = 'D'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    dept_class,\r\n    data_date;\r\n\r\n-- µø┤µ¢░µ░óÕģāń┤ĀńøĖÕģ│ńē®µ¢ÖńÜäõĮ┐ńö©µĢ░ķćÅ\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_kc_09 t\r\nSET t.hydrogen_quantity = (\r\n    SELECT SUM(quantity) hydrogen_quantity\r\n    FROM dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item s\r\n    WHERE s.tenant_id = t.tenant_id\r\n      AND s.dept_class = t.dept_class\r\n      AND s.data_date = t.data_date\r\n      AND s.sku_code IN ('05070100480', '05070100479') -- µ░óÕģāń┤ĀńøĖÕģ│ńē®µ¢Öń╝¢ńĀü\r\n      AND s.data_date >= current_date - interval  7 day\r\n) where t.data_date >= current_date - interval  7 day and t.period ='D'\r\n;\r\n\r\n-- µø┤µ¢░µ░«Õģāń┤ĀńøĖÕģ│ńē®µ¢ÖńÜäõĮ┐ńö©µĢ░ķćÅ\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_kc_09 t\r\nSET t.nitrogen_quantity = (\r\n    SELECT SUM(quantity) nitrogen_quantity\r\n    FROM dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item s\r\n    WHERE s.tenant_id = t.tenant_"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2431:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from  ads_sc_kc_10 ;\r\nINSERT into ads_sc_kc_10\r\nSELECT \r\na.output_code,\r\na.output_item_id,\r\na.tenant_id,\r\nb.ATTRIBUTE6,b.ATTRIBUTE7,\r\na.top_cat_code,\r\na.top_cat_name,\r\na.cat_code,\r\na.cat_name,\r\na.dept_class,\r\na.cw_sku,\r\na.sku_code,\r\na.sku_name,\r\na.sku_desc,\r\na.model,\r\na.quantity,\r\na.amount,\r\na.receiver,\r\na.data_date,\r\na.`month`,\r\na.YEAR ,\r\ncase when c.with_id is null then 'N' else 'Y' end is_remove\r\nFROM\r\n\t`dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item`  a \r\n\tjoin with_attr_value b on a.tenant_id=b.tenant_id  AND b.scene='BI-SC-KC-010-TYPE'\r\n\tand  (case when b.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*'  then 1=1 else b.ATTRIBUTE3 = a.top_cat_code end  )\r\n\tand  (case when b.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*'  then 1=1 else b.ATTRIBUTE4 = a.cat_code end )\r\n\tand  (case when b.ATTRIBUTE5 = '*'  then 1=1 else b.ATTRIBUTE5 = a.sku_code  end)\r\n\tand  (case when b.ATTRIBUTE8 = '*'  then 1=1 else b.ATTRIBUTE8 = a.receiver end )\r\n\tLEFT join with_attr_value c on a.tenant_id=c.tenant_id  AND c.scene='BI-SC-KC-010-REMOVE'\r\n\tand  (case when c.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*'  then 1=1 else c.ATTRIBUTE3 = a.top_cat_code end  )\r\n\tand  (case when c.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*'  then 1=1 else c.ATTRIBUTE4 = a.cat_code end )\r\n\tand  (case when c.ATTRIBUTE5 = '*'  then 1=1 else c.ATTRIBUTE5 = a.sku_code  end)\r\n\tand  (case when c.ATTRIBUTE8 = '*'  then 1=1 else c.ATTRIBUTE8 = a.receiver end )\t\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2456:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11_month;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_11_month SELECT\r\n                                              a.tenant_id,\r\n                                              sku_code,\r\n                                              sku_name,\r\n                                              model,\r\n                                              unit,\r\n                                              sum( amount ) amount,\r\n                                              sum( quantity ) quantity,\r\n                                              receiver,\r\n                                              '' hn_bz_receiver,\r\n                                              100 hn_bz_receiver_rate,\r\n                                              MONTH\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item  a JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.receiver = b.attribute1\r\n        AND a.`month` = b.attribute2\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-011-RECEIVER'\r\nWHERE\r\n    a.tenant_id = '92'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    receiver,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    unit;\r\n\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11_process_001 ;\r\nINSERT into  ads_sc_kc_11_process_001\r\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\r\n       a.sku_code,\r\n       a.sku_name,\r\n       a.model,\r\n       a.unit,\r\n       a.amount,\r\n       a.quantity,\r\n       b.attribute3 rate,\r\n       b.attribute2 type,\r\n       a.MONTH,\r\n       a.receiver\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11_month a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.sku_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND a.`month` = b.attribute4\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-011-TYPE'\r\n        AND b.attribute2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\r\nunion all\r\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\r\n       a.sku_code,\r\n       a.sku_name,\r\n       a.model,\r\n       a.unit,\r\n       a.amount,\r\n       a.quantity,\r\n       b.attribute3 rate,\r\n       b.attribute2 type,\r\n       a.MONTH,\r\n       a.receiver\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11_month a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.sku_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND a.`month` = b.attribute4\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-011-TYPE'\r\n        AND b.attribute2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\r\n\r\n;\r\n\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_11\r\nSELECT\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    model,\r\n    unit,\r\n    receiver,\r\n    sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then amount else  0 end) qx_amount,\r\n    sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then quantity else  0 end) qx_quantity,\r\n    sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) qx_rate,\r\n    sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then amount else  0 end) * sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) /100 qx_actually_amount,\r\n    sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then quantity else  0 end) * sum(case when type ='ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) /100 qx_actually_quantity,\r\n    sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then amount else  0 end) wqx_amount,\r\n    sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then quantity else  0 end) wqx_quantity,\r\n    sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) wqx_rate,\r\n    sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then amount else  0 end) * sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) /100 wqx_actually_amount,\r\n    sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then quantity else  0 end) * sum(case when type ='µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' then rate else  0 end) /100 wqx_actually_quantity,\r\n    month\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_kc_11_process_001\r\ngroup by\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    model,\r\n    unit,\r\n    receiver,month\r\n;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2484:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from  dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item;\r\n\r\n-- µÅÆÕģźµōŹõĮ£õ┐ØµīüõĖŹÕÅś\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item\r\nSELECT\r\n    o.dept_code,\r\n    sd.dept_name,\r\n    IFNULL(av.attribute2, 'µŚĀ') dept_class,\r\n    sku.finance_type cw_sku,\r\n    CASE WHEN av2.attribute1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_scsku,\r\n    o.bred_vouch,\r\n    o.output_code,\r\n    o.output_date,\r\n    o.verify_status,\r\n    o.checked_by,\r\n    o.checked_time,\r\n    o.note AS output_note,\r\n    o.bill_type,\r\n    o.rd_flag,\r\n    o.rd_style,\r\n    o.source,\r\n    o.u8_output_code,\r\n    o.ven_code,\r\n    o.print_times,\r\n    oi.output_item_id,\r\n    oi.output_id,\r\n    pc.cat_code,\r\n    pc.cat_name,\r\n    pcc.cat_code AS top_cat_code,\r\n    pcc.cat_name AS top_cat_name,\r\n    oi.sku_code,\r\n    sku.model,\r\n    oi.unit,\r\n    oi.batch_code,\r\n    oi.steel_grade,\r\n    oi.spec,\r\n    oi.surface,\r\n    oi.grade,\r\n    oi.quantity,\r\n    oi.unit_price,\r\n    oi.amount,\r\n    oi.note,\r\n    oi.mo_code,\r\n    oi.free1,\r\n    oi.free2,\r\n    oi.free3,\r\n    oi.free4,\r\n    oi.free5,\r\n    oi.free6,\r\n    oi.free7,\r\n    oi.free8,\r\n    oi.free9,\r\n    oi.free10,\r\n    oi.bill_status,\r\n    oi.`status`,\r\n    oi.created_by,\r\n    oi.created_time,\r\n    oi.modified_by,\r\n    oi.modified_time,\r\n    oi.tenant_id,\r\n    oi.row_ver,\r\n    oi.row_no,\r\n    oi.u8_output_item_id,\r\n    oi.producer,\r\n    oi.act_height,\r\n    oi.act_width,\r\n    oi.coating,\r\n    oi.gross_weight,\r\n    oi.py_wh_code,\r\n    oi.wh_pos_code,\r\n    oi.equipment_code,\r\n    oi.project_code,\r\n    oi.r_modified_time,\r\n    oi.note AS item_note,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN (o.receiver IS NULL OR o.receiver = \"undefined\" OR o.receiver = '') THEN NULL\r\n        ELSE o.receiver\r\n        END AS receiver,\r\n    tenant.tenant_code,\r\n    tenant.tenant_name,\r\n    sku.sku_name,\r\n    sku.sku_desc,\r\n    sku.sku_type,\r\n    ww.wh_code,\r\n    ww.wh_name,\r\n    supp.supplier_name,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y') AS YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ods_mes_wms_wh_output o\r\n        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_output_item oi ON o.output_id = oi.output_id AND oi.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku sku ON oi.sku_code = sku.sku_code AND sku.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN dim_ums_tenant tenant ON o.tenant_id = tenant.tenant_id AND tenant.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww ON ww.wh_code = o.wh_code AND ww.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND ww.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_sys_department sd ON o.dept_code = sd.dept_code AND o.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id AND sd.`status` = '1'\r\n        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av ON o.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND o.dept_code = av.attribute1 AND av.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT'\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON o.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id AND o.wh_code = av1.attribute1 AND av1.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_WH'\r\n        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av2 ON o.tenant_id = av2.tenant_id AND oi.sku_code = av2.attribute1 AND av2.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_SCSKU'\r\n        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_sys_supplier supp ON o.ven_code = supp.supplier_code AND supp.`status` = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pc ON sku.cat_id = pc.cat_id AND pc.`status` = '1'\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pcc ON pc.parent_id = pcc.cat_id AND pcc.`status` = '1'\r\nWHERE\r\n    o.STATUS = 1\r\n  AND o.bill_type = '2' ;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2536:      "sql_preview": "DELETE \nFROM\n    ads_sc_zl_09_detail;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_09_detail (\n    tenant_id,\n    machine_code,\n    machine_name,\n    actual_id,\n    in_batch_code,\n    batch_code,\n    grade,\n\t\tweight,group_id,\n    group_name,\n    group_leader,last_group_id,\n    last_group_name,\n    last_group_leader,\n    steel_grade,\n    steel_grade_type,\n    lower_amount,\n\t\t\tdefect_machine,\n    first_trial_result,\n    data_date,\n    MONTH,\n    type\n)\n\nSELECT\n    go.tenant_id,\n    go.machine_code,\n    go.machine_name,\n    go.actual_id,\n    a.in_batch_code,\n    go.batch_code,\n    go.grade,\n\t\tgo.weight,\n\t\tgo.group_id,\n    go.group_name,\n    go.group_leader,\n\t\t'' AS last_group_id,\n    '' AS last_group_name,\n    '' AS last_group_leader,\n    go.steel_grade,\n    b.attr_value4 AS steel_grade_type,\n    go.weight/1000*ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2, 0) AS lower_amount,\n\t\tb.defect_machine,\n    case when a.first_trial_result = 1 then  'ÕÉłµĀ╝'  when a.first_trial_result = 2 then  'õĖŹÕÉłµĀ╝'  end  first_trial_result ,\n    go.data_date,\n    date_format(go.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\n\t\tbb.attribute2 type\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output go\n    JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id\n    JOIN with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id \n        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1 \n        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_machine'\n    JOIN ods_mes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value \n        AND b.attr_id = '1013' \n        AND b.`STATUS` = 1\n    LEFT JOIN (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            a.actual_id,\n            b.defect_machine \n        FROM\n            ods_mes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a\n            JOIN ods_mes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id \n                AND b.`status` = 1 \n                AND a.`status` = 1 \n        WHERE\n            a.is_main_defect = 1 \n    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id\n    LEFT JOIN with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1 \n        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_lower_amount'\nWHERE\n    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01' \n\n    ; \n\nUPDATE ads_sc_zl_09_detail t\nJOIN (\n    SELECT\n        a.tenant_id,\n\t\t\t\tgo.group_id,\n        go.group_name,\n        go.group_leader,\n        a.batch_code \n    FROM\n        dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output go\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id \n) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id \n    AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code \nSET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,\n    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,\n    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;\nDELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_09;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_09 (\n    tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    group_id,\n    group_name,\n    steel_grade_type,\n    net_weight,\n    self_process_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    self_process_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    raw_material_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    raw_material_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    lower_amount,off_line_downgrade_weight,rk,rk1\n)\nSELECT\n    '4' tenant_id,\n    a.data_date,\n    c.group_id,\n    c.group_name,\n    d.steel_grade_type,\n    SUM(ifnull(b.weight/1000,0)) AS net_weight,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND b.defect_machine = '3TCM01' THEN b.weight/1000 ELSE 0 END) AS self_process_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    case when SUM(b.weight) is null then 0 else SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND b.defect_machine = '3TCM01' THEN b.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(b.weight)end  AS self_process_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND b.defect_machine = '01' THEN b.weight/1000 ELSE 0 END) AS raw_material_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    case when SUM(b.weight) is null then 0 else SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND  b.defect_machine = '01' THEN b.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(b.weight) end  AS raw_material_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    SUM(ifnull(b.lower_amount/10000,0)) AS lower_amount,0 off_line_downgrade_weight,1 rk,1 rk1\nFROM  (SELECT data_date from ads_sc_zl_09_detail group by data_date  ) a  left join\n      (SELECT group_id,concat(group_name, '_', group_leader) group_name  from ads_sc_zl_09_detail where type="

(\n    tenant_id,\n    machine_code,\n    machine_name,\n    actual_id,\n    in_batch_code,\n    batch_code,\n    grade,\n    weight,group_id,\n    group_name,\n    group_leader,last_group_id,\n    last_group_name,\n    last_group_leader,\n    steel_grade,\n    steel_grade_type,\n    lower_amount,\n    main_defect_name,\n    main_defect_desc,\n    main_defect_machine,\n    first_trial_result,\n    data_date,\n    MONTH,\n    type\n)\nSELECT\n    go.tenant_id,\n    go.machine_code,\n    go.machine_name,\n    go.actual_id,\n    a.in_batch_code,\n    go.batch_code,\n    go.grade,\n    go.weight,\n    go.group_id,\n    go.group_name,\n    go.group_leader,\n    '' AS last_group_id,\n    '' AS last_group_name,\n    '' AS last_group_leader,\n    go.steel_grade,\n    b.attr_value4 AS steel_grade_type,\n    go.weight/1000*ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2, 0) AS lower_amount,\n    a.main_defect_name,\n    a.main_defect_desc,\n    a.main_defect_machine,\n    case when a.first_trial_result = 1 then  'ÕÉłµĀ╝'  when a.first_trial_result = 2 then  'õĖŹÕÉłµĀ╝'  end  first_trial_result ,\n    go.data_date,\n    date_format(go.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\n    bb.attribute2 type\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id\n        JOIN with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id\n        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1\n        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_machine'\n        JOIN ods_mes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value\n        AND b.attr_id = '1013'\n        AND b.`STATUS` = 1\n        LEFT JOIN (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            a.actual_id,\n            b.defect_machine\n        FROM\n            ods_mes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a\n                JOIN ods_mes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id\n                AND b.`status` = 1\n                AND a.`status` = 1\n        WHERE\n            a.is_main_defect = 1\n    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id\n        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1\n        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_lower_amount'\nWHERE\n    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01'\n\n;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_zl_08_detail t\n    JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            go.group_id,\n            go.group_name,\n            go.group_leader,\n            a.batch_code\n        FROM\n            dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\n                JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id\n    ) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id\n        AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code\nSET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,\n    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,\n    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;\nDELETE FROM ads_sc_zl_08;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_08 (\n raw_material_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    raw_material_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    lower_amount,off_line_downgrade_weight,rk,rk1\n)\nSELECT\n    '4' tenant_id,\n    a.data_date,\n    c.group_id,\n    c.group_name,\n    d.steel_grade_type,\n    SUM(ifnull(b.weight/1000,0)) AS net_weight,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND b.main_defect_machine = '4TCM01' THEN b.weight/1000 ELSE 0 END) AS self_process_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    case when SUM(b.weight) is null then 0 else SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND b.main_defect_machine = '4TCM01' THEN b.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(b.weight)end  AS self_process_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND (b.main_defect_machine = '3TCM01' OR b.main_defect_machine = '01') THEN b.weight/1000 ELSE 0 END) AS raw_material_recheck_downgrade_weight,\n    case when SUM(b.weight) is null then 0 else SUM(CASE WHEN b.grade IN ('B', 'C', 'D', 'S') AND (b.main_defect_machine = '3TCM01' OR b.main_defect_machine = '01') THEN b.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(b.weight) end  AS raw_material_recheck_downgrade_rate,\n    SUM(if"

a.tenant_id,\n    a.grade,\n    a.steel_grade,\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01'   then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) a_net_weight,\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='ńö¤õ║¦ÕÄ¤ÕøĀ' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) b_net_weight,\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) c_net_weight,\n\n    SUM(   a.net_weight ) net_weight,\n    ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2,0) lower_amount ,\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null   and  b.defect_machine <>'01'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) +\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='ńö¤õ║¦ÕÄ¤ÕøĀ' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+\n    SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) lower_net_weight,\n    a.data_date,\n    date_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' )  month\nFROM\n    dwd_task_prod_actual a\n        JOIN with_attr_value bb ON a.tenant_id = bb.attribute32\n        AND a.machine_code = bb.attribute1\n        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_004_machine'\n        join with_attr_value dd  on dd.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-005-STEEL-GRADE' and a.steel_grade=dd.ATTRIBUTE1  and  a.surface=dd.ATTRIBUTE2\n        left JOIN ( SELECT distinct\n                        a.actual_id, b.defect_machine\n                    FROM\n                        ods_mes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a   join ods_mes_mm_qc_defect_data b  on a.defect_data_id=b.defect_data_id AND b.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 where a.is_main_defect=1 ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id\n        left join with_attr_value d on a.grade=d.ATTRIBUTE1  and d.scene='bi_sc_zl_005_lower_amount'\nwhere grade not in ('R','S')\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.steel_grade,\n    a.grade,\n    a.data_date,d.ATTRIBUTE2\n "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2632:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_zl_13_detail where data_date >=  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day ;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_13_detail SELECT\n                                               a.tenant_id,\n                                               c.attribute1 machine_type,\n                                               a.machine_code,\n                                               b.attribute1 steel_grade_type,\n                                               a.steel_grade,\n                                               d.attribute2 surface_type,\n                                               a.surface,\n                                               a.inner_grade,\n                                               a.grade,\n                                               a.batch_code,\n                                               a.weight,\n                                               a.output_time,\n                                               a.data_date,\n                                               substr(a.data_date,1,7) month ,\n                                               a.main_defect_code,\n                                               a.main_defect_name\nFROM\n    dwd_task_prod_actual a\n        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2\n        AND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2\n        AND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3\n        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'\n        JOIN with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1\n        AND a.surface = d.attribute3\n        AND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE'\nWHERE\n    a.data_date >=  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day ;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_zl_13;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_13 SELECT\n                                        a.tenant_id,\n                                        c.attribute1 machine_code,\n                                        b.attribute1 steel_grade,\n                                        d.attribute2 surface,\n                                        a.data_date,\n                                        substr(data_date,1,7) month ,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(a.weight) / 1000, 2) AS weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A1' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a1_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A2' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a2_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A3' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a3_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade IN ('A1', 'A2', 'A3') THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS inner_grade_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'A' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'B' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS b_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'C' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS c_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'D' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS d_weight,\n                                        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'R' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS r_weight,\n                                        'µŚź' period,\n                                        now() sync_time,\n                                        1 rk,\n                                        1 rk1\nFROM\n    dwd_task_prod_actual a\n        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2\n        AND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2\n        AND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3\n        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'\n        JOIN with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1\n        AND a.surface = d.attribute3\n        AND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE'\nWHERE\n    a.data_date >= '2025-01-01'\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2730:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from  ads_sc_zl_07_02;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_02 (\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    machine_group,\r\n    machine_code,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    machine_name,\r\n    split_in_weight_current,\r\n    net_weight_current,\r\n    yield_rate_current,\r\n    waste_rate_current,\r\n    waste_t_weight_current,\r\n    split_in_weight_last,\r\n    net_weight_last,\r\n    yield_rate_last,\r\n    waste_rate_last,\r\n    waste_t_weight_last,\r\n    month,\r\n    list_order\r\n)\r\nWITH current_month_data AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        a.machine_group,\r\n        a.machine_code,\r\n        steel_grade,\r\n        machine_name,\r\n        DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,\r\n        SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))/1000 AS split_in_weight,\r\n        SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0))/1000 AS net_weight,\r\n        IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))) AS yield_rate,\r\n        IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, 1 - (SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)))) AS waste_rate,\r\n        IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)), 0)/1000 AS waste_t_weight,\r\n        b.list_order\r\n    FROM\r\n        ads_material_yield_rate_detail a\r\n            JOIN with_attr_value b\r\n                 ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n                     AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1\r\n                     AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'\r\n    WHERE\r\n        a.tenant_id = 92\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        a.machine_group,\r\n        a.machine_code,\r\n        steel_grade,\r\n        machine_name,\r\n        DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m'),\r\n        b.list_order\r\n),\r\n     last_month_data AS (\r\n         SELECT\r\n             a.tenant_id,\r\n             a.machine_code,\r\n             steel_grade,\r\n             machine_name,\r\n             DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(data_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') AS month, -- õĖŖµ£łµĢ░µŹ«Õģ│Ķüöµ£¼µ£ł\r\n             SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)/1000) AS split_in_weight_last,\r\n             SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)/1000) AS net_weight_last,\r\n             IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0))) AS yield_rate_last,\r\n             IF(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) = 0, 0, 1 - (SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)))) AS waste_rate_last,\r\n             IFNULL(SUM(IFNULL(split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(IFNULL(net_weight, 0)), 0)/1000 AS waste_t_weight_last\r\n         FROM\r\n             ads_material_yield_rate_detail a\r\n                 JOIN with_attr_value b\r\n                      ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n                          AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1\r\n                          AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'\r\n         WHERE\r\n             a.tenant_id = 92\r\n         GROUP BY\r\n             a.tenant_id,\r\n             a.machine_code,\r\n             steel_grade,\r\n             machine_name,\r\n             DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(data_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') -- Õ░åõĖŖµ£łµĢ░µŹ«µśĀÕ░äÕł░µ£¼µ£ł\r\n     )\r\nSELECT\r\n    c.tenant_id,\r\n    c.machine_group,\r\n    c.machine_code,\r\n    c.steel_grade,\r\n    c.machine_name,\r\n    c.split_in_weight AS split_in_weight_current,\r\n    c.net_weight AS net_weight_current,\r\n    c.yield_rate AS yield_rate_current,\r\n    c.waste_rate AS waste_rate_current,\r\n    c.waste_t_weight AS waste_t_weight_current,\r\n    l.split_in_weight_last,\r\n    l.net_weight_last,\r\n    l.yield_rate_last,\r\n    l.waste_rate_last,\r\n    l.waste_t_weight_last,\r\n    c.month,\r\n    c.list_order\r\nFROM\r\n    current_month_data c\r\n        LEFT JOIN last_month_data l\r\n                  ON c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id\r\n                      AND c.machine_code = l.machine_code\r\n                      AND c.month = l.month\r\n;\r\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2750:        "with_attr_value"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2752:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_zl_07_01;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_01 (\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    machine_group,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    split_in_weight_current,\r\n    net_weight_current,\r\n    yield_rate_current,\r\n    waste_rate_current,\r\n    waste_t_weight_current,\r\n    split_in_weight_last,\r\n    net_weight_last,\r\n    yield_rate_last,\r\n    waste_rate_last,\r\n    waste_t_weight_last,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    list_order\r\n) WITH current_month_data AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        a.machine_group,\r\n        steel_grade,\r\n        DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) AS MONTH,\r\n        SUM(\r\n                IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 ))/ 1000 AS split_in_weight,\r\n        SUM(\r\n                IFNULL( net_weight, 0 ))/ 1000 AS net_weight,\r\n        IF\r\n        (\r\n                SUM(\r\n                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) = 0,\r\n                0,\r\n                SUM(\r\n                        IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )) / SUM(\r\n                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 ))) AS yield_rate,\r\n        IF\r\n        (\r\n                SUM(\r\n                        IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) = 0,\r\n                0,\r\n                1 - (\r\n                    SUM(\r\n                            IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )) / SUM(\r\n                            IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )))) AS waste_rate,\r\n        IFNULL( SUM( IFNULL( split_in_weight, 0 )) - SUM( IFNULL( net_weight, 0 )), 0 )/ 1000 AS waste_t_weight,\r\n        b.list_order\r\n    FROM\r\n        ads_material_yield_rate_detail a\r\n            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n            AND a.machine_code = b.attribute1\r\n            AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'\r\n            and a.steel_grade =  b.attribute3\r\n    WHERE\r\n        a.tenant_id = 92\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        a.machine_group,\r\n        steel_grade,\r\n        DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ),\r\n        b.list_order\r\n) SELECT\r\n      c.tenant_id,\r\n      c.machine_group,\r\n      c.steel_grade,\r\n      c.split_in_weight AS split_in_weight_current,\r\n      c.net_weight AS net_weight_current,\r\n      c.yield_rate AS yield_rate_current,\r\n      c.waste_rate AS waste_rate_current,\r\n      c.waste_t_weight AS waste_t_weight_current,\r\n      l.split_in_weight split_in_weight_last,\r\n      l.net_weight net_weight_last,\r\n      l.yield_rate yield_rate_last,\r\n      l.waste_rate waste_rate_last,\r\n      l.waste_t_weight waste_t_weight_last,\r\n      c.MONTH,\r\n      c.list_order\r\nFROM\r\n    current_month_data c\r\n        LEFT JOIN current_month_data l ON c.tenant_id = l.tenant_id\r\n        AND c.machine_group = l.machine_group\r\n        AND c.MONTH = DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CONCAT(l.MONTH, '-01'), INTERVAL -1 MONTH), '%Y-%m')\r\n        AND c.steel_grade = l.steel_grade;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2766:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined",

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2772:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            attribute3 plate_type,\r\n            attribute1 manuf_line_name,\r\n            attribute2 data_date,\r\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute9, '' ), 0 ) breakdown_frequency,\r\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute10, '' ), 0 ) planned_downtime,\r\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute11, '' ), 0 ) unplanned_downtime,\r\n            IFNULL( attribute13, '' ) remark\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '237'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.day_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.day_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.day_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime,\r\n    target.remark = source.remark;\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n            attribute2 AS data_date,\r\n            SUM( attribute9 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS unplanned_downtime\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '237'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.month_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.month_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.month_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime;\r\nUPDATE with_result_confirm AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n            period AS data_date,\r\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n            SUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS unplanned_downtime\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '237'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.period = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.attribute25 = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.attribute26 = source.unplanned_downtime;\r\n"

NULLIF( attribute10, '' ), 0 ) breakdown_frequency,\r\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute11, '' ), 0 ) planned_downtime,\r\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute12, '' ), 0 ) unplanned_downtime,\r\n            IFNULL( attribute13, '' ) remark\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '239'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.day_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.day_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.day_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime,\r\n    target.remark = source.remark;\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n            attribute2 AS data_date,\r\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n            SUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS unplanned_downtime\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '239'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.month_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.month_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.month_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime;\r\nUPDATE with_result_confirm AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (\r\n        SELECT\r\n            tenant_id,\r\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n            period AS data_date,\r\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n            SUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS unplanned_downtime\r\n        FROM\r\n            with_result_confirm\r\n        WHERE\r\n            STATUS = '1'\r\n          AND report_id = '239'\r\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\r\n\r\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.period = source.data_date\r\n        AND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name\r\nSET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n    target.attribute25 = source.planned_downtime,\r\n    target.attribute26 = source.unplanned_downtime;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2816:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data  SELECT\n                                                                         a.tenant_id,\n                                                                         a.plate_type,\n                                                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\n                                                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                         CASE\n                                                                             WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN\n                                                                                 0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)\n                                                                             END average_thickness,\n                                                                         a.data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual c\n             ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\n                 and  a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                 AND c.status = 1\n                 AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\nWHERE\n    a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\n  AND a.plate_type IS NOT NULL\n  AND a.manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,\n    a.data_date;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END\nSET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2836:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            attribute3 plate_type,\n            attribute1 manuf_line_name,\n            attribute2 data_date,\n            attribute23 attr1,\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute9, '' ), 0 ) breakdown_frequency,\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute10, '' ), 0 ) planned_downtime,\n            COALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute11, '' ), 0 ) unplanned_downtime,\n            IFNULL( attribute13, '' ) remark\n        FROM\n            with_result_confirm\n        WHERE\n            STATUS = '1'\n          AND report_id = '543'\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND  case when target.attr1 is null  then  1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1 end\nSET target.day_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\n    target.day_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\n    target.day_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime,\n    target.remark = source.remark;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n            attribute2 AS data_date,\n            attribute23 attr1,\n            SUM( attribute9 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS breakdown_frequency,\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS planned_downtime,\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS unplanned_downtime\n        FROM\n            with_result_confirm\n        WHERE\n            STATUS = '1'\n          AND report_id = '543'\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND  case when target.attr1 is null  then  1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.month_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\n    target.month_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\n    target.month_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime;\nUPDATE with_result_confirm AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n            attribute23 attr1,\n            period AS data_date,\n            SUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS breakdown_frequency,\n            SUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS planned_downtime,\n            SUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1,attribute23, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS unplanned_downtime\n        FROM\n            with_result_confirm\n        WHERE\n            STATUS = '1'\n          AND report_id = '543'\n          AND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA'\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.period = source.data_date\n        AND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND  case when target.attribute23 is null  then  1=1 else target.attribute23 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,\n    target.attribute25 = source.planned_downtime,\n    target.attribute26 = source.unplanned_downtime;\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2855:      "sql_preview": "-- 1. ÕłĀķÖżÕĘ▓µ£ēńÜäŌĆ£µĆ╗Ķ«ĪŌĆØĶ«░ÕĮĢ\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined\nWHERE manuf_line_name = 'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī';\n\n-- 2. µÅÆÕģźµ▒ćµĆ╗ÕÉÄńÜäŌĆ£µĆ╗Ķ«ĪŌĆØĶ«░ÕĮĢ\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined (\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    group_manuf_line_name,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    attr1,\n    data_date,\n    day_weight,\n    day_quantity,\n    day_average_thickness,\n    day_lower_weight,\n    day_lower_quantity,\n    day_breakdown_frequency,\n    day_planned_downtime,\n    day_unplanned_downtime,\n    day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    day_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n    month_weight,\n    month_quantity,\n    month_average_thickness,\n    month_lower_weight,\n    month_lower_quantity,\n    month_breakdown_frequency,\n    month_planned_downtime,\n    month_unplanned_downtime,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n    MONTH,\n    YEAR,\n    rk,\n    rk1\n)\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    '' AS group_manuf_line_name,\n    'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' AS manuf_line_name,\n    '' AS attr1,\n    a.data_date,\n    SUM(a.day_weight) AS day_weight,\n    SUM(a.day_quantity) AS day_quantity,\n    AVG(a.day_average_thickness) AS day_average_thickness,\n    SUM(a.day_lower_weight) AS day_lower_weight,\n    SUM(a.day_lower_quantity) AS day_lower_quantity,\n    SUM(a.day_breakdown_frequency) AS day_breakdown_frequency,\n    SUM(a.day_planned_downtime) AS day_planned_downtime,\n    SUM(a.day_unplanned_downtime) AS day_unplanned_downtime,\n    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    SUM(a.day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_product) AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    SUM(a.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n    SUM(a.month_weight) AS month_weight,\n    SUM(a.month_quantity) AS month_quantity,\n    AVG(a.month_average_thickness) AS month_average_thickness,\n    SUM(a.month_lower_weight) AS month_lower_weight,\n    SUM(a.month_lower_quantity) AS month_lower_quantity,\n    SUM(a.month_breakdown_frequency) AS month_breakdown_frequency,\n    SUM(a.month_planned_downtime) AS month_planned_downtime,\n    SUM(a.month_unplanned_downtime) AS month_unplanned_downtime,\n    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    SUM(a.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_product) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    SUM(a.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n    a.MONTH,\n    a.YEAR,\n    99 AS rk,\n    1  AS rk1\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            plate_type,\n            group_manuf_line_name,\n            manuf_line_name,\n            data_date,\n            MONTH,\n            YEAR,\n            -- Ķ«Īń«ŚÕłåń╗äÕåģ attr1 ńÜäÕĆ╝’╝ÜÕŁśÕ£©ÕÉłĶ«ĪĶĪīÕłÖĶ┐öÕø× 'ÕÉłĶ«Ī'’╝īÕÉ”ÕłÖÕÅ¢Õłåń╗äÕåģõ╗╗õĖĆÕĆ╝\n            CASE\n                WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN attr1 = 'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0\n                    THEN 'ÕÉłĶ«Ī'\n                ELSE MIN(attr1)\n                END AS attr1,\n          "
