                      tenant_id,\n                                                                   plate_type,\n                                                                   group_manuf_line_name,\n                                                                   manuf_line_name,\n                                                                   '',\n                                                                   'µŚź' period,\n                                                                   data_date AS data_date,\n                                                                   day_weight AS weight,\n                                                                   day_quantity AS quantity,\n                                                                   day_average_thickness AS average_thickness,\n                                                                   day_lower_weight AS lower_weight,\n                                                                   day_lower_quantity AS lower_quantity,\n                                                                   day_breakdown_frequency AS breakdown_frequency,\n                                                                   day_planned_downtime AS planned_downtime,\n                                                                   day_unplanned_downtime AS unplanned_downtime,\n                                                                   day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                   day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                   day_manufacturing_finished_output_length AS manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n                                                                   day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n                                                                   day_manufacturing_finished_product AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n     rk,\n                                                                   1 rk1,\n                                                                   rk1 rk2,\n planned_downtime,\n    month_unplanned_downtime AS unplanned_downtime,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n    rk,\n    1 rk1,\n    rk1 rk2,\n    remark\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined\nWHERE\n    plate_type = 'ÕåĘĶĮ¦';\nINSERT"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2918:        "with_attr_value"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2920:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_SC_ZL_11_DETAIL   ;\r\n\r\nINSERT INTO ads_SC_ZL_11_DETAIL (\r\n    tenant_id, machine_code, original_batch_code, batch_code, type,\r\n    surface, surface_thickness, surface_number, surface_middle_part,\r\n    enter_date, data_date, weight\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    b.machine_code,\r\n    a.original_batch_code,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    av1.attribute3 AS type,\r\n    a.surface,\r\n    a.surface_thickness,\r\n    a.surface_number,\r\n    a.surface_middle_part,\r\n    a.data_date AS enter_date,\r\n    date(max(b.output_time)) data_date,\r\n    a.weight\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info c ON a.original_batch_code = c.original_batch_code\r\n        AND c.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND b.STATUS = 1\r\n        AND c.batch_code = b.batch_code\r\n        AND b.grade <> 'R'\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON a.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id\r\n        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-011-TYPE'\r\n        AND av1.`status` = 1\r\n        AND b.machine_code = av1.attribute1\r\n        AND a.surface_thickness = av1.attribute2\r\n        AND ( av1.attribute4 = '*' OR a.surface_number = av1.attribute4 )\r\n\r\nWHERE\r\n    a.tenant_id = 92\r\n  AND a.plate_type = 'ńĪģķÆó'\r\n  AND a.products_category = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\r\n  AND a.rd_style_name = 'ÕŹĘµØÉµłÉÕōüÕģźÕ║ō'\r\n  and a.wh_code in ('3001','3002')\r\n\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    b.machine_code,\r\n    a.original_batch_code,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    av1.attribute3,\r\n    a.surface,\r\n    a.surface_thickness,\r\n    a.surface_number,\r\n    a.surface_middle_part,\r\n    a.data_date,\r\n    a.weight;\r\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2940:        "with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2946:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_zl_11;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_11\r\nWITH total_weight AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        tenant_id,\r\n        surface_thickness,\r\n        data_date,\r\n        machine_code,\r\n        type,\r\n        SUM(weight/1000) AS total_weight\r\n    FROM\r\n        ads_sc_zl_11_detail\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        tenant_id,\r\n        surface_thickness,\r\n        data_date,\r\n        machine_code,\r\n        type\r\n),\r\n     total_weight_zhongliang AS (\r\n         SELECT\r\n             tenant_id,\r\n             surface_thickness,\r\n             data_date,\r\n             machine_code,\r\n             SUM(weight/1000) AS zhongliang_weight\r\n         FROM\r\n             ads_sc_zl_11_detail\r\n         WHERE\r\n             type = 'ķćŹķćÅ'\r\n         GROUP BY\r\n             tenant_id,\r\n             surface_thickness,\r\n             data_date,\r\n             machine_code\r\n     ),\r\n     valid_combinations AS (\r\n         -- ĶÄĘÕÅ¢ķéŻõ║ø 'ķćŹķćÅ' õĖŹõĖ║ 0 ńÜäń╗äÕÉł\r\n         SELECT\r\n             tenant_id,\r\n             surface_thickness,\r\n             data_date,\r\n             machine_code\r\n         FROM\r\n             total_weight_zhongliang\r\n         WHERE\r\n             zhongliang_weight > 20\r\n     ),\r\n     all_dimensions AS (\r\n         -- õ╗ģõ┐ØńĢÖµ£ēµĢłń╗äÕÉł\r\n         SELECT\r\n             di.data_date,\r\n             av.tenant_id,\r\n             av.attribute1 AS machine_code,\r\n             av.attribute2 AS surface_thickness,\r\n             av.attribute3 AS type\r\n         FROM\r\n             with_attr_value av\r\n                 LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT data_date FROM total_weight) di ON 1 = 1\r\n                 JOIN valid_combinations vc ON av.tenant_id = vc.tenant_id\r\n                 AND av.attribute1 = vc.machine_code\r\n                 AND av.attribute2 = vc.surface_thickness\r\n                 AND di.data_date = vc.data_date\r\n         WHERE\r\n             av.STATUS = 1\r\n           AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-011-TYPE'\r\n         GROUP BY\r\n             di.data_date,\r\n             av.tenant_id,\r\n             av.attribute1,\r\n             av.attribute2,\r\n             av.attribute3\r\n     ),\r\n     detail AS (\r\n         -- õ╗ģõ┐ØńĢÖµ£ēµĢłń╗äÕÉłńÜäµśÄń╗å\r\n         SELECT\r\n             d.data_date,\r\n             d.tenant_id,\r\n             d.machine_code,\r\n             d.surface_thickness,\r\n             d.type,\r\n             SUM(d.weight/1000) AS weight\r\n         FROM\r\n             ads_sc_zl_11_detail d\r\n                 JOIN valid_combinations vc ON d.tenant_id = vc.tenant_id\r\n                 AND d.surface_thickness = vc.surface_thickness\r\n                 AND d.data_date = vc.data_date\r\n                 AND d.machine_code = vc.machine_code\r\n         GROUP BY\r\n             d.data_date,\r\n             d.tenant_id,\r\n             d.machine_code,\r\n             d.surface_thickness,\r\n             d.type\r\n     )\r\n\r\nSELECT\r\n    ad.tenant_id,\r\n    ad.surface_thickness,\r\n    ad.data_date,\r\n    ad.machine_code,\r\n    ad.type AS index_name,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN ad.type = 'ķćŹķćÅ' THEN\r\n            COALESCE(SUM(d.weight), 0)  -- Õ”éµ×£µś» 'ķćŹķćÅ' ń▒╗Õ×ŗ’╝īńø┤µÄźĶ┐öÕø× sum(weight)\r\n        ELSE\r\n            concat(COALESCE(round(SUM(d.weight) / NULLIF(MAX(twz.zhongliang_weight),0) * 100, 0), 0),'%')  -- ÕģČõ╗¢ń▒╗Õ×ŗµīēńģ¦ 'ķćŹķćÅ' ń▒╗Õ×ŗńÜäµĆ╗ķćŹķćÅĶ«Īń«ŚńÖŠÕłåµ»ö\r\n        END AS index_value,\r\n    NOW() AS sync_time\r\nFROM\r\n    all_dimensions ad\r\n        LEFT JOIN detail d ON ad.tenant_id = d.tenant_id\r\n        AND ad.surface_thickness = d.surface_thickness\r\n        AND ad.data_date = d.data_date\r\n        AND ad.machine_code = d.machine_code\r\n        AND ad.type = d.type\r\n        LEFT JOIN total_weight_zhongliang twz ON ad.tenant_id = twz.tenant_id\r\n        AND ad.surface_thickness = twz.surface_thickness\r\n        AND ad.data_date = twz.data_date\r\n        AND ad.machine_code = twz.machine_code\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    ad.tenant_id,\r\n    ad.surface_thickness,\r\n    ad.data_date,\r\n    ad.machine_code,\r\n    ad.type;\r\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2967:      "sql_preview": "delete\nfrom ads_sc_xl_09_process2 where sync_data_date = current_date  ;\ninsert into ads_sc_xl_09_process2\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.ATTRIBUTE1 type,\n    SUM( a.quantity )/ 1000 AS yl_current,\n    current_date sync_data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_wms_current_stock a\n        JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND  b.ATTRIBUTE5='ńĪģķÆó'   and b.ATTRIBUTE6='ÕÄ¤µ¢Ö'\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n        AND (  b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE2 )\n        AND (  b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3  )\n        AND ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_CODE = b.attribute4  )\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.ATTRIBUTE1 ;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_09_process2 AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.sync_data_date and source.type = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\nSET target.qx_yl_current = source.qx_yl_current\nwhere target.period = 'D' ;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_09_process2 AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.sync_data_date and source.type = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\nSET target.wqx_yl_current = source.qx_yl_current\nwhere target.period = 'D' ;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2988:        "with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2992:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_09_process1\nWHERE data_date = CURRENT_DATE;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_09_process1\nWITH tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1 AS (\n    SELECT\n        a.ATTRIBUTE2 AS type,\n        cs.tenant_id,\n        cs.quantity,\n        cs.ava_quantity,\n        cs.status,\n        cs.batch_code\n    FROM with_attr_value a\n             JOIN dwd_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n                  ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n                      AND (a.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR cs.wh_code = a.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                      AND (a.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*' OR cs.steel_grade = a.ATTRIBUTE3)\n                      AND (a.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*' OR cs.sku_code = a.ATTRIBUTE4)\n    WHERE a.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'\n)\nSELECT\n    type,\n    tenant_id,\n    CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS data_date,\n    SUM(quantity) / 1000 AS quantity\nFROM tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1\nGROUP BY tenant_id, type;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    JOIN (\n        SELECT tenant_id, data_date, quantity\n        FROM ads_sc_xl_09_process1\n        WHERE type = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n    ) AS source\n    ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.xny_stock_for_sale = source.quantity\nWHERE target.period = 'D';\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    JOIN (\n        SELECT tenant_id, data_date, quantity\n        FROM ads_sc_xl_09_process1\n        WHERE type = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n    ) AS source\n    ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.qx_stock_for_sale = source.quantity\nWHERE target.period = 'D'\n  AND target.tenant_id = 92;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    JOIN (\n        SELECT tenant_id, data_date, quantity\n        FROM ads_sc_xl_09_process1\n        WHERE type = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n    ) AS source\n    ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.wqx_stock_for_sale = source.quantity\nWHERE target.period = 'D'\n  AND target.tenant_id = 92;\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3019:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             scd.prod_spec4                    grade,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n\n      WHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               scd.prod_spec4,\n               sc.contract_month) a\n;\n\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_22\nwhere sync_data_date = current_date\n  and hour = hour(now())\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_22 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1,\n                          sync_time, is_newest)\nSELECT aa.sync_data_date,\n       a.HOUR,\n       aa.tenant_id,\n       aa.surface,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity END)         a_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity END)         b_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity END) total_quantity,\n       1                                                        rk,\n       1                                                        rk1,\n       a.sync_time,\n       a.is_newest\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                          sync_data_date,\n                      a.tenant_id,\n                      a.surface\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_22_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n          AND c.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.sync_data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 60 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE,\n                      tenant_id,\n                      attribute2\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_22_detail a ON aa.surface = a.surface\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\n    AND a.sync_data_date = aa.sync_data_date\n    AND a.HOUR = 18\nGROUP BY aa.sync_data_date,\n         a.HOUR,\n         aa.tenant_id,\n         aa.surface,\n         a.sync_time,\n         a.is_newest\nUNION ALL\nSELECT sync_data_date,\n       HOUR,\n       tenant_id,\n       'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' AS                                                   surface,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         a_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END)         b_quantity,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) total"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3046:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    with_attr_value\nWHERE\n    scene = 'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8) SELECT\n    *\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT\n            sc.tenant_id,\n            'bi_gx_xs_009_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 surface,\n            scd.prod_spec4 grade,\n            sc.contract_month,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight/ 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_dj,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped/ 1000  WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_sy\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n                JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n                AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30,50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n                JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'WQX'\n\n        WHERE\n            sc.contract_state in (30,50)\n          AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n          AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n          AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n        GROUP BY\n            sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_gx_xs_09\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_09 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1, sync_time, is_newest) SELECT\n                                                                                                                                                       CURRENT_DATE sync_data_date,\n                                                                                                                                                       HOUR(NOW()) HOUR,\n                                                                                                                                                       aa.tenant_id,\n                                                                                                                                                       aa.surface,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity  END) a_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                                       1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                                       1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                                       a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                                       a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            a.surface\n        FROM\n            ads_gx_xs_09_detail a\n                JOIN"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3092:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from   ads_sc_xl_13_defined_detail WHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY); ;\r\nINSERT into   ads_sc_xl_13_defined_detail\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    av1.attribute5 plate_type,\r\n    av.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.machine_code,\r\n    a.data_date,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    a.grade,\r\n    a.sku_name,\r\n    a.spec,\r\n    sum(a.quantity) quantity,\r\n    sum(a.roll_length) roll_length ,\r\n    sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\r\n        AND c.`status` = 1\r\n        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code\r\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND b.`status` = 1\r\n        AND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade\r\n        AND c.spec = b.spec\r\n        AND c.surface = b.surface\r\n        AND c.grade = b.grade\r\n        AND c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.machine_code = av.attribute2\r\n        AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-LZ'\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id\r\n        AND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4\r\n        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ'\r\n        AND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL\r\nWHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)  and a.batch_code is not null  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore =  0 and a.send_happened= 1\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    av1.attribute5 ,a.sku_name,a.tenant_id,a.machine_code,a.spec,\r\n    av.attribute1 ,\r\n    a.data_date,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    a.grade;\r\n\r\nINSERT into   ads_sc_xl_13_defined_detail\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    av1.attribute5 plate_type,\r\n    av.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.machine_code,\r\n    a.data_date,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    a.grade,\r\n    a.sku_name,\r\n    a.spec,\r\n    sum(a.quantity) quantity,\r\n    sum(a.roll_length) roll_length ,\r\n    sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\r\n        AND c.`status` = 1\r\n        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code\r\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n        AND b.`status` = 1\r\n        AND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade\r\n        AND c.spec = b.spec\r\n        AND c.surface = b.surface\r\n        AND c.grade = b.grade\r\n        AND c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.machine_code = av.attribute2\r\n        AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-JJG'\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id\r\n        AND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4\r\n        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG'\r\n        AND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL\r\nWHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)  and a.batch_code is not null  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore =  0 and a.send_happened= 1\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    av1.attribute5 ,a.sku_name,a.tenant_id,a.machine_code,a.spec,\r\n    av.attribute1 ,\r\n    a.data_date,\r\n    a.batch_code,\r\n    a.grade;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3118:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nfrom ads_sc_xl_09_process1\nwhere data_date = CURRENT_DATE;\nINSERT into ads_sc_xl_09_process1\n\nWITH tmp_batch_exclude AS (SELECT parent_batch_code\n                           FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info\n                           WHERE parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n                             AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code\n                             AND status = 1\n                           GROUP BY parent_batch_code),\n     tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1 AS (\n         -- Õłåµö» 1’╝ÜÕģ©õĖ║ķĆÜķģŹ *\n         SELECT a.ATTRIBUTE2 AS type,\n                cs.tenant_id,\n                cs.quantity,\n                cs.ava_quantity,\n                cs.status,\n                cs.batch_code\n         FROM with_attr_value a\n                  JOIN ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs FORCE INDEX (idx_cs_tenant_wh_grade_sku_status_qty)\n                       ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n                  LEFT JOIN tmp_batch_exclude f ON cs.batch_code = f.parent_batch_code\n         WHERE a.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE3 = '*'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE4 = '*'\n           AND (cs.quantity > 0 OR cs.ava_quantity > 0)\n           AND cs.status = 1\n           AND f.parent_batch_code IS NULL\n\n         UNION ALL\n\n         -- Õłåµö» 2’╝ÜµīēÕ«×ķÖģÕĆ╝Õī╣ķģŹ\n         SELECT a.ATTRIBUTE2 AS type,\n                cs.tenant_id,\n                cs.quantity,\n                cs.ava_quantity,\n                cs.status,\n                cs.batch_code\n         FROM with_attr_value a\n                  JOIN ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs FORCE INDEX (idx_cs_tenant_wh_grade_sku_status_qty)\n                       ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n                           AND cs.wh_code = a.ATTRIBUTE1\n                           AND cs.steel_grade = a.ATTRIBUTE3\n                           AND cs.sku_code = a.ATTRIBUTE4\n                  LEFT JOIN tmp_batch_exclude f ON cs.batch_code = f.parent_batch_code\n         WHERE a.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE1 != '*'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE3 != '*'\n           AND a.ATTRIBUTE4 != '*'\n           AND (cs.quantity > 0 OR cs.ava_quantity > 0)\n           AND cs.status = 1\n           AND f.parent_batch_code IS NULL)\n\nSELECT type,\n       tenant_id,\n       CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS data_date,\n       SUM(quantity) / 1000          AS quantity\nFROM tmp_ads_sc_xl_09_process1\nGROUP BY tenant_id, type;\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3352:      "sql_preview": "\r\n\t\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_001 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\nSELECT\r\n\tattribute1 steel_grade, \r\n\tattribute2 surface, \r\n\tattribute3 min_hv, \r\n\tattribute4 max_hv\r\nFROM\r\n\twith_attr_value\r\nWHERE\r\n\tscene = 'BI-SC-ZL-002-HV') AS source\r\nON target.steel_grade = source.steel_grade\r\n    AND target.surface = source.surface\r\n\r\nSET\r\n    target.min_hv = source.min_hv,target.max_hv = source.max_hv ;\r\n\t\t\r\n\r\n        CREATE table dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_002 as \r\nSELECT\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tsum( CASE WHEN hardness BETWEEN min_hv AND max_hv THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) qualified_quantity,\r\n\tcount( 1 ) quantity,\r\n\tsum( CASE WHEN hardness BETWEEN min_hv AND max_hv THEN 1 ELSE 0 END )/ count( 1 ) yield,\r\nMONTH \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_001 \r\nWHERE\r\n\thardness IS NOT NULL \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tMONTH;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3371:        "dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3375:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_003 ;\r\nINSERT into dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_003\r\nSELECT\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\ta.grade,\r\n\ta.steel_grade,\r\n  SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) a_net_weight,\r\n\tSUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='ńö¤õ║¦ÕÄ¤ÕøĀ' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) b_net_weight,\r\n\tSUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) c_net_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM( case when inner_grade ='A3' and grade='A'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) d_net_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM(   a.net_weight ) net_weight,\r\n\t\tifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE3,0) lower_amount ,\r\n\t\t SUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is not  null  and  b.defect_machine <>'01' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) +\r\n\t\tSUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and a.lower_reason='ńö¤õ║¦ÕÄ¤ÕøĀ' then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+\r\n\t\tSUM( case when grade in ('B','C','D') and b.defect_machine is null  and (a.lower_reason=''  or a.lower_reason is null)  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  )+SUM( case when inner_grade ='A3' and grade='A'  then  a.net_weight else 0 end  ) lower_net_weight,\r\n\t  a.data_date,\r\n\t\tdate_format( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' )  month\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a\r\n\tjoin (select distinct  attribute32 tenant_id,attribute1 machine_code,attribute2 type from  dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value  where scene = 'bi-sc-zl-001') dd on a.tenant_id=dd.tenant_id and a.machine_code=dd.machine_code\r\nleft JOIN ( SELECT distinct\r\n\ta.actual_id, b.defect_machine\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a   join dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b  on a.defect_data_id=b.defect_data_id AND b.`status` = 1 AND a.`status` = 1 where a.is_main_defect=1 ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id \r\n  left join dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d on a.steel_grade=d.ATTRIBUTE1 and a.grade=d.ATTRIBUTE2 and group_name,\r\n    group_leader,last_group_id,\r\n    last_group_name,\r\n    last_group_leader,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    steel_grade_type,\r\n    lower_amount,\r\n\t\tmain_defect_name,\r\n\t\tmain_defect_desc,\r\n\t\t\tmain_defect_machine,\r\n    first_trial_result,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    type\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    go.tenant_id,\r\n    go.machine_code,\r\n    go.machine_name,\r\n    go.actual_id,\r\n    a.in_batch_code,\r\n    go.batch_code,\r\n    go.grade,\r\n\t\tgo.weight,\r\n\t\tgo.group_id,\r\n    go.group_name,\r\n    go.group_leader,\r\n\t\t'' AS last_group_id,\r\n    '' AS last_group_name,\r\n    '' AS last_group_leader,\r\n    go.steel_grade,\r\n    b.attr_value4 AS steel_grade_type,\r\n    go.weight/1000*ifnull(d.ATTRIBUTE2, 0) AS lower_amount,\r\n\t\ta.main_defect_name,\r\n\t\ta.main_defect_desc,\r\n\t\t\ta.main_defect_machine,\r\n    case when a.first_trial_result = 1 then  'ÕÉłµĀ╝'  when a.first_trial_result = 2 then  'õĖŹÕÉłµĀ╝'  end  first_trial_result ,\r\n    go.data_date,\r\n    date_format(go.data_date, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\r\n\t\tbb.attribute2 type\r\nFROM\r\n    dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\r\n    JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id\r\n    JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id \r\n        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1 \r\n        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_machine'\r\n    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value \r\n        AND b.attr_id = '1013' \r\n        AND b.`STATUS` = 1\r\n    LEFT JOIN (\r\n        SELECT DISTINCT\r\n            a.actual_id,\r\n            b.defect_machine \r\n        FROM\r\n            dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a\r\n            JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id \r\n                AND b.`status` = 1 \r\n                AND a.`status` = 1 \r\n        WHERE\r\n            a.is_main_defect = 1 \r\n    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id\r\n    LEFT JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1 \r\n        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_008_lower_amount'\r\nWHERE\r\n    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01' \r\n\r\n    ; \r\n\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_zl_008_detail t\r\nJOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n\t\t\t\tgo.group_id,\r\n        go.group_name,\r\n        go.group_leader,\r\n        a.batch_code \r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id \r\n) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id \r\n    AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code \r\nSET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,\r\n    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,\r\n    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;\r\n"

MONTH,\r\n\t\tbb.attribute2 type\r\nFROM\r\n    dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\r\n    JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id\r\n    JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value bb ON go.tenant_id = bb.tenant_id \r\n        AND go.machine_code = bb.attribute1 \r\n        AND bb.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_machine'\r\n    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_sys_attr_value b ON go.steel_grade = b.attr_value \r\n        AND b.attr_id = '1013' \r\n        AND b.`STATUS` = 1\r\n    LEFT JOIN (\r\n        SELECT DISTINCT\r\n            a.actual_id,\r\n            b.defect_machine \r\n        FROM\r\n            dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_actual_defect_rela a\r\n            JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_qc_defect_data b ON a.defect_data_id = b.defect_data_id \r\n                AND b.`status` = 1 \r\n                AND a.`status` = 1 \r\n        WHERE\r\n            a.is_main_defect = 1 \r\n    ) b ON a.actual_id = b.actual_id\r\n    LEFT JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON go.grade = d.ATTRIBUTE1 \r\n        AND d.scene = 'bi_sc_zl_009_lower_amount'\r\nWHERE\r\n    go.data_date >= '2024-10-01' \r\n\r\n    ; \r\n\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_009_DETAIL t\r\nJOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n\t\t\t\tgo.group_id,\r\n        go.group_name,\r\n        go.group_leader,\r\n        a.batch_code \r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output go\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a ON go.actual_id = a.actual_id \r\n) d ON d.tenant_id = t.tenant_id \r\n    AND d.batch_code = t.in_batch_code \r\nSET t.last_group_name = d.group_name,\r\n    t.last_group_leader = d.group_leader,\r\n    t.last_group_id = d.group_id;\r\n"

steel_grade_type,\na.steel_grade,\nd.attribute2 surface_type,\na.surface,\na.inner_grade,\na.grade,\na.batch_code,\na.weight,\na.output_time,\na.data_date,\nsubstr(a.data_date,1,7) month ,\na.main_defect_code,\na.main_defect_name \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2 \n\tAND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2 \n\tAND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3 \n\tAND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1 \n\tAND a.surface = d.attribute3 \n\tAND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE' \nWHERE\n\ta.data_date >=  CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day ;\nDELETE \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_013;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_ZL_013 SELECT\na.tenant_id,\nc.attribute1 machine_code,\nb.attribute1 steel_grade,\nd.attribute2 surface,\na.data_date,\nsubstr(data_date,1,7) month ,\nROUND(SUM(a.weight) / 1000, 2) AS weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A1' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a1_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A2' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a2_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade = 'A3' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a3_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.inner_grade IN ('A1', 'A2', 'A3') THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS inner_grade_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'A' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS a_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'B' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS b_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'C' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS c_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'D' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS d_weight,\nROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'R' THEN a.weight END) / 1000, 2) AS r_weight,\n'µŚź' period,\nnow() sync_time,\n1 rk,\n1 rk1 \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_task_prod_actual a\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value c ON a.machine_code = c.attribute2 \n\tAND c.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_MACHINE_CODE'\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.steel_grade = b.attribute2 \n\tAND c.attribute1 = b.attribute3 \n\tAND b.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_STEEL_GRADE'\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value d ON c.attribute1 = d.attribute1 \n\tAND a.surface = d.attribute3 \n\tAND d.scene = 'BI_SC_ZL_013_SURFACE' \nWHERE\n\ta.data_date >= / weight * 100, 2), '%') AS c_weight_ratio,\nCONCAT(ROUND(d_weight / weight * 100, 2), '%') AS d_weight_ratio,\nCONCAT(ROUND(r_weight / weight * 100, 2), '%') AS r_weight_ratio,\n'µŚź' AS /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3570:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item AS target\r\nINNER JOIN ( SELECT tenant_id, attribute1 wh_code, attribute2 dept_code, attribute3 process_name FROM dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` WHERE scene = 'BI-SC-WK-004' ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\nAND target.wh_code = source.wh_code \r\nAND\r\nCASE\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\tWHEN source.dept_code = '*' THEN\r\n\t\t1 = 1 ELSE target.dept_code = source.dept_code \r\nEND \r\n\tSET target.process_name = source.process_name;\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\nDELETE \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_wk_004;\r\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_wk_004 SELECT\r\ntenant_id,\r\nprocess_name,\r\nsum( quantity ) quantity,\r\ndata_date,\r\n'D' period \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item \r\nWHERE\r\n\tprocess_name IS NOT NULL  and en_status='1' and ei_status='1'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tprocess_name,\r\n\tdata_date UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tprocess_name,\r\n\tSUM( amount ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, process_name, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS quantity,\r\n\tdata_date,\r\n\t'M' period \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item \r\nWHERE\r\n\tprocess_name IS NOT NULL  and en_status='1' and ei_status='1'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tprocess_name,\r\n\tdata_date ;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3591:      "sql_preview": "WITH temp_out_quantity AS (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\ta.data_date,\r\n\t\tSUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,\r\n\t\tb.ATTRIBUTE2 \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_wh_output_item a\r\n\t\tJOIN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\r\n\tround( qx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) qx_rate,\r\nMONTH ,0\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' \r\nWHERE\r\n\t`period` = 'M' \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = 92 \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\tdata_date,\r\n\tqx_practical_enter UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' type,\r\n\tround(wqx_a_weight/wqx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) a_rate ,\r\n\twqx_practical_enter weight,\r\n\tsum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\r\n\tround( wqx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) rate,\r\nMONTH ,0\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' \r\nWHERE\r\n\t`period` = 'M' \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = 92 \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\tdata_date,\r\n\twqx_practical_enter UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' type,\r\n\tround(xny_a_weight/xny_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) a_rate ,\r\n\txny_practical_enter weight,\r\n\tsum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\r\n\tround( xny_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) rate,\r\nMONTH ,0\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2 \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_PLAN' \r\nWHERE\r\n\t`period` = 'M' \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = 92 \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\tdata_date,\r\n\txny_practical_enter ;\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009_yield_rate AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\ta.month,\r\n\ta.days/b.days*100 actually_rate\r\n\tfrom \r\n\t(SELECT tenant_id,month,max(day(data_date)) days from  dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 where period='D' group by tenant_id,month) a \r\n\tjoin \r\n\t\r\n\t(SELECT substr(date_id,1,7) month ,max(day)  days from dw_ads_prd.dim_date_info  group by substr(date_id,1,7) ) b  on a.month=b.month \r\n \r\n) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND  source.month  = target.month\r\nSET\r\n    target.actually_rate = source.actually_rate ;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3633:      "sql_preview": " UPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\ta.sync_data_date data_date,\r\n\t\tSUM( a.quantity )/ 1000 AS qx_yl_current \r\n\tFROM \r\ndw_ads_prd.ads_prod_current_stock_di a\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND b.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  and b.ATTRIBUTE5='ńĪģķÆó'   and b.ATTRIBUTE6='ÕÄ¤µ¢Ö' \r\n\t\tAND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category' \r\n\t\tAND (  b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE2 ) \r\n\t\tAND (  b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3  ) \r\n\t\tAND ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_CODE = b.attribute4  ) \r\n\twhere a.hour =8\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\ta.sync_data_date \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tSET target.qx_yl_current = source.qx_yl_current\r\n    where target.period = 'D';\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\ta.sync_data_date data_date,\r\n\t\tSUM( a.quantity )/ 1000 AS wqx_yl_current \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.ads_prod_current_stock_di a\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND b.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  and b.ATTRIBUTE5='ńĪģķÆó'   and b.ATTRIBUTE6='ÕÄ¤µ¢Ö' \r\n\t\tAND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category' \r\n\t\t\tAND (  b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE2 ) \r\n\t\tAND (  b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3  ) \r\n\t\tAND ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_CODE = b.attribute4  ) \r\n\twhere a.hour =8\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\ta.sync_data_date \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tSET target.wqx_yl_current = source.wqx_yl_current\r\n     where target.period = 'D';"

BY\r\n\t\tsdo.tenant_id,\r\ndate(sdod.created_time)) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\nAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\nSET target.qx_product_shipment = /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3676:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS xny_pending_delivery_quantity,\r\n\t\t\t\tdata_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n        AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ' \r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH' \r\n       AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\r\n\t\tand ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\r\n\t\tand ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\r\n    WHERE\r\n        a.`status` = 1 \r\n        AND a.tenant_id = '92' \r\n        AND a.order_status = '00' \r\n        AND a.is_handle = '0' \r\n        and a.hour=8\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,data_date\r\n) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\r\nSET\r\n    target.xny_pending_delivery_quantity = source.xny_pending_delivery_quantity\r\n\t\twhere target.period = 'D' \r\n    ;\r\n\t\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS qx_pending_delivery_quantity,\r\n\t\t\t\tdata_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n        \r\n        AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ' \r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH' \r\n       AND case when b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' then 1=1 else  a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  end \r\n\t\tand (case when b.attribute3 = '*' then 1=1 else a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  end)\r\n\t\tand (case when b.attribute4 = '*' then 1=1 else a.sku_code= b.attribute4  end)\r\n    WHERE\r\n        a.`status` = 1 \r\n        AND a.tenant_id = '92' \r\n        AND a.order_status = '00' \r\n        AND a.is_handle = '0' \r\n         and a.hour=8\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,data_date\r\n) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\r\nSET\r\n    target.qx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.qx_pending_delivery_quantity\r\n\t\twhere target.period = 'D'\r\n    ;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_009 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS wqx_pending_delivery_quantity,\r\n\t\t\t\tdata_date  - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.`with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n        AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ' \r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI_SC_XL_009_WH' \r\n        AND case when b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' then 1=1 else  a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  end \r\n\t\tand (case when b.attribute3 = '*' then 1=1 else a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  end)\r\n\t\tand (case when b.attribute4 = '*' then 1=1 else a.sku_code= b.attribute4  end)\r\n    WHERE\r\n        a.`status` = 1 \r\n        AND a.tenant_id = '92' \r\n        AND a.order_status = '00' \r\n        AND a.is_handle = '0' \r\n         and a.hour=8\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,data_date\r\n) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\r\nSET\r\n    target.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity\r\n\t\twhere target.period = 'D' \r\n    ;\r\n\r\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3721:      "sql_preview": "DELETE \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_015 \nWHERE\n\ttype = 'KC' \n\tAND data_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_015 (data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, rk, period, type) SELECT\nt.sync_data_date,\nSUM(CASE WHEN t.sku_name = 'HIBńāŁĶĮ¦ÕŹĘ'  AND steel_grade ='QX'  AND SUBSTR(t.spec, 6, 2) = 12 THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr1,\nSUM(CASE WHEN t.sku_name = 'HIBńāŁĶĮ¦ÕŹĘ' AND steel_grade ='QX' AND SUBSTR(t.spec, 6, 2) = 12 THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr2,\nSUM(CASE WHEN b.attribute2 = 'ķ╗æńÜ«' AND steel_grade ='WQX'  AND t.wh_name IN ('õĖĆÕÅĘÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō', 'ĶÅ▒ńæ×ÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō') AND t.surface LIKE '%1300%' THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr3,\nSUM(CASE WHEN b.attribute2 = 'ķ╗æńÜ«' AND steel_grade ='WQX' AND t.wh_name = 'õĖĆÕÅĘÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō' AND t.surface LIKE '%600%' THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr4,\nSUM(CASE WHEN b.attribute2 = 'ķ╗æńÜ«' AND steel_grade ='WQX' AND t.wh_name = 'õĖĆÕÅĘÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō' AND t.surface LIKE '%250%' THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr5,\nSUM(CASE WHEN b.attribute2 = 'ńÖĮńÜ«' AND steel_grade ='WQX' AND t.wh_name = 'õĖĆÕÅĘÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō' AND t.surface LIKE '%250%' THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr6,\nSUM(CASE WHEN b.attribute2 = 'ķ╗æńÜ«' AND steel_grade ='WQX' AND t.wh_name = 'õĖĆÕÅĘÕÄ¤µ¢Öõ╗ō' AND t.surface LIKE '%350%' THEN t.quantity ELSE 0 END) / 1000 AS attr7,\n5 AS rk,\n'D' AS period,\n'KC' type \nFROM\ndw_ads_prd.ads_prod_current_stock_di t\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON t.sku_name = b.attribute1 \n\tAND t.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \n\tAND B.scene ='BI_SC_WK_015_TYPE'\n\twhere t.`hour` = 8 \n\tand sync_data_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAY\nGROUP BY\n\tt.sync_data_date;\n\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_015 \nSET attr8 =  IFNULL(attr3, 0) + IFNULL(attr4, 0) + IFNULL(attr5, 0) + IFNULL(attr6, 0) + IFNULL(attr7, 0),\nattr9 = IFNULL(attr1, 0) + IFNULL(attr3, 0) + IFNULL(attr4, 0) + IFNULL(attr5, 0) + IFNULL(attr6, 0) + IFNULL(attr7, 0);\n\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3745:      "sql_preview": "DELETE \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 (tenant_id, data_date, thickness, weight, als_weight, weight_below_28_5, pct_below_28_5, weight_at_or_above_28_5, pct_at_or_above_28_5, rk) WITH target_specs AS (SELECT '2.00' AS spec UNION ALL SELECT '2.30' UNION ALL SELECT '2.60'),\naggregated_data AS (\n\tSELECT\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\n\t\ta.data_date,\n\t\tSUBSTR(a.spec, 1, 4) AS spec,-- Õ░åµ▓Īµ£ēµĢ░µŹ«ńÜäĶ¦äµĀ╝µśŠńż║õĖ║ 0’╝łÕŹĢõĮŹĶĮ¼µŹóõĖ║ÕÉ©’╝ē\n\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(a.weight) / 1000, 0) AS weight,\n\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.als IS NOT NULL THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / 1000, 0) AS als_weight,\n\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN (b.als < 28.5 OR b.als IS NULL) THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / 1000, 0) AS weight_below_28_5,-- Õ░Åõ║Ä 28.5 ALS ńÜäÕŹĀµ»ö\n\t\tROUND(\n\t\t\tCASE\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\tWHEN SUM( a.weight ) = 0 THEN\n\t\t\t\t\t\t0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN (b.als < 28.5 OR b.als IS NULL) THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM( a.weight ) \n\t\t\t\t\tEND,\n\t\t\t\t4) AS pct_below_28_5,-- Õż¦õ║ÄńŁēõ║Ä 28.5 ALS ńÜäķćŹķćÅ\n\t\t\t\tCOALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN b.als >= 28.5 THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / 1000, 0) AS weight_at_or_above_28_5,-- Õż¦õ║ÄńŁēõ║Ä 28.5 ALS ńÜäÕŹĀµ»ö\n\t\t\t\tROUND(\n\t\t\t\t\tCASE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tWHEN SUM( a.weight ) = 0 THEN\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t0 ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN b.als >= 28.5 THEN a.weight ELSE 0 END) / SUM(a.weight ) \n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tEND,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t4) AS pct_at_or_above_28_5 \n\t\t\t\t\tFROM\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item a\n\t\t\t\t\t\tLEFT JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_sus_element b ON a.in_batch_code = b.in_batch_code \n\t\t\t\t\t\tAND b.STATUS = 1 \n\t\t\t\t\t\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \n\t\t\t\t\tWHERE\n\t\t\t\t\t\ta.sku_name = 'HIBńāŁĶĮ¦ÕŹĘ' \n\t\t\t\t\t\tAND a.producer = 'µČ¤ķÆó' \n\t\t\t\t\tGROUP BY\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSUBSTR(a.spec, 1, 4),\n\t\t\t\t\t\ta.tenant_id,\n\t\t\t\ta.data_date) -- Õģ│Ķüöń╗┤Õ║”ĶĪ©\n\t\t\tSELECT\n\t\t\t\t92 tenant_id,\n\t\t\t\tddi.data_date,\n\t\t\t\tts.spec,\n\t\t\t\tad.weight,\n\t\t\t\tad.als_weight,\n\t\t\t\tad.weight_below_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tad.pct_below_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tad.weight_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tad.pct_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\t\t1 \n\t\t\tFROM\n\t\t\t\t(SELECT date_id AS data_date FROM dw_ads_prd.dim_date_info WHERE date_id >= '2025-01-01' AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) ddi\n\t\t\t\tLEFT JOIN target_specs ts ON 1 = 1 -- ńĪ«õ┐Øµ»ÅõĖ¬Ķ¦äµĀ╝ķāĮõ╝ÜĶ┐×µÄź\n\t\t\t\tLEFT JOIN aggregated_data ad ON ddi.data_date = ad.data_date \n\t\t\t\tAND ts.spec = ad.spec;\n\t\t\tINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 (tenant_id, data_date, thickness, weight, als_weight, weight_below_28_5, pct_below_28_5, weight_at_or_above_28_5, pct_at_or_above_28_5, rk) SELECT\n\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\tsubstr(data_date, 1, 7) data_date,\n\t\t\tthickness,\n\t\t\tsum(weight) weight,\n\t\t\tsum(als_weight) als_weight,\n\t\t\tsum(weight_below_28_5) weight_below_28_5,\n\t\t\tround(sum(weight_below_28_5) / sum(weight), 4) pct_below_28_5,\n\t\t\tsum(weight_at_or_above_28_5) weight_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\tround(sum(weight_at_or_above_28_5) / sum(weight), 4) pct_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\t2 \n\t\t\tFROM\n\t\t\t\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 \n\t\t\tGROUP BY\n\t\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\t\tsubstr(data_date, 1, 7),\n\t\t\t\tthickness UNION ALL\n\t\t\tSELECT\n\t\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\t\tsubstr(data_date, 1, 7) data_date,\n\t\t\t\t'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' thickness,\n\t\t\t\tsum(weight) weight,\n\t\t\t\tsum(als_weight) als_weight,\n\t\t\t\tsum(weight_below_28_5) weight_below_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tround(sum(weight_below_28_5) / sum(weight), 4) pct_below_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tsum(weight_at_or_above_28_5) weight_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\t\tround(sum(weight_at_or_above_28_5) / sum(weight), 4) pct_at_or_above_28_5,\n\t\t\t\t3 \n\t\t\tFROM\n\t\t\t\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 \n\t\t\tGROUP BY\n\t\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\t\tsubstr(data_date, 1, 7);\n\t\t\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 a\n\t\t\tJOIN (SELECT tenant_id, data_date, sum(weight) weight FROM dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 WHERE thickness <> 'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' GROUP BY tenant_id, data_date) b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \n\t\t\tAND a.data_date = b.data_date \n\t\t\tSET a.total_weight = b.weight \n\t\t\tWHERE\n\t\t\t\tthickness <> 'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī';\n\t\t\tUPDATE dw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 a\n\t\t\tJOIN (\n\t\t\t\tSELECT\n\t\t\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\t\t\tdata_date,\n\t\t\t\t\tsum(CASE WHEN thickness IN ('2.00', '2.30') THEN weight_at_or_above_28_5 ELSE 0 END) / sum(weight) coincidence_ratio \n\t\t\t\tFROM\n\t\t\t\t\tdw_ads_prd.BI_SC_WK_016 \n\t\t\t\tWHERE\n\t\t\t\t\tthickness <> 'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' \n\t\t\t\tGROUP BY\n\t\t\t\t\ttenant_id,\n\t\t\tdata_date) b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \n\t\t\tAND a.data_date = b.data_date \n\t\t\tSET a.coincidence_ratio"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:3771:      "sql_preview": "DELETE \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail SELECT\na.products_category,\na.plate_type,\na.products_type,\na.tenant_id,\nbatch_code,\nsku_code,\nsku_name,\nwh_code,\nwh_name,\nrd_style,\nrd_style_name,\ntop_cat_name,\nsteel_grade_series,\nsteel_grade,\nsurface,\nsurface_thickness,\nsurface_number,\nsurface_middle_part,\ngrade,\nspec,\nweight,\nquantity,\nroll_length,\niron_loss,\nchecked_time,\nCASE\n\t\t\n\t\tWHEN TIME(checked_time) <= '09:00:00' THEN\n\t\tDATE_SUB(data_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ELSE data_date \n\tEND AS data_date,\n\tMONTH(CASE WHEN TIME(checked_time) <= '09:00:00' THEN DATE_SUB(data_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ELSE data_date END) AS `MONTH`,\n\tYEAR(CASE WHEN TIME(checked_time) <= '09:00:00' THEN DATE_SUB(data_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ELSE data_date END) AS `YEAR`,\n\tNOW() AS sync_time,\n\t99 AS is_final_entry \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item a  join dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av \n\ton  a.wh_code= av.attribute1 and av.scene = 'BI_GX_XS_019_DETAIL_WHCODE'\nWHERE\n\tverify_status = '2' \n\tAND bill_type = 2 \n\tAND YEAR >= 2025 \n\tAND a.tenant_id = 92 \n\tAND products_type = 'µłÉÕōü';\nWITH ranked_data AS (SELECT wh_code, batch_code, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY wh_code, batch_code ORDER BY a.checked_time asc) AS sort_order FROM dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail a) UPDATE dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail AS t\nJOIN ranked_data AS r ON t.wh_code = r.wh_code \nAND t.batch_code = r.batch_code \nSET t.is_final_entry = r.sort_order;\nDELETE \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019 SELECT\ndata_date,\nsteel_grade,\nsurface,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END) / 1000 a_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END) / 1000 b_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END) / 1000 c_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END) / 1000 d_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) / 1000 total_weight,\n1,\n1\n\nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail \n\twhere is_final_entry =1 \nGROUP BY\n\tdata_date,\n\tsteel_grade,\n\tsurface;\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019 SELECT\ndata_date,\nsteel_grade,\nconcat(steel_grade, 'Õ░ÅĶ«Ī') surface,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END) / 1000 a_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END) / 1000 b_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END) / 1000 c_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END) / 1000 d_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) / 1000 total_weight,\n2,\n1 \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail \n\twhere is_final_entry =1 \nGROUP BY\n\tdata_date,\n\tsteel_grade,\n\tconcat(steel_grade, 'Õ░ÅĶ«Ī');\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019 SELECT\ndata_date,\n'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' steel_grade,\n'' surface,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END) / 1000 a_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END) / 1000 b_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END) / 1000 c_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END) / 1000 d_weight,\nsum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) / 1000 total_weight,\n2,\n2 \nFROM\n\tdw_ads_prd.BI_GX_XS_019_detail \n\twhere is_final_entry =1 \nGROUP BY\n\tdata_date;"

dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 SELECT\r\na.tenant_id,\r\na.manuf_line_code,\r\na.manuf_line_name,\r\na.data_date,\r\nsum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n'0.0' month_weight,\r\navg( a.weight / d.attr_value3 / b.act_width ) average_thickness,\r\n'0.0' month_average_thickness,\r\nsum( CASE WHEN a.grade = 'A' THEN 0 ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n'0.0' month_lower_weight,\r\n'0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' month_breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' down_time,\r\n'0.0' month_down_time,\r\n'0.0' downtime_impacts_capacity,\r\n'0.0' month_downtime_impacts_capacity,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\nsum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n'0.0' month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n'0.0' month_manufacturing_finished_output_length \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id \r\n\tAND c.`status` = 1\r\n\tLEFT JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.`status` = 1 \r\n\tAND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade \r\n\tAND c.spec = b.spec \r\n\tAND c.surface = b.surface \r\n\tAND c.grade = b.grade \r\n\tAND c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.dim_mes_hmes_sys_attr_value d ON c.steel_grade = d.attr_value \r\n\tAND attr_id = '1013' \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_code,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name,\r\n\ta.data_date;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tb.attribute1 type,\r\n\t\tSUM( weight )/ 1000 AS weight,\r\n\t\twork_data_date data_date \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item a\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE' \r\n\t\tand (case when  b.attribute2 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.wh_code = b.attribute2 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute5 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.dept_code = b.attribute5 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute3 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.steel_grade = b.attribute3 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute4 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.sku_code = b.attribute4 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute6 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.machine_code = b.attribute6 END  ) \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\tverify_status = '2' \r\n\tGROUP BY\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tb.attribute1,\r\n\t\twork_data_date \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.type \r\n\tSET target.manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.weight;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ttenant_id,\r\n\t\tmanuf_line_code,\r\n\t\tmanuf_line_name,\r\n\t\tdata_date,\r\n\t\tSUM( weight ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_length ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\t\tSUM( lower_weight ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_lower_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_tons ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_code = source.manuf_line_code \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tSET target.month_weight = source.month_weight,\r\n\ttarget.month_lower_weight = source.month_lower_weight,\r\n\ttarget.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length = source.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\ttarget.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons;"

tenant_id,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    surface,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    lower_weight,\r\n    lower_quantity,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    dr.date_id,\r\n    t.tenant_id,\r\n    t.plate_type,\r\n    t.surface,\r\n    t.steel_grade_series,\r\n    t.manuf_line_name,\r\n    COALESCE(orig.weight, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.quantity, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.lower_weight, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.lower_quantity, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.MONTH, 'µ£¬ń¤ź'),\r\n    COALESCE(orig.YEAR, 'µ£¬ń¤ź')\r\nFROM (\r\n    SELECT date_id \r\n    FROM dw_ads_prd.dim_date_info \r\n    WHERE date_id <= CURDATE() \r\n      AND date_id >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\r\n) dr\r\nleft JOIN (\r\n    SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, plate_type, surface, steel_grade_series, manuf_line_name \r\n    FROM dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001\r\n) t ON 1=1\r\n left JOIN dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001 orig  \r\n     ON dr.date_id = orig.data_date \r\n    AND t.tenant_id = orig.tenant_id \r\n    AND t.plate_type = orig.plate_type \r\n    AND t.surface = orig.surface \r\n    AND t.steel_grade_series = orig.steel_grade_series \r\n    AND t.manuf_line_name = orig.manuf_line_name\r\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\r\n    weight = VALUES(weight),\r\n    quantity = VALUES(quantity),\r\n    lower_weight = VALUES(lower_weight),\r\n    lower_quantity = VALUES(lower_quantity),\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length = VALUES(manufacturing_finished_output_length),\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length = VALUES(lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length),\r\n    MONTH = VALUES(MONTH),\r\n    YEAR = VALUES(YEAR);\r\n\t\t \r\n "

where  data_date >=  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\r\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name  SELECT\r\na.tenant_id,\r\na.plate_type,\r\nav1.attribute3 group_manuf_line_name,\r\na.manuf_line_name,'',\r\na.data_date,\r\nSUM( a.weight ) weight,\r\nSUM( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n'0.0' average_thickness,\r\nSUM( a.lower_weight ) lower_weight,\r\nSUM( a.lower_quantity ) lower_quantity,\r\n'0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' planned_downtime,\r\n'0.0' unplanned_downtime,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\nSUM( a.manufacturing_finished_output_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\nSUM( a.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\nsubstr(a.data_date,1,7) MONTH,\r\nyear(data_date) YEAR,\r\nav1.list_order rk ,''\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON a.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id \r\n\tAND a.plate_type = av1.attribute5 \r\n\tAND a.manuf_line_name = av1.attribute4 \r\n\tAND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ' \r\n\t\r\nWHERE\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name <> ''  and   data_date >=  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)  \r\nGROUP BY \r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\ta.plate_type,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name,\r\n\ta.data_date,\r\n\tav1.list_order;\r\n\tINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name SELECT\r\na.tenant_id,\r\na.plate_type,\r\nav1.attribute3 group_manuf_line_name,\r\na.manuf_line_name,'',\r\na.data_date,\r\nSUM( a.weight ) weight,\r\nSUM( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n'0.0' average_thickness,\r\nSUM( a.lower_weight ) lower_weight,\r\nSUM( a.lower_quantity ) lower_quantity,\r\n'0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' planned_downtime,\r\n'0.0' unplanned_downtime,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\nSUM( a.manufacturing_finished_output_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\nSUM( a.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\nsubstr(a.data_date,1,7) MONTH,\r\nyear(data_date) YEAR,\r\nav1.list_order rk ,''\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON a.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id \r\n\tAND a.plate_type = av1.attribute5 \r\n\tAND a.manuf_line_name = av1.attribute4 \r\n\tAND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG' \r\nWHERE\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name <> ''  and   data_date >=  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\ta.plate_type,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name,\r\n\ta.data_date,\r\n\tav1.list_order;\r\nWITH avg_thickness_data AS (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tav1.attribute5 plate_type,\r\n\t\tav.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\r\n\t\tSUM( c.act_height * c.roll_length ) / SUM( c.roll_length ) average_thickness,\r\n\t\ta.data_date \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id \r\n\t\tAND c.`status` = 1\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND a.machine_code = av.attribute2 \r\n\t\tAND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-LZ'\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4 \r\n\t\tAND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ'\r\n\t\tAND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\ta.data_date >=  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\r\n\tGROUP BY\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tav1.attribute5,\r\n\t\tav.attribute1,\r\n\t\ta.data_date \r\n)\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name AS target\r\nINNER JOIN avg_thickness_data AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.plate_type = source.plate_type \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name \r\nSET target.average_thickness = source.average_thickness\r\nWHERE\r\n\ttarget.data_date >=  DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\r\n\r\n\r\nWITH finished_"

weight\r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id \r\n\tAND c.`status` = 1\r\n\tLEFT JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.`status` = 1 \r\n\tAND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade \r\n\tAND c.spec = b.spec \r\n\tAND c.surface = b.surface \r\n\tAND c.grade = b.grade \r\n\tAND c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n\t\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id \r\n\tAND a.machine_code = av.attribute2 \r\n\tAND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-JJG'\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id \r\n\tAND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4 \r\n\tAND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG' \r\n\tAND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL \r\nWHERE data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)  and a.batch_code is not null  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore =  0 and a.send_happened= 1 \r\nGROUP BY \r\nav1.attribute5 ,a.sku_name,a.tenant_id,a.machine_code,a.spec,\r\nav.attribute1 ,\r\na.data_date,\r\na.batch_code,\r\na.grade;"

(\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tplate_type,\r\n\tgroup_manuf_line_name,\r\n\tmanuf_line_name,\r\n\tweight,\r\n\tquantity,\r\n\tmanufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\tlower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\tmanufacturing_finished_product,\r\n\tmanufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n\tlower_weight,\r\n\tlower_quantity,\r\n\tmanufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n\tmanufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n\t`month`,\r\n\tYEAR,\r\n\trk \r\n) SELECT\r\ntenant_id,\r\nplate_type,\r\ngroup_manuf_line_name,\r\nmanuf_line_name,\r\nSUM( weight ) AS weight,\r\nSUM( quantity ) AS quantity,\r\nSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_length ) AS manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\nSUM( lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length ) AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\nsum( manufacturing_finished_product ) manufacturing_finished_product,\r\nSUM( manufacturing_finished_product_quantity )  manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\nSUM( lower_weight ) AS lower_weight,\r\nSUM( lower_quantity ) AS lower_quantity,\r\nSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_tons ) AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\nSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_quantity )   manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n\r\nsubstr( data_date, 1, 7 ) MONTH,\r\nYEAR ( data_date ) YEAR,\r\nmax( rk ) \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ttenant_id,\r\n\tplate_type,\r\n\tmanuf_line_name,\r\n\tsubstr( data_date, 1, 7 ),\r\n\tYEAR ( data_date );\r\nWITH avg_thickness_data_lz AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        av1.attribute5 AS plate_type,\r\n        av.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n        SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length) AS average_thickness,\r\n        substr(a.data_date, 1, 7) AS month\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\r\n        AND c.`status` = 1\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.machine_code = av.attribute2\r\n        AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-LZ'\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id\r\n        AND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4\r\n        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ'\r\n        AND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        av1.attribute5,\r\n        av.attribute1,\r\n        substr(a.data_date, 1, 7)\r\n)\r\n\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name_month AS target\r\nINNER JOIN avg_thickness_data_lz AS source \r\n    ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n    AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type \r\n    AND target.MONTH = source.month \r\n    AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name \r\nSET target.average_thickness = source.average_thickness;\r\nWITH avg_thickness_data_jjg AS (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        av1.attribute5 AS plate_type,\r\n        av.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n        SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length) AS average_thickness,\r\n        substr(a.data_date, 1, 7) AS month\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\r\n        AND c.`status` = 1\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av ON a.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n        AND a.machine_code = av.attribute2\r\n        AND av.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-TYPE-JJG'\r\n        JOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value av1 ON av.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id\r\n        AND av.attribute1 = av1.attribute4\r\n        AND av1.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG'\r\n        AND av1.attribute5 IS NOT NULL\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        a.tenant_id,\r\n        av1.attribute5,\r\n        av.attribute1,\r\n        substr(a.data_date, 1, 7)\r\n)\r\n\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name_month AS target\r\nINNER JOIN avg_thickness_data_jjg AS source \r\n    ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n    AND tar"

DAY);\r\n\r\n-- Step 2: µÅÆÕģźÕēŹõĖĆÕż®ńÜäµ»ÅµŚźµĢ░µŹ«\r\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name_combined (\r\n    `tenant_id`,\r\n    `plate_type`,\r\n    `group_manuf_line_name`,\r\n    `manuf_line_name`,\r\n    `data_date`,\r\n    `day_weight`,\r\n    `day_quantity`,\r\n    `day_average_thickness`,\r\n    `day_lower_weight`,\r\n    `day_lower_quantity`,\r\n    `day_breakdown_frequency`,\r\n    `day_planned_downtime`,\r\n    `day_unplanned_downtime`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_length`,\r\n    `day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_product`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity`,\r\n    `month`,\r\n    `year`,\r\n    `rk`,\r\n    `remark`\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    d.`tenant_id`,\r\n    d.`plate_type`,\r\n    d.`group_manuf_line_name`,\r\n    d.`manuf_line_name`,\r\n    d.`data_date`,\r\n    d.`weight` AS day_weight,\r\n    d.`quantity` AS day_quantity,\r\n    d.`average_thickness` AS day_average_thickness,\r\n    d.`lower_weight` AS day_lower_weight,\r\n    d.`lower_quantity` AS day_lower_quantity,\r\n    d.`breakdown_frequency` AS day_breakdown_frequency,\r\n    d.`planned_downtime` AS day_planned_downtime,\r\n    d.`unplanned_downtime` AS day_unplanned_downtime,\r\n    d.`manufacturing_finished_output_tons` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n    d.`manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n    d.`manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    d.`lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    d.`manufacturing_finished_product` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n    d.`manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(d.`data_date`, '%Y-%m') AS month,\r\n    YEAR(d.`data_date`) AS year,\r\n    d.`rk`,\r\n    d.`remark`\r\nFROM\r\n    dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name d\r\nWHERE\r\n    d.`data_date` = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY);\r\n\r\n-- Step 3: µø┤µ¢░ÕēŹõĖĆÕż®ńÜäµ£łÕ║”ń┤»Ķ«ĪµĢ░µŹ«\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n    SELECT\r\n        tenant_id,\r\n        plate_type,\r\n        manuf_line_name,\r\n        DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,\r\n        SUM(weight) AS month_weight,\r\n        SUM(quantity) AS month_quantity,\r\n        AVG(average_thickness) AS month_average_thickness,\r\n        SUM(lower_weight) AS month_lower_weight,\r\n        SUM(lower_quantity) AS month_lower_quantity,\r\n        SUM(breakdown_frequency) AS month_breakdown_frequency,\r\n        SUM(planned_downtime) AS month_planned_downtime,\r\n        SUM(unplanned_downtime) AS month_unplanned_downtime,\r\n        SUM(manufacturing_finished_output_tons) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n        SUM(manufacturing_finished_output_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n        SUM(manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n        SUM(lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) AS month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n        SUM(manufacturing_finished_product) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n        SUM(manufacturing_finished_product_quantity) AS month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity\r\n    FROM\r\n        dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name\r\n    WHERE\r\n        data_date BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY), '%Y-%m-01') AND DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)\r\n    GROUP BY\r\n        tenant_id, plate_type, manuf_line_name, DATE_FORMAT(data_date, '%Y-%m')\r\n) AS monthly\r\nON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id\r\nAND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name\r\nAND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type\r\nAND target.month = monthly.month\r\nSET\r\n    target.month"

breakdown_frequency,\r\n\t\tCOALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute10, '' ), 0 ) planned_downtime,\r\n\t\tCOALESCE ( NULLIF( attribute11, '' ), 0 ) unplanned_downtime,\r\n\t\tIFNULL( attribute13, '' ) remark \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.with_result_confirm \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\tSTATUS = '1' \r\n\t\tAND report_id = '237' \r\n\t\tAND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA' \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name \r\n\tSET target.day_breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n\ttarget.day_planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n\ttarget.day_unplanned_downtime = source.unplanned_downtime,\r\n\ttarget.remark = source.remark;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ttenant_id,\r\n\t\tattribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\r\n\t\tattribute2 AS data_date,\r\n\t\tSUM( attribute9 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n\t\tSUM( attribute10 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n\t\tSUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY attribute2 ) AS unplanned_downtime \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.with_result_confirm \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\tSTATUS = '1' \r\n\t\tAND report_id = '237' \r\n\t\tAND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA' \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name \r\n\tSET target.month_breakdown_frequency = attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS breakdown_frequency,\r\n\t\tSUM( attribute11 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS planned_downtime,\r\n\t\tSUM( attribute12 ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, attribute1, substr( attribute2, 1, 7 ) ORDER BY period ) AS unplanned_downtime \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.with_result_confirm \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\tSTATUS = '1' \r\n\t\tAND report_id = '237' \r\n\t\tAND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA' \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.period = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.attribute1 = source.manuf_line_name \r\n\tSET target.attribute24 = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n\ttarget.attribute25 =
