\r\n\t\tAND result_cat = 'REPORT_BUSINESS_DATA' \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name \r\n\tSET target.breakdown_frequency = source.breakdown_frequency,\r\n\ttarget.planned_downtime = source.planned_downtime,\r\n\ttarget.unplanned_downtime = /Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:4003:      "sql_preview": "DELETE \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013;\r\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 SELECT\r\na.tenant_id,\r\na.manuf_line_code,\r\na.manuf_line_name,\r\na.data_date,\r\nsum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n'0.0' month_weight,\r\navg( a.weight / d.attr_value3 / b.act_width ) average_thickness,\r\n'0.0' month_average_thickness,\r\nsum( CASE WHEN a.grade = 'A' THEN 0 ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n'0.0' month_lower_weight,\r\n'0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' month_breakdown_frequency,\r\n'0.0' down_time,\r\n'0.0' month_down_time,\r\n'0.0' downtime_impacts_capacity,\r\n'0.0' month_downtime_impacts_capacity,\r\n'0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\nsum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n'0.0' month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n'0.0' month_manufacturing_finished_output_length \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n\tJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id \r\n\tAND c.`status` = 1\r\n\tLEFT JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_wms_batch_info b ON a.batch_code = b.batch_code \r\n\tAND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\tAND b.`status` = 1 \r\n\tAND c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade \r\n\tAND c.spec = b.spec \r\n\tAND c.surface = b.surface \r\n\tAND c.grade = b.grade \r\n\tAND c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.dim_mes_hmes_sys_attr_value d ON c.steel_grade = d.attr_value \r\n\tAND attr_id = '1013' \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_code,\r\n\ta.manuf_line_name,\r\n\ta.data_date;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tb.attribute1 type,\r\n\t\tSUM( weight )/ 1000 AS weight,\r\n\t\twork_data_date data_date \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.dwd_mes_hmes_wms_wh_enter_item a\r\n\t\tJOIN dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id \r\n\t\tAND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE' \r\n\t\tand (case when  b.attribute2 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.wh_code = b.attribute2 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute5 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.dept_code = b.attribute5 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute3 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.steel_grade = b.attribute3 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute4 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.sku_code = b.attribute4 END  )\r\n\tand (case when  b.attribute6 ='*' THEN 1=1 ELSE a.machine_code = b.attribute6 END  ) \r\n\tWHERE\r\n\t\tverify_status = '2' \r\n\tGROUP BY\r\n\t\ta.tenant_id,\r\n\t\tb.attribute1,\r\n\t\twork_data_date \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_name = source.type \r\n\tSET target.manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.weight;\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 AS target\r\nINNER JOIN (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\t\ttenant_id,\r\n\t\tmanuf_line_code,\r\n\t\tmanuf_line_name,\r\n\t\tdata_date,\r\n\t\tSUM( weight ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_length ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\t\tSUM( lower_weight ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_lower_weight,\r\n\t\tSUM( manufacturing_finished_output_tons ) OVER ( PARTITION BY tenant_id, manuf_line_code, DATE_FORMAT( data_date, '%Y-%m' ) ORDER BY data_date ) AS month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons \r\n\tFROM\r\n\t\tdw_ads_prd.bi_sc_xl_013 \r\n\t) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id \r\n\tAND target.manuf_line_code = source.manuf_line_code \r\n\tAND target.data_date = source.data_date \r\n\tSET target.month_weight = source.month_weight,\r\n\ttarget.month_lower_weight = source.month_lower_weight,\r\n\ttarget.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length = source.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n\ttarget.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:4030:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'ads_gx_xs_23_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8)\nSELECT sc.tenant_id,\n       'ads_gx_xs_23_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n       sc.contract_code,\n       scd.sku_code                      sku_code,\n       ods_sku.sku_name                  sku_name,\n       sc.contract_month,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_remain / 1000\n                     WHEN scd.unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_remain\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy\nFROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku ods_sku ON scd.sku_code = ods_sku.sku_code\n    AND ods_sku.STATUS = '1'\n         JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON ods_sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n    AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'\n\nWHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n  AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\nGROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n         sc.contract_code,\n         scd.sku_code,\n         ods_sku.sku_name,\n         sc.contract_month\n;\n\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_23\nwhere sync_data_date = current_date\n  and hour = hour(now())\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_23 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, sku_code, sku_name, quantity, rk, rk1,\n                          sync_time, is_newest)\nSELECT aa.sync_data_date,\n       a.HOUR,\n       aa.tenant_id,\n       aa.sku_code,\n       aa.sku_name,\n       SUM(a.quantity) quantity,\n       1               rk,\n       1               rk1,\n       a.sync_time,\n       a.is_newest\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                          sync_data_date,\n                      a.tenant_id,\n                      a.sku_code,\n                      a.sku_name\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_23_detail a\n\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.sync_data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 60 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE,\n                      tenant_id,\n                      attribute2,\n                      attribute3\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'ads_gx_xs_23_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_23_detail a ON aa.sku_code = a.sku_code\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\n    AND a.sync_data_date = aa.sync_data_date\n    AND a.HOUR = 18\nGROUP BY aa.sync_data_date,\n         a.HOUR,\n         aa.tenant_id,\n         aa.sku_code,\n         a.sync_time,\n         a.is_newest\nUNION ALL\nSELECT sync_data_date,\n       HOUR,\n       tenant_id,\n       'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī' AS     sku_code,\n       'µĆ╗Ķ«Ī'        sku_name,\n       SUM(quantity) quantity,\n\n       2             rk,\n       1             rk1,\n       sync_time,\n       is_newest\nFROM ads_gx_xs_23_detail\nWHERE sync_data_date = CURRENT_DATE\n  AND HOUR = 18\nGROUP BY sync_data_date,\n         HOUR,\n         tenant_id,\n         sync_time,\n         is_newest;\n\n\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_23 AS t\n    JOIN (SELECT tenant_id, attribute2 sku_code, sum(attribute8) quantity\n          FROM with_attr_value\n          WHERE scene = 'ads_gx_xs_23_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL'\n          GROUP BY attribute2, tenant_id) AS src ON t.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND t.sku_code = src.sku_code\nSET t.wjl = src.quantity\nWHERE t.sync_data_date = CURRENT_DATE;\n\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_23 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (SELECT tenant"

hour =hour(now())\n;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_23_detail\nWITH tmp_ads_gx_xs_23_detail AS (SELECT cs.stock_inst_id,\n                                        SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2)                     AS top_cat_code,\n                                        SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4)                     AS mid_cat_code,\n                                        SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6)                     AS leaf_cat_code,\n                                        cs.sku_code,\n                                        ods_sku.sku_name,\n                                        cs.wh_code,\n                                        ww.wh_name,\n                                        ww.wh_class,\n                                        bi.steel_grade,\n                                        bi.spec,\n                                        bi.surface,\n                                        bi.grade,\n                                        cs.batch_code,\n                                        cs.quantity,\n                                        cs.num,\n                                        cs.out_quantity,\n                                        cs.out_num,\n          cs.trans_in_num,\n                                        cs.trans_out_quantity,\n                                        cs.trans_out_num,\n                                        cs.plan_quantity,\n                                        cs.plan_num,\n                                        cs.disable_quantity,\n                                        cs.disable_num,\n                                        cs.ava_quantity,\n                                        cs.ava_num,\n                                        cs.m_date,\n                                        cs.exp_date,\n                                        cs.STATUS,\n                                        cs.created_by,\n                                        cs.created_time,\n                                        cs.modified_by,\n                                        cs.modified_time,\n                                        cs.tenant_id,\n                                        cs.lock_quantity,\n                                        cs.lock_num,\n                                        cs.log_id,\n                                        cs.stock_status,\n                                        cs.unique_code,\n                                        cs.last_enter_date,\n                                        bi.weight,\n                                        bi.producer,\n                                        bi.act_height,\n                                        bi.act_width,\n                                        bi.tax_amount,\n                                        bi.amount,\n                                        bi.make_order_num,\n                                        bi.next_machine_code,\n                                        bi.project_number,\n\n                                        CASE\n                                            WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)\n                                            ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))\n                                            END                                          AS data_date,\n                                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n                                        cs.r_modified_time\n                                 FROM with_attr_value a\n                                          join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n                                               ON a.ATTRIBUTE1 = cs.WH_CODE\n                                                   AND a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:4081:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_17_detail;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_17_detail\nSELECT sdod.sales_delivery_order_code,\n       sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_code,\n       sdod.sales_order_code,\n       sdod.sales_order_detail_code,\n       sdod.tenant_Id,\n       sdo.cust_abbr,\n       sdod.sku_name,\n       sdod.batch_code,\n       sdo.created_time,\n       sdod.prod_spec3                                steel_standart,\n       sdod.weight,\n       ifnull(srd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0) return_quantity,\n       sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state,\n       CASE\n\n           WHEN av.attribute1 IS NOT NULL THEN\n               DATE(av.attribute1)\n           ELSE DATE(sdod.created_time)\n           END                                        data_date,\n       CASE\n\n           WHEN av.attribute1 IS NOT NULL THEN\n               substr(av.attribute1, 1, 7)\n           ELSE substr(sdod.created_time, 1, 7)\n           END                                        MONTH\nFROM ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod\n              ON sdo.sales_delivery_order_code = sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                  AND sdod.STATUS = 1\n         LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av\n                   ON ((av.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sales_delivery_order_code = av.attribute4)\n                       AND (av.attribute2 = '*' OR sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_code = av.attribute2)\n                       AND av.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_detail'\n                       )\n         JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON sdod.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n    AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'\n         LEFT JOIN ods_crm_sv_return_detail srd ON sdod.sales_order_detail_code = srd.sales_order_detail_code\n    AND sdod.batch_code = srd.batch_code\n    AND sdod.prod_spec3 = srd.prod_spec3\nWHERE sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50', '20', '30')\n  AND sdo.STATUS = 1\n;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_write.json:4:    "task_name": "╣ĶĖų▒Ē├µ╩¶ąį(dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info)",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/surface_info_write.json:10:    "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info (surface, surface_thickness, surface_number, surface_middle_part)\r\nSELECT DISTINCT\r\n    attr_value AS surface,\r\n    REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) AS surface_thickness,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN LOCATE('QW', attr_value) > 0 THEN 'QW'\r\n        ELSE REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 2)\r\n        END AS surface_number,\r\n    TRIM(\r\n            REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[^0-9]+', REGEXP_INSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]') + 1, 1)\r\n    ) AS surface_middle_part\r\nFROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value\r\nWHERE attr_id = '1015'\r\n  AND REGEXP_SUBSTR(attr_value, '[0-9]+', 1, 1) REGEXP '^[0-9]+$'\r\n  AND STATUS = 1\r\nHAVING surface_number IS NOT NULL;\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code\r\n    END,\r\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '╬▐╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'ą┬─▄į┤╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name\r\n        END;\r\n\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET silicon_steel_product_category_code = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN 'WQX'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'XNY'\r\n                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%' THEN 'QX'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_code\r\n    END,\r\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name = CASE\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) IN ('G', 'Q') THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 1) = 'W' THEN '╬▐╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN LEFT(surface_middle_part, 2) = 'AV' THEN 'ą┬─▄į┤╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              WHEN surface_middle_part IS NULL AND surface_number LIKE '%W%'\r\n                                                  THEN '╚ĪŽ“╣ĶĖų│╔ŲĘ'\r\n                                              ELSE silicon_steel_product_category_name\r\n        END;\r\nUPDATE dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info\r\nSET attr1 =\r\n        CASE\r\n            WHEN surface_middle_part LIKE '%K%' THEN '┐╠║█'\r\n            ELSE 'ĘŪ┐╠║█'\r\n            END\r\nWHERE silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX';\r\nCOMMIT;\r\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/dim_ums_tenant_read.json:20:    "sql_preview": "update dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item\nset tax_price =  price * 1.13\nwhere tax_price = 0\n  and price <> 0\n  and tenant_id in (99, 101) ;\nDELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_26_01;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_26_01\nWITH\n    sales_detail AS (\n        SELECT\n            a.invoice_bill_code,\n            b.detailed_num,\n            a.plant_code AS tenant_code,\n            a.invoice_bill_state,\n            a.cus_code,\n            a.salesman,\n            ut.tenant_id,\n            ut.tenant_name,\n            CASE\n                WHEN (w.original_batch_code IS NULL or  w.original_batch_code = '') THEN b.batch_num\n                ELSE w.original_batch_code\n                END AS original_batch_code,\n            b.batch_num AS batch_code,\n            b.producer,\n            b.quantity,\n            b.steel_type,\n            a.creation_date,\n            a.approver_date AS approver_datetime,\n            DATE(a.approver_date) AS approver_date,\n            b.steel_standart,\n            a.internal_type,\n            b.surface,\n            b.tax_price,\n            b.local_tax_price,\n            b.amount_including_tax,\n            b.local_tax_amount,\n            b.local_amount,\n            b.pricing_type,\n            CASE\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 10 THEN '░┤╩²┴┐╝Ų╝█'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 20 THEN '░┤└Ēųž╝Ų╝█'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 30 THEN '░┤░§ųž╝Ų╝█'\n                END AS pricing_type_desc,\n            b.lilun_weigth_kg,\n            b.weigth_kg,\n            b.delivery_method,\n            b.shipping_address,\n            b.stock_code AS sku_code,\n            b.stock_name AS sku_name,\n            b.unit,\n            a.warehouse,\n            b.contract_code,\n            b.remarks,\n            b.currency\n        FROM ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill a\n                 JOIN ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill_detailed b\n                      ON a.invoice_bill_code = b.invoice_bill_code\n                          AND b.state = 70\n                 LEFT JOIN dim_ums_tenant ut\n                           ON a.plant_code = ut.tenant_code\n                               AND ut.status = 1\n                 LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info w\n                           ON b.batch_num = w.batch_code\n                               AND b.stock_code = w.sku_code\n                               AND b.grade = w.grade\n                               AND b.steel_standart = w.spec\n                               AND b.steel_type = w.steel_grade\n                               AND b.surface = w.surface\n                               AND w.status = 1\n                               AND w.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id\n        WHERE a.plant_code IN ('0110000', '30110000')\n          AND a.creation_date >= '2026-01-01'\n          AND a.invoice_bill_state = 70\n    ),\n    batch_list AS (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            tenant_id,\n            original_batch_code\n        FROM sales_detail\n        WHERE original_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n    ),\n    enter_item AS (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            batch_code,\n            wh_name,\n            tax_amount,\n            tax_price,\n            enter_date,\n            created_time\n        FROM (\n                 SELECT\n                     e.tenant_id,\n                     e.batch_code,\n                     e.wh_name,\n                     e.tax_amount,\n                     CASE\n                         WHEN e.pricing_type = 10 THEN e.tax_amount / NULLIF(e.weight, 0)\n                         ELSE e.tax_price\n                         END AS tax_price,\n                     e.enter_date,\n                     e.created_time,\n                     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n                         PARTITION BY e.tenant_id, e.batch_code\n                         ORDER BY e.created_time ASC\n                         ) AS rn\n                 FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item e\n             ) x\n        WHERE rn = 1\n    ),\n    calc AS (\n        SELECT\n            a.*,\n            b.tax_price AS enter_tax_price,\n            b.enter_date,\n            mp.unit_price AS materi"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/dim_ums_tenant_read.json:40:    "sql_preview": "DELETE from  dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item;\r\n\r\n-- ▓Õ╚ļ▓┘ū„▒Ż│ų▓╗▒õ\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_9901_mes_wms_wh_output_item\r\nSELECT\r\n    o.dept_code,\r\n    sd.dept_name,\r\n    IFNULL(av.attribute2, '╬▐') dept_class,\r\n    sku.finance_type cw_sku,\r\n    CASE WHEN av2.attribute1 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_scsku,\r\n    o.bred_vouch,\r\n    o.output_code,\r\n    o.output_date,\r\n    o.verify_status,\r\n    o.checked_by,\r\n    o.checked_time,\r\n    o.note AS output_note,\r\n    o.bill_type,\r\n    o.rd_flag,\r\n    o.rd_style,\r\n    o.source,\r\n    o.u8_output_code,\r\n    o.ven_code,\r\n    o.print_times,\r\n    oi.output_item_id,\r\n    oi.output_id,\r\n    pc.cat_code,\r\n    pc.cat_name,\r\n    pcc.cat_code AS top_cat_code,\r\n    pcc.cat_name AS top_cat_name,\r\n    oi.sku_code,\r\n    sku.model,\r\n    oi.unit,\r\n    oi.batch_code,\r\n    oi.steel_grade,\r\n    oi.spec,\r\n    oi.surface,\r\n    oi.grade,\r\n    oi.quantity,\r\n    oi.unit_price,\r\n    oi.amount,\r\n    oi.note,\r\n    oi.mo_code,\r\n    oi.free1,\r\n    oi.free2,\r\n    oi.free3,\r\n    oi.free4,\r\n    oi.free5,\r\n    oi.free6,\r\n    oi.free7,\r\n    oi.free8,\r\n    oi.free9,\r\n    oi.free10,\r\n    oi.bill_status,\r\n    oi.`status`,\r\n    oi.created_by,\r\n    oi.created_time,\r\n    oi.modified_by,\r\n    oi.modified_time,\r\n    oi.tenant_id,\r\n    oi.row_ver,\r\n    oi.row_no,\r\n    oi.u8_output_item_id,\r\n    oi.producer,\r\n    oi.act_height,\r\n    oi.act_width,\r\n    oi.coating,\r\n    oi.gross_weight,\r\n    oi.py_wh_code,\r\n    oi.wh_pos_code,\r\n    oi.equipment_code,\r\n    oi.project_code,\r\n    oi.r_modified_time,\r\n    oi.note AS item_note,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN (o.receiver IS NULL OR o.receiver = \"undefined\" OR o.receiver = '') THEN NULL\r\n        ELSE o.receiver\r\n        END AS receiver,\r\n    tenant.tenant_code,\r\n    tenant.tenant_name,\r\n    sku.sku_name,\r\n    sku.sku_desc,\r\n    sku.sku_type,\r\n    ww.wh_code,\r\n    ww.wh_name,\r\n    supp.supplier_name,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\r\n    DATE_FORMAT(o.created_time, '%Y') AS YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ods_mes_wms_wh_output o\r\n        INNER JOIN ods_mes_wms_wh_output_item oi ON o.output_id = oi.output_id AND oi.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku sku ON oi.sku_code = sku.sku_code AND sku.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN dim_ums_tenant tenant ON o.tenant_id = tenant.tenant_id AND tenant.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww ON ww.wh_code = o.wh_code AND ww.tenant_id = o.tenant_id AND ww.STATUS = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_sys_department sd ON o.dept_code = sd.dept_code AND o.tenant_id = sd.tenant_id AND sd.`status` = '1'\r\n        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av ON o.tenant_id = av.tenant_id AND o.dept_code = av.attribute1 AND av.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_DEPT'\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value av1 ON o.tenant_id = av1.tenant_id AND o.wh_code = av1.attribute1 AND av1.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_WH'\r\n        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value av2 ON o.tenant_id = av2.tenant_id AND oi.sku_code = av2.attribute1 AND av2.scene = 'BI_SC_KC_009_SCSKU'\r\n        LEFT JOIN ods_mes_sys_supplier supp ON o.ven_code = supp.supplier_code AND supp.`status` = 1\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pc ON sku.cat_id = pc.cat_id AND pc.`status` = '1'\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_pm_cat pcc ON pc.parent_id = pcc.cat_id AND pcc.`status` = '1'\r\nWHERE\r\n    o.STATUS = 1\r\n  AND o.bill_type = '2' ;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/ods_mes_ums_tenant_read.json:10:    "sql_preview": "DELETE FROM dwd_mes_mm_order_raw_component;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_order_raw_component (\r\n    id, heat_no, ferroboron, pure_iron, metallic_silicon,\r\n    machine_code, tenant_name, order_item_code, status,\r\n    created_by, created_time, modified_by, modified_time,\r\n    ferroboron_sku_code, pure_iron_sku_code, metallic_silicon_sku_code,\r\n    output_generate_state, molten_steel_bacth_code, waste_code,\r\n    molten_steel, waste\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    morc.id,\r\n    morc.heat_no,\r\n    morc.ferroboron,\r\n    morc.pure_iron,\r\n    morc.metallic_silicon,\r\n    morc.machine_code,\r\n    mut.tenant_name AS tenant_name,\r\n    morc.order_item_code,\r\n    morc.status,\r\n    morc.created_by,\r\n    morc.created_time,\r\n    morc.modified_by,\r\n    morc.modified_time,\r\n    morc.ferroboron_sku_code,\r\n    morc.pure_iron_sku_code,\r\n    morc.metallic_silicon_sku_code,\r\n    morc.output_generate_state,\r\n    morc.molten_steel_bacth_code,\r\n    morc.waste_code,\r\n    morc.molten_steel,\r\n    morc.waste\r\nFROM ods_mes_mm_order_raw_component AS morc\r\n          JOIN ods_mes_ums_tenant AS mut ON mut.tenant_id = morc.tenant_id and mut.status = 1\r\nWHERE morc.status = 1;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:687:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue;\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue (id, modified_time) SELECT DISTINCT\r\n                                                                              a.id,\r\n                                                                              NOW()\r\nFROM\r\n    ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id\r\nWHERE\r\n    b.r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n  AND b.r_modified_time <= NOW() UNION SELECT id, NOW() FROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output WHERE r_modified_time >= (SELECT last_updated FROM dwd_update_tracker WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output')\r\n                                                                                            AND r_modified_time <= NOW();\r\nUPDATE dwd_update_tracker\r\nSET last_updated = NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR\r\nWHERE\r\n    table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';\r\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output (\r\n    id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    batch_code,\r\n    actual_id,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    surface,\r\n    grade,\r\n    inner_grade,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    roll_length,\r\n    group_id,\r\n    group_name,\r\n    group_leader,\r\n    cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    date_time,\r\n    start_time,\r\n    end_time,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    rate             ,\r\n    rate_unit     ,\r\n    rate_type        ,\r\n    theory_use_time,\r\n    actual_use_time,\r\n    send_happened,\r\n    is_ignore,\r\n    manuf_line_code,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    sku_type,\r\n    r_modified_time,r_modified_date,\r\n    is_retention,is_baf, proce_note ,\r\n    flaw_describe,\r\n    split_in_weight,\r\n    yield_rate,next_machine_code ,\r\n    next_sku_code ) SELECT\r\n                        a.id,\r\n                        b.sku_code,\r\n                        sku.sku_name,\r\n                        b.batch_code,\r\n                        b.actual_id,\r\n                        b.steel_grade,\r\n                        b.spec,\r\n                        b.surface,\r\n                        b.grade,\r\n                        b.inner_grade,\r\n                        a.weight,\r\n                        a.quantity,\r\n                        a.meter_num AS roll_length,\r\n                        a.group_id AS group_id,\r\n                        a.group_code AS group_name,\r\n                        mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\r\n                        IFNULL(\r\n                                (\r\n                                    SELECT\r\n                                        d.cat_name\r\n                                    FROM\r\n                                        ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\r\n                                            JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\r\n                                    WHERE\r\n                                        c.sku_code = b.sku_code\r\n                                      AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\r\n                                      AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\r\n                                    LIMIT 1),\r\n                                'ÕģČÕ«ā') AS cat_name,\r\n                        (SELECT attr_value4 FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND STATUS = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\r\n                        a.end_time AS date_time,\r\n                        a.start_time,\r\n                        a.end_time,\r\n                        CASE\r\n\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id = 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY\r\n                            WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80\r\n                                AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN\r\n                                date(a.end_time) -  INTERVAL 1 DAY ELSE date(a.end_t"

ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003  where data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day\r\n;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT\r\n                                         a.tenant_id,\r\n                                         a.plate_type,\r\n                                         a.surface,\r\n                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\r\n                                         a.steel_grade_series,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,\r\n                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä') )or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,\r\n                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         DATE_FORMAT( a.data_date, '%Y-%m' ) MONTH,\r\n                                         YEAR ( a.data_date ) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\r\nWHERE a.plate_type is not null\r\n  and  a.defined_manuf_line_name  is not null\r\n  and a.batch_code is not null\r\n  and a.batch_code <> '' and a.is_ignore=0\r\n  AND tenant_id IN('80','92')\r\n  AND a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 day\r\n\r\n\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1  ,\r\n    a.steel_grade_series,\r\n    bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate ,\r\n    a.plate_type\r\n;\r\n\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_p1_003    SELECT\r\n                                         a.tenant_id,\r\n                                         a.plate_type,\r\n                                         a.surface,a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,\r\n                                         a.steel_grade_series,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name group_manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\r\n                                         bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_dataDate  data_date,\r\n                                         sum( a.weight )/ 1000 weight,\r\n                                         sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R')  or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.weight END )/ 1000 lower_weight,\r\n                                         sum(CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD' or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.quantity END )/ 1000 lower_quantity,\r\n                                         sum( a.roll_length ) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                                         sum( CASE WHEN a.grade in ('A','R') or a.batch_code like '%-RD'  or (a.tenant_id= '79' and a.defined_manuf_line_name in ('ķŻ×Õē¬õĖĆń╗ä','Õ╣│µØ┐õĖĆń╗ä')) or is_retention = 1 THEN 0   ELSE a.roll_length END ) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                     "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:794:        "ads_sc_xl_13_prod_gg_003",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:795:        "with_result_confirm",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:797:        "with_attr_value"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:799:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003  SELECT\n                                                                         a.tenant_id,\n                                                                         a.plate_type,\n                                                                         a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\n                                                                         a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                         CASE\n                                                                             WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN\n                                                                                 0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)\n                                                                             END average_thickness,\n                                                                         a.data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n        JOIN dwd_task_prod_actual c\n             ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\n                 and  a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                 AND c.status = 1\n                 AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\nWHERE\n    a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\n  AND a.plate_type IS NOT NULL\n  AND a.manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,\n    a.data_date;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_avg_thick_003 AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END\nSET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 SELECT\n                                                                             a.tenant_id,\n                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                             a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 35 DAY)\n  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.data_date,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_def_line_combined_003 AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_out_lz_003 AS source ON t"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:813:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_001_01"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:861:      "sql_preview": "SET @start_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY, '%Y-%m');\n\nTRUNCATE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 (\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    attr1,\n    `MONTH`,\n    data_date,\n    month_weight,\n    month_quantity,\n    month_average_thickness,\n    month_lower_weight,\n    month_lower_quantity,\n    month_breakdown_frequency,\n    month_planned_downtime,\n    month_unplanned_downtime,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity\n)\nSELECT\n    tenant_id,\n    plate_type,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    attr1,\n    month,\n    data_date,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_weight, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    AVG(COALESCE(day_average_thickness, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_weight, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_breakdown_frequency, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_planned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_unplanned_downtime, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(day_manufacturing_finished_product, 0)) OVER w,\n    SUM(COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity, '') AS DECIMAL(40,4)), 0)) OVER w\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined\nWHERE month >= @start_month\nWINDOW w AS (\n    PARTITION BY tenant_id, plate_type, manuf_line_name, attr1, month\n    ORDER BY data_date\n    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW\n);\n\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nINNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1 AS monthly\n    ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id\n    AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type\n    AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name\n    AND target.attr1 <=> monthly.attr1\n    AND target.month = monthly.`MONTH`\n    AND target.data_date = monthly.data_date\nSET\n    target.month_weight = monthly.month_weight,\n    target.month_quantity = monthly.month_quantity,\n    target.month_average_thickness = monthly.month_average_thickness,\n    target.month_lower_weight = monthly.month_lower_weight,\n    target.month_lower_quantity = monthly.month_lower_quantity,\n    target.month_breakdown_frequency = monthly.month_breakdown_frequency,\n    target.month_planned_downtime = monthly.month_planned_downtime,\n    target.month_unplanned_downtime = monthly.month_unplanned_downtime,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    target.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length = monthly.month_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = monthly.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity\nWHERE target.month >= @start_month;\n\nANALYZE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined;\nANALYZE TABLE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined_process1;\n"

dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail ;\r\ninsert into dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail (\r\n    contract_head_id,\r\n    vendor_name,\r\n    contract_code,\r\n    vendor_contract_code,\r\n    include_tax_amount,\r\n    contract_quantity,\r\n    payment_period,\r\n\t\tpayment_period_sort_order_desc,\r\n    planned_payment_date,\r\n    payment_stage,\r\n    stage_payment_amount,\r\n    payment_ratio,\r\n    sync_time,\r\n    rk\r\n)\r\nselect\r\n    a.contract_head_id,\r\n    b.vendor_name,\r\n    b.contract_code,\r\n    b.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    b.include_tax_amount/10000,\r\n    c.contract_quantity,\r\n    a.payment_period,\r\n\t\trow_number() over ( partition by vendor_contract_code order by payment_period desc ) as payment_period_sort_order_desc ,\r\n    a.planned_payment_date,\r\n    case\r\n        when a.payment_stage = 'advance_charge' then 'ķóäõ╗śµ¼Š' \r\n        when a.payment_stage = 'deliver' then 'ÕÅæĶ┤¦µ¼Š' \r\n    end payment_stage,\r\n    a.stage_payment_amount/10000,\r\n    a.payment_ratio,\r\n    now() sync_time,\r\n    1 rk\r\nfrom\r\n    dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_pay_plan a\r\njoin dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head b \r\n    on a.contract_head_id = b.contract_head_id\r\n    and b.created_by = '2307135' \r\n    and (b.contract_status = 'archived' or b.contract_status = 'approved') \r\n    and b.bu_code = '0070000'\r\n\t\tand year(b.START_DATE) >=2025\r\njoin (\r\n    select contract_head_id, sum(contract_quantity) / 1000 contract_quantity \r\n    from dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material \r\n    group by contract_head_id\r\n) c on a.contract_head_id = c.contract_head_id;\r\nupdate dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail as target\r\ninner join (\r\n\tselect\r\n\t\tsource_number contract_code,\r\n\t\tadvance_amount / 10000 advance_amount,\r\n\t\tdate(creation_date) apply_date,\r\n\t\tdate(transaction_date) transaction_date ,\r\n\t\trow_number() over ( partition by source_number order by creation_date desc ) as sort_order \r\n\tfrom\r\n\t\tdw_ods_prd.ods_srm_ps_advance_apply \r\n\twhere\r\n\t\t payment_status = 1 \r\n\t\tand advance_type = 'contract' \r\n\t) as source on target.contract_code = source.contract_code \r\n\tand target.payment_period_sort_order_desc  = source.sort_order \r\n\r\n\tset target.advance_amount = source.advance_amount,\r\n\ttarget.apply_date = source.apply_date,\r\n\ttarget.transaction_date = source.transaction_date;\r\n\r\ninsert into dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail (\r\n    contract_head_id,\r\n    vendor_name,\r\n    contract_code,\r\n    vendor_contract_code,\r\n    include_tax_amount,\r\n    contract_quantity,\r\n    payment_period,\r\n    planned_payment_date,\r\n    payment_stage,\r\n    stage_payment_amount,\r\n    payment_ratio,\r\n\t\tadvance_amount,\r\n    sync_time,\r\n    rk,is_fp_complete,is_fk_complete\r\n)\r\nselect \r\n    contract_head_id, \r\n    vendor_name, \r\n    contract_code, \r\n    vendor_contract_code, \r\n    max(include_tax_amount) include_tax_amount, \r\n    max(contract_quantity) contract_quantity, \r\n    '' payment_period, \r\n    'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' planned_payment_date, \r\n    '' payment_stage, \r\n    sum(stage_payment_amount) stage_payment_amount, \r\n    sum(payment_ratio) payment_ratio, \r\n\t\tsum(advance_amount) ,\r\n    max(sync_time) sync_time,\r\n    2 rk,'ÕÉ”' is_fp_complete, 'ÕÉ”' is_fk_complete\r\nfrom\r\n    dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail\r\ngroup by \r\n    contract_head_id, \r\n    vendor_name, \r\n    contract_code, \r\n    vendor_contract_code;\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\n\t\t\r\nUPDATE dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value AS target\r\nINNER JOIN ( SELECT vendor_contract_code, advance_amount FROM dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail WHERE planned_payment_date = 'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' ) AS source ON target.attribute4 = source.vendor_contract_code \r\nSET target.attribute5 = source.advance_amount \r\nWHERE\r\n\tscene = 'BI-GX-CG-005-DETAIL-ALLOCATION-OF-CONTRACT-AMOUNT';\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\t\r\n\tupdate dw_ads_prd.bi_gx_cg_005_detail as target\r\ninner join (\r\n\tSELECT\r\n\tattribute2 vendor_contract_code,\r\n\tsum(attribute3) allocation_of_contract_amount \r\nFROM\r\n\tdw_ads_prd.with_attr_value \r\nWHERE\r\n\tscene = 'bi-gx-cg-005-detail-allocation-of-contract-amount' \r\nGROUP BY\r\n\tattribute2\r\n\t) as source on target.vendor_contract_code = source.vendor_contract_code \r\n\tset target.allocati"

              a.type,\r\n                                    a.vendor_name,\r\n                                    a.spec,\r\n                                    a.surface,\r\n                                    a.contract_quantity,\r\n                                    a.quantity,\r\n                                    a.diff_quantity,\r\n                                    a.rate,\r\n                                    a.list_order,\r\n                                    a.is_completion,\r\n                                    1 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP' UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    'Õ░ÅĶ«Ī' TEXTURE,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    '' spec,\r\n    '' surface,\r\n    sum( a.contract_quantity ) contract_quantity,\r\n    sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n    sum( a.diff_quantity ) diff_quantity,\r\n    CASE\r\n\r\n        WHEN sum( a.contract_quantity ) = 0 THEN\r\n            0 ELSE sum( a.quantity ) / sum( a.contract_quantity )\r\n        END rate,\r\n    a.list_order,\r\n    a.is_completion,\r\n    2 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.vendor_contract_code,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    a.list_order UNION ALL\r\nSELECT\r\n    'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' vendor_contract_code,\r\n    'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' TEXTURE,\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    '' spec,\r\n    '' surface,\r\n    sum( a.contract_quantity ) contract_quantity,\r\n    sum( a.quantity ) quantity,\r\n    sum( a.diff_quantity ) diff_quantity,\r\n    CASE\r\n\r\n        WHEN sum( a.contract_quantity ) = 0 THEN\r\n            0 ELSE sum( a.quantity ) / sum( a.contract_quantity )\r\n        END rate,\r\n    a.list_order,\r\n    a.is_completion,\r\n    3 rk\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_gx_cg_07_detail a\r\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.vendor_contract_code = b.attribute1\r\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-GX-CG-004-DETAIL-IMP'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.type,\r\n    a.vendor_name,\r\n    a.list_order;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1075:        "dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1079:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material \nSET line_remark = REPLACE(line_remark, ' ', '') \nWHERE line_remark LIKE '% %';\nUPDATE  dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head\nset vendor_contract_code = REPLACE(vendor_contract_code, ' ', '') \nWHERE vendor_contract_code LIKE '% %';\nDELETE FROM DW_ADS_PRD.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK;\n\n-- ń¼¼1µ«Ą INSERT\nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK \nSELECT\n\n   b.vendor_contract_code,\n    TEXTURE                                                  AS line_remark,\n  case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É'   end        AS type,\n    b.vendor_name                                        AS vendor_name,\n    a.dimension                                          AS spec,\n    a.surface                                            AS surface,\n    SUM(a.quantity_ton)                                  AS contract_quantity,\n    COALESCE(c.quantity,0)                               AS quantity,\n    SUM(a.quantity_ton) - COALESCE(c.quantity,0)         AS diff_quantity,\n    COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0)             AS rate,\n    CASE WHEN COALESCE(ROUND(c.quantity / NULLIF(SUM(a.quantity_ton),0),2),0) >= 0.95 \n         THEN 'µś»' ELSE 'ÕÉ”' END                        AS is_completion,\n    0                                      AS list_order,\n    1                                                    AS rk,\n    1                                                    AS rk1,\n    CURRENT_DATE                                         AS data_date,\n    NOW()                                                AS sync_time\nFROM dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_material a\nJOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_srm_scc_contract_head b \n  ON a.contract_head_id = b.contract_head_id\nLEFT JOIN (\n    SELECT\n       replace(pa_item.pur_contract_code,' ','')  pur_contract_code,\n        pa_item.spec,\n        pa_item.surface,\n        SUM(pa_item.quantity/1000) AS quantity\n    FROM dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival   pa\n    JOIN dw_ods_prd.ods_mes_hmes_pu_purchase_arrival_item pa_item\n      ON pa.arrival_id = pa_item.arrival_id\n     AND pa_item.status = 1\n    WHERE pa.status = 1\n      AND pa.tenant_id = 92\n    GROUP BY pa_item.pur_contract_code, pa_item.spec, pa_item.surface\n) c \n  ON b.vendor_contract_code = replace(c.pur_contract_code,' ','')\n AND a.dimension = c.spec\n AND a.surface = c.surface\n\nWHERE b.contract_class = '14'\n  AND b.contract_status IN ('archived','approved')\n  AND a.dimension <> ''\n \tand b.bu_code = '0070000'\n\tand b.vendor_contract_code <> '' \n\tand b.vendor_contract_code is not null \n\tand a.STEEL_TYPE   in ('QX','WQX')\n\tAND year(a.CREATION_DATE) >= 2025\n\t\n  AND b.vendor_contract_code NOT IN (\n      SELECT attribute1 \n      FROM dw_ads_prd.with_attr_value \n      WHERE scene = 'BI-GX-CG-003-DETAIL-PC'\n  )\nGROUP BY \n    b.vendor_contract_code,\n    TEXTURE,\n    case when a.STEEL_TYPE='QX' then 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE <> 'W250' then ' µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'  when a.STEEL_TYPE='WQX' and a.SURFACE = 'W250' then 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É'   end,\n    b.vendor_name,\n    a.dimension,\n    a.surface,\n    c.quantity;\n\n-- ń¼¼2µ«Ą INSERT’╝łÕ¤║õ║Ä created_by=''2307135'' õĖö dimension=''’╝ē \nINSERT INTO dw_ads_prd.BI_GX_CG_003_DETAIL_BAK\nSELECT\n     sub.vendor_contract_code,\n    sub.line_remark                               AS line_remark,\n    sub.type                                      AS type,\n    sub.vendor_name                               AS vendor_name,\n    sub.spec                                      AS spec,\n    sub.surface                                   AS surface,\n    MAX(sub.contract_quantity)                    AS contract_quantity,\n    SUM(sub.quantity)                             AS quantity,\n    MAX(sub.contract_quantity) - SUM(sub.quantity) AS diff_quantity,\n    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(sub.quantity) / NULLIF(MAX(sub.contract_quantity),0),2),0) AS rate,\n    sub.is_completion                             AS is_completion,\n   "
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1117:        "ods_mes_sys_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1120:        "with_attr_value"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1122:      "sql_preview": "START TRANSACTION;\nUPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual\nset lower_amount = 0 where lower_amount <> 0  ;\n\nUPDATE dwd_task_prod_actual a\n    LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT a1.attr_value             AS steel_grade,\n                               c.attribute2              AS grade,\n                               COALESCE(c.attribute3, 0) AS lower_amount\n               FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value a1\n                        LEFT JOIN with_attr_value c\n                                  ON a1.attr_value4 = c.ATTRIBUTE1\n                                      AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-003-LOWER-AMOUNT'\n               WHERE a1.attr_id = 1013\n                 AND a1.status = 1) rule\n    ON rule.steel_grade = a.steel_grade\n        AND rule.grade = a.grade\n    join (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code\n          FROM (SELECT tenant_id, batch_code\n                FROM ads_quality_machine_detail\n                where inner_grade not in ('A1', 'A2')\n                UNION ALL\n                SELECT a.tenant_id, a.batch_code\n                FROM dwd_task_prod_actual a\n                         join ads_quality_machine_detail b on a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                    and a.in_batch_code = b.batch_code\n                    AND b.disposal_method = '30'\n                    AND b.inner_grade not in\n                        ('A1', 'A2')) t) t on a.batch_code = t.batch_code and a.tenant_id = t.tenant_id\nSET a.lower_amount =\n        CASE\n            WHEN  a.inner_grade  = 'A3' THEN\n                a.net_weight / 1000 *\n                CASE\n                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = 'Ķ┐öõ┐«' THEN 80\n                    WHEN a.disposal_method_name = 'µö╣ĶŻģ/µö╣ĶĮ¦' THEN 300\n                    ELSE 100\n                    END\n            ELSE\n                CASE\n                    WHEN rule.lower_amount IS NULL THEN NULL\n                    ELSE a.net_weight / 1000 * rule.lower_amount\n                    END\n            END\n;\ntruncate table ads_quality_machine_detail;\ninsert into ads_quality_machine_detail (actual_id,\n                                        batch_code,\n                                        in_batch_code,\n                                        original_batch_code,\n                                        tenant_id,\n                                        tenant_name,\n                                        machine_code,\n                                        machine_name,\n                                        main_defect_name,\n                                        main_defect_desc,\n                                        main_defect_machine,\n                                        steel_grade,\n                                        steel_grade_type,\n                                        spec,\n                                        surface,\n                                        grade,\n                                        inner_grade,\n                                        main_defect_machine_name,\n                                        split_in_weight,\n                                        in_split_in_weight,\n                                        net_weight,\n                                        in_net_weight,\n                                        sku_code,\n                                        sku_name,\n                                        quality,\n                                        output_time,\n                                        data_date,\n                                        main_defect_code,\n                                        lower_amount,\n                                        producer,disposal_method,\n                                        disposal_method_name)\nselect a.actual_id,\n       a.batch_code,\n       a.in_batch_code,\n       a.original_batch_code,\n       a.tenant_id,\n       a.tenant_name,\n       a.machine_code,\n       a.machine_name,\n       a.main_defect_name,\n       a.main_defect_desc,\n       a.main_defect_machine,\n       a.steel_grade,\n       a.steel_grade_type,\n       a.spec,\n       a.surface,\n "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1229:      "sql_preview": "/* =========================================================\n   µ»ÅÕ░ÅµŚČµē¦ĶĪīĶäÜµ£¼’╝ÜÕłĘµ¢░ current + ĶĪźÕŁŚµ«Ą + ÕÄåÕÅ▓ńĢÖµĪŻ’╝łµŚźµ£¤+Õ░ÅµŚČ’╝ē\n   ========================================================= */\n\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\n/* =========================\n   1) ÕłĘµ¢░ current ĶĪ©\n   ========================= */\n\nDELETE FROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock;\n\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_wms_current_stock (\n    stock_inst_id,\n    top_cat_code,\n    mid_cat_code,\n    leaf_cat_code,\n    sku_code,\n    sku_name,\n    wh_code,\n    wh_name,\n    wh_class,\n    steel_grade,\n    spec,\n    surface,\n    grade,\n    batch_code,\n    quantity,\n    num,\n    out_quantity,\n    out_num,\n    in_quantity,\n    in_num,\n    trans_in_quantity,\n    trans_in_num,\n    trans_out_quantity,\n    trans_out_num,\n    plan_quantity,\n    plan_num,\n    disable_quantity,\n    disable_num,\n    ava_quantity,\n    ava_num,\n    m_date,\n    exp_date,\n    `status`,\n    created_by,\n    created_time,\n    modified_by,\n    modified_time,\n    tenant_id,\n    tenant_name,\n    lock_quantity,\n    lock_num,\n    log_id,\n    stock_status,\n    unique_code,\n    last_enter_date,\n    weight,\n    producer,\n    act_height,\n    act_width,\n    tax_amount,\n    amount,\n    make_order_num,\n    next_machine_code,\n    project_number,\n    sync_time,\n    data_date,\n    days,\n    r_modified_time,\n    iron_loss\n)\nWITH invalid_parent_batches AS (\n    SELECT DISTINCT parent_batch_code\n    FROM ods_mes_wms_batch_info\n    WHERE `status` = 1\n      AND parent_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n      AND batch_code <> parent_batch_code\n)\nSELECT\n    cs.stock_inst_id,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 2) AS top_cat_code,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 4) AS mid_cat_code,\n    SUBSTRING(cs.sku_code, 1, 6) AS leaf_cat_code,\n    cs.sku_code,\n    ods_sku.sku_name,\n    cs.wh_code,\n    ww.wh_name,\n    ww.wh_class,\n    cs.steel_grade,\n    cs.spec,\n    cs.surface,\n    cs.grade,\n    cs.batch_code,\n    cs.quantity,\n    cs.num,\n    cs.out_quantity,\n    cs.out_num,\n    cs.in_quantity,\n    cs.in_num,\n    cs.trans_in_quantity,\n    cs.trans_in_num,\n    cs.trans_out_quantity,\n    cs.trans_out_num,\n    cs.plan_quantity,\n    cs.plan_num,\n    cs.disable_quantity,\n    cs.disable_num,\n    cs.ava_quantity,\n    cs.ava_num,\n    cs.m_date,\n    cs.exp_date,\n    cs.`status`,\n    cs.created_by,\n    cs.created_time,\n    cs.modified_by,\n    cs.modified_time,\n    cs.tenant_id,\n    mt.tenant_name,\n    cs.lock_quantity,\n    cs.lock_num,\n    cs.log_id,\n    cs.stock_status,\n    cs.unique_code,\n    cs.last_enter_date,\n    cs.ava_quantity weight,\n    bi.producer,\n    bi.act_height,\n    bi.act_width,\n    bi.tax_amount,\n    bi.amount,\n    bi.make_order_num,\n    bi.next_machine_code,\n    bi.project_number,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    CASE\n        WHEN HOUR(cs.last_enter_date) >= 8 THEN DATE(cs.last_enter_date)\n        ELSE DATE(DATE_SUB(cs.last_enter_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY))\n        END AS data_date,\n    DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n    cs.r_modified_time,\n    bi.iron_loss\nFROM ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww\n              ON cs.wh_code = ww.wh_code\n                  AND cs.tenant_id = ww.tenant_id\n                  AND ww.`status` = '1'\n         JOIN ods_mes_pm_sku ods_sku\n              ON cs.sku_code = ods_sku.sku_code\n                  AND ods_sku.`status` = '1'\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi\n              ON cs.batch_code = bi.batch_code\n                  AND cs.sku_code = bi.sku_code\n                  AND cs.steel_grade = bi.steel_grade\n                  AND cs.surface = bi.surface\n                  AND cs.grade = bi.grade\n                  AND cs.spec = bi.spec\n                  AND cs.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id\n                  AND bi.`status` = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_mdm_tenant mt\n              ON cs.tenant_id = mt.tenant_id\n                  AND mt.`status` = '1'\n         LEFT JOIN invalid_parent_batches ipb\n                   ON cs.batch_code = ipb.parent_batch_code\nWHERE cs.quantity > 0\n  AND cs.ava_quantity > 0\n  AND cs.`status` = 1\n#   AND cs.te"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1277:      "sql_preview": "update dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item\nset tax_price =  price * 1.13\nwhere tax_price = 0\n  and price <> 0\n  and tenant_id in (99, 101) ;\nDELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_26_01;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_26_01\nWITH\n    sales_detail AS (\n        SELECT\n            a.invoice_bill_code,\n            b.detailed_num,\n            a.plant_code AS tenant_code,\n            a.invoice_bill_state,\n            a.cus_code,\n            a.salesman,\n            ut.tenant_id,\n            ut.tenant_name,\n            CASE\n                WHEN (w.original_batch_code IS NULL or  w.original_batch_code = '') THEN b.batch_num\n                ELSE w.original_batch_code\n                END AS original_batch_code,\n            b.batch_num AS batch_code,\n            b.producer,\n            b.quantity,\n            b.steel_type,\n            a.creation_date,\n            a.approver_date AS approver_datetime,\n            DATE(a.approver_date) AS approver_date,\n            b.steel_standart,\n            a.internal_type,\n            b.surface,\n            b.tax_price,\n            b.local_tax_price,\n            b.amount_including_tax,\n            b.local_tax_amount,\n            b.local_amount,\n            b.pricing_type,\n            CASE\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 10 THEN 'µīēµĢ░ķćÅĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 20 THEN 'µīēńÉåķćŹĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                WHEN b.pricing_type = 30 THEN 'µīēńŻģķćŹĶ«Īõ╗Ę'\n                END AS pricing_type_desc,\n            b.lilun_weigth_kg,\n            b.weigth_kg,\n            b.delivery_method,\n            b.shipping_address,\n            b.stock_code AS sku_code,\n            b.stock_name AS sku_name,\n            b.unit,\n            a.warehouse,\n            b.contract_code,\n            b.remarks,\n            b.currency\n        FROM ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill a\n                 JOIN ods_aps_ps_invoice_bill_detailed b\n                      ON a.invoice_bill_code = b.invoice_bill_code\n                          AND b.state = 70\n                 LEFT JOIN dim_ums_tenant ut\n                           ON a.plant_code = ut.tenant_code\n                               AND ut.status = 1\n                 LEFT JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info w\n                           ON b.batch_num = w.batch_code\n                               AND b.stock_code = w.sku_code\n                               AND b.grade = w.grade\n                               AND b.steel_standart = w.spec\n                               AND b.steel_type = w.steel_grade\n                               AND b.surface = w.surface\n                               AND w.status = 1\n                               AND w.tenant_id = ut.tenant_id\n        WHERE a.plant_code IN ('0110000', '30110000')\n          AND a.creation_date >= '2026-01-01'\n          AND a.invoice_bill_state = 70\n    ),\n    batch_list AS (\n        SELECT DISTINCT\n            tenant_id,\n            original_batch_code\n        FROM sales_detail\n        WHERE original_batch_code IS NOT NULL\n    ),\n    enter_item AS (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            batch_code,\n            wh_name,\n            tax_amount,\n            tax_price,\n            enter_date,\n            created_time\n        FROM (\n                 SELECT\n                     e.tenant_id,\n                     e.batch_code,\n                     e.wh_name,\n                     e.tax_amount,\n                     CASE\n                         WHEN e.pricing_type = 10 THEN e.tax_amount / NULLIF(e.weight, 0)\n                         ELSE e.tax_price\n                         END AS tax_price,\n                     e.enter_date,\n                     e.created_time,\n                     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n                         PARTITION BY e.tenant_id, e.batch_code\n                         ORDER BY e.created_time ASC\n                         ) AS rn\n                 FROM dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item e\n             ) x\n        WHERE rn = 1\n    ),\n    calc AS (\n        SELECT\n            a.*,\n            b.tax_price AS enter_tax_price,\n            b.enter_date,\n            mp.unit_price AS materi"

TRANSACTION;\nDELETE\nFROM with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6,\n                             ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT *\nFROM (SELECT sc.tenant_id,\n             'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n             sc.contract_code,\n             scd.prod_spec2                    surface,\n             a.surface_thickness,\n             a.surface_number,\n             sc.contract_month,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n             round(SUM(CASE\n                           WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                           WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                           ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n             a.attr1\n      FROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n               JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n          AND scd.contract_detail_state IN (30, 50)\n          AND scd.STATUS = 1 and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n          AND scd.prod_spec4 = 'A'\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a\n                    ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'QX'\n      WHERE sc.contract_state IN (30, 50)\n        AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n        AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2025\n        AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n      GROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n               sc.contract_code,\n               scd.prod_spec2,\n               a.surface_thickness,\n               a.surface_number,\n               sc.contract_month,\n               a.attr1) a\n;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_04_03;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_04_03 (tenant_id,attr1, surface_thickness, surface_number, qx_a_weight, qx_b_weight, qx_c_weight,\n                             qx_d_weight, qx_weight, data_date, sync_time, rk, rk1)\nSELECT aa.tenant_id,\n       a.attr1,\n       aa.surface_thickness,\n       aa.surface_number,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN weight END)                   qx_a_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN weight END)                   qx_b_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN weight END)                   qx_c_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN weight END)                   qx_d_weight,\n       sum(CASE WHEN grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN weight END) qx_weight,\n       CURRENT_DATE                                                 data_date,\n       now()                                                        sync_time,\n       1                                                            rk,\n       1                                                            rk1\nFROM (SELECT DISTINCT a.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n                      c.surface_thickness,\n                      c.surface_number\n      FROM ads_gx_xs_20_detail a\n               JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info c ON a.surface = c.surface\n      WHERE a.tenant_id = 92\n        AND a.HOUR = 18\n        AND a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY\n      UNION\n      SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id,attribute9,\n                      attribute3,\n                      attribute4\n      FROM with_attr_value\n      WHERE scene = 'BI_GX_XS_006_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL') aa\n         LEFT JOIN ads_gx_xs_04_detail a ON aa.surface_thickness = a.surface_thickness and aa.attr1 = a.attr1\n    AND aa.surface_number = a.surface_number\n    AND a.tenant_id = aa.tenant_id\nGROUP BY aa.tenant_id,a.attr1,\n         aa.surface_thickness,\n         aa.surface_number;\nUPDATE ads_gx_x"

                        DATEDIFF(CURRENT_DATE, DATE(cs.last_enter_date)) AS days,\n                                          cs.r_modified_time\n                                   FROM with_attr_value a\n                                            join ods_mes_wms_current_stock cs\n                                                 ON a.tenant_id = cs.tenant_id\n ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8) SELECT\n    *\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT\n            sc.tenant_id,\n            'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n            sc.contract_code,\n scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0          sync_data_date,\n                        a.ten"

scd.weight  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_contract_weight,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000 WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_dj,\n            round(SUM(CASE WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped/ 1000  WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped  ELSE 0 END), 2) AS quantity_sy\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n                JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n                AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30,50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0\n                JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info a ON scd.prod_spec2 = a.surface and a.silicon_steel_product_category_code = 'XNY'\n\n        WHERE\n            sc.contract_state in (30,50)\n          AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n          AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n          AND sc.STATUS = 1\n\n        GROUP BY\n            sc.tenant_id,\n\n            sc.contract_code,\n            scd.prod_spec2 ,\n            scd.prod_spec4 ,\n            sc.contract_month ) a\n;\nupdate  with_attr_value set  ATTRIBUTE3 = 'A'  WHERE  scene = 'ads_gx_xs_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' and  ATTRIBUTE1 = 'HNHW-WQ2503200037' ;\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_gx_xs_21\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_21 (sync_data_date, HOUR, tenant_id, surface, a_quantity, b_quantity, total_quantity, rk, rk1, sync_time, is_newest) SELECT\n                                                                                                                                               aa.sync_data_date,\n                                                                                                                                               a.HOUR,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.tenant_id,\n                                                                                                                                               aa.surface,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'a' THEN a.quantity  END) a_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade = 'b' THEN a.quantity  END) b_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               SUM(CASE WHEN a.grade IN ('a', 'b') THEN a.quantity  END) total_quantity,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk,\n                                                                                                                                               1 rk1,\n                                                                                                                                               a.sync_time,\n                                                                                                                                               a.is_newest\nFROM\n    (\n        SELECT DISTINCT CURRENT_DATE\n                            sync_data_date,\n                        a.ten"
