with_attr_value\nWHERE scene = 'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL';\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8,\n                             ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT sc.tenant_id,\n       'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n       sc.contract_code,\n       sc.cust_abbr,\n       sc.contract_month,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_allocated / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_allocated\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN unit_code = '002' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                     WHEN unit_code = '003' THEN scd.quantity_unshipped\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n       sc.is_signed_by_both\nFROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type in (20,30)\nWHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n  AND sc.STATUS = 1\n  and  scd.sku_code in (select sku_code\n                        from ods_mes_pm_sku sku\n                                 join with_attr_value av1 ON sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n                            AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'  and av1.tenant_id  = 92\n                        where   sku.status = 1  )\nGROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n         sc.contract_code,\n         sc.cust_abbr,\n         sc.contract_month\n;\nINSERT INTO with_attr_value (tenant_id, scene, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7,\n                             ATTRIBUTE8,\n                             ATTRIBUTE9)\nSELECT sc.tenant_id,\n       'ads_gx_xs_18_08_WJ_CONTRACT_DETAIL' scene,\n       sc.contract_code,\n       sc.cust_abbr,\n       sc.contract_month,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.weight / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.weight\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  total_contract_weight,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_allocated\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_dj,\n       round(SUM(CASE\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '002' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped / 1000\n                     WHEN sec_unit_code = '003' THEN scd.sec_quantity_unshipped\n                     ELSE 0 END), 2) AS  quantity_sy,\n       sc.is_signed_by_both\nFROM ods_crm_sa_contract sc\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_contract_detail scd ON sc.contract_code = scd.contract_code\n    AND scd.contract_detail_state in (30, 50) AND scd.STATUS = 1  and scd.quantity_unshipped > 0 and scd.pricing_type = 10\nWHERE sc.contract_state in (30, 50)\n  AND sc.contract_type <> '40'\n  AND substr(sc.contract_month, 1, 4) >= 2024\n  AND sc.STATUS = 1\n  and  scd.sku_code in (select sku_code\n                        from ods_mes_pm_sku sku\n                                 join with_attr_value av1 ON sku.sku_name = av1.attribute1\n                            AND av1.scene = 'bi_gx_xs_017_STOCK_NAME'  and av1.tenant_id  = 92\n                        where   sku.status = 1  )\nGROUP BY sc.tenant_id,\n         sc.contract_code,\n         sc.cust_abbr,\n         sc.contract_month\n;\ndelete  from ads_gx_xs_18_08 ;\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_08 (\n    cust_abbr,\n    january, february, march, april, may, june, july, august, september, october, november, december,\n    total,\n    return_january, return_february, r"

   ads_sc_xl_01\r\nWHERE\r\n    data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_01 (\r\n    products_category,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    products_type,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    wh_code,\r\n    wh_name,\r\n    dept_code,\r\n    dept_name,\r\n    machine_code,\r\n    machine_name,\r\n    other_machine_code,\r\n    other_machine_name,\r\n    rd_style,\r\n    rd_style_name,\r\n    top_cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    surface,\r\n    surface_thickness,\r\n    surface_number,\r\n    surface_middle_part,\r\n    grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    roll_length,\r\n    iron_loss,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    sync_time,\r\n    bill_type,\r\n    is_production_out) SELECT\r\n                           a.products_category,\r\n                           a.plate_type,\r\n                           a.products_type,\r\n                           a.tenant_id,\r\n                           sku_code,\r\n                           sku_name,\r\n                           wh_code,\r\n                           wh_name,\r\n                           dept_code,\r\n                           dept_name,\r\n                           machine_code,\r\n                           machine_name,\r\n                           other_machine_code,\r\n                           other_machine_name,\r\n\r\n                           rd_style,\r\n                           rd_style_name,\r\n                           top_cat_name,\r\n                           steel_grade_series,\r\n                           steel_grade,\r\n                           surface,\r\n                           surface_thickness,\r\n                           surface_number,\r\n                           surface_middle_part,\r\n                           grade,\r\n                           spec,\r\n                           SUM(weight) AS weight,\r\n                           SUM(quantity) AS quantity,\r\n                           SUM(roll_length) roll_length,\r\n                           avg(iron_loss) iron_loss,\r\n                           data_date,\r\n                           MONTH,\r\n                           YEAR,\r\n                           NOW() AS sync_time,\r\n                           bill_type,\r\n                           is_production_out\r\nFROM\r\n    dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a\r\nWHERE\r\n    verify_status = '2'\r\n  AND bill_type IN (1, 2)\r\n  AND data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY\r\n  AND ((dept_code = '160502005' AND machine_code = 'CS02' AND parent_batch_code NOT LIKE '%-RD')\r\n    OR (dept_code <> '160502005' OR machine_code <> 'CS02'))\r\n\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    sku_code,\r\n    sku_name,\r\n    wh_code,\r\n    wh_name,\r\n    dept_code,\r\n    dept_name,\r\n    machine_code,\r\n    other_machine_code,\r\n\r\n    rd_style,\r\n    rd_style_name,\r\n    top_cat_name,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    steel_grade,\r\n    surface,\r\n    surface_thickness,\r\n    surface_number,\r\n    surface_middle_part,\r\n    grade,\r\n    spec,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR,\r\n    bill_type,\r\n    is_production_out;\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_01    a\r\nSET bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 = NULL  where  bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 is not  NULL  ;\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_01   a\r\nSET bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 =\r\n        CASE\r\n\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.18  THEN\r\n                0.18\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.20 THEN\r\n                0.20\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.23 THEN\r\n                0.23\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.27 THEN\r\n                0.27\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.3 THEN\r\n                0.3\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'QX' and substr(spec,1,4) = 0.35 THEN\r\n                0.35\r\n            WHEN SKU_name = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ'  THEN\r\n                'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ'\r\n            WHEN steel_grade = 'WQX' and SKU_name <> 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉĶĮ¦ńĪ¼ÕŹĘ' THEN\r\n                'ÕģČÕ«āµŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ'\tEND  \tWHERE\r\n    tenant_id = 92  and machine_code ='TCM';\r\nUPDATE ads_sc"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1810:      "sql_preview": "/* =========================================================\n   CONSUME + LOG + DONEŌåÆDELETE ń╗łµ×üµ©ĪµØ┐’╝łÕåÖÕģźÕ»╣µ»öĶĪ© output2’╝ē\n   ńø«µĀćĶĪ©’╝Üdwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2\n   ķś¤ÕłŚĶĪ©’╝Üdwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2’╝łõĖŹÕÅś’╝ē\n   µē╣Õż¦Õ░Å’╝Ü500’╝łÕåÖµŁ╗’╝īķü┐ÕģŹ LIMIT @var µŖźķöÖ’╝ē\n   ========================================================= */\n\nSTART TRANSACTION;\n\nSET @batch_id := REPLACE(UUID(), '-', '');\nSET @lock_expire_min := 30;\n\n-- 1) µČłĶ┤╣µŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜRUNNING\nINSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (\n    task_name,\n    target_table,\n    batch_id,\n    water_from,\n    water_to,\n    start_time,\n    status\n) VALUES (\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2',\n             @batch_id,\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             '2000-01-01 00:00:00',\n             NOW(),\n             0\n         );\n\n-- 2) Õø×µöČķöüĶČģµŚČ’╝łÕÅ»ķĆē’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\nSET status = 0,\n    batch_id = NULL,\n    locked_time = NULL\nWHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND status = 1\n  AND locked_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL @lock_expire_min MINUTE);\n\n-- 3) ķöüõĖĆµē╣ NEW’╝ł500’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 q\nSET q.status      = 1,\n    q.batch_id    = @batch_id,\n    q.locked_time = NOW(),\n    q.attempts    = q.attempts + 1\nWHERE q.table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND q.status = 0\nORDER BY q.updated_time\nLIMIT 500000;\n\n-- 4) picked_count\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET picked_count = (\n    SELECT COUNT(*)\n    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\n    WHERE table_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n      AND status=1\n      AND batch_id=@batch_id\n)\nWHERE task_name='dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id=@batch_id;\n\n-- 5) õĖ╗ĶĪ© UPSERT’╝łÕåÖÕģź dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2’╝īõ╗ģµ£¼µē╣’╝ē\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_2(\n    id,\n    sku_code,\n    sku_name,\n    batch_code,\n    actual_id,\n    steel_grade,\n    spec,\n    surface,\n    grade,\n    inner_grade,\n    weight,\n    quantity,\n    roll_length,\n    group_id,\n    group_name,\n    group_leader,\n    cat_name,\n    steel_grade_series,\n    date_time,\n    start_time,\n    end_time,\n    data_date,\n    MONTH,\n    YEAR,\n    tenant_id,\n    rate,\n    rate_unit,\n    rate_type,\n    theory_use_time,\n    actual_use_time,\n    send_happened,\n    is_ignore,\n    manuf_line_code,\n    manuf_line_name,\n    sku_type,\n    r_modified_time,\n    r_modified_date,\n    is_retention,\n    is_baf,\n    proce_note,\n    flaw_describe,\n    split_in_weight,\n    yield_rate,\n    next_machine_code,\n    next_sku_code\n)\nSELECT\n    a.id,\n    b.sku_code,\n    sku.sku_name,\n    b.batch_code,\n    b.actual_id,\n    b.steel_grade,\n    b.spec,\n    b.surface,\n    b.grade,\n    b.inner_grade,\n    a.weight,\n    a.quantity,\n    a.meter_num AS roll_length,\n    a.group_id,\n    a.group_code AS group_name,\n    mg.group_leader AS group_leader,\n\n    IFNULL((\n               SELECT d.cat_name\n               FROM ods_mes_pm_stat_cat_sku c\n                        JOIN ods_mes_pm_stat_cat d ON c.top_cat_code = d.cat_code\n               WHERE c.sku_code = b.sku_code\n                 AND (c.steel_grade = b.steel_grade OR c.steel_grade = '*')\n                 AND (c.surface = b.surface OR c.surface = '*')\n               LIMIT 1\n           ), 'ÕģČÕ«ā') AS cat_name,\n\n    (SELECT attr_value4\n     FROM ods_mes_sys_attr_value\n     WHERE attr_id = 1013 AND status = 1 AND attr_value = b.steel_grade\n     LIMIT 1) AS steel_grade_series,\n\n    a.end_time AS date_time,\n    a.start_time,\n    a.end_time,\n\n    CASE\n        WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 9 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        WHEN a.tenant_id <> 80 AND HOUR(a.end_time) < 8 THEN DATE(a.end_time) - INTERVAL 1 DAY\n        ELSE DATE(a.end_time)\n        END AS data_date,\n\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\n    DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y')   AS YEAR,\n\n    b.tenant_id,\n\n    a.rate,\n    a.rate_unit,\n    a.rate_type,\n    a.theory_use_time,\n    TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, a.start_time, a.end_time) / 60 AS actual_use_time,\n\n    a.send_happened,\n    a"

TRANSACTION;\n\n-- 0) Õø║Õ«Üµ£¼µ¼Īń¬ŚÕÅŻ\nSET @to_ts := CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;\n\n-- 1) ńĪ«õ┐Ø tracker_v2 µ£ēĶ»źõ╗╗ÕŖĪĶĪī’╝łķü┐ÕģŹ SELECT FOR UPDATE µ¤źõĖŹÕł░’╝ē\nINSERT INTO dwd_update_tracker_v2(table_name, last_enqueued, last_updated)\nVALUES ('dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output', '2000-01-01 00:00:00', '2000-01-01 00:00:00')\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE table_name = VALUES(table_name);\n\n-- 2) ķöüõĮÅÕģźķś¤µ░┤õĮŹ’╝łķü┐ÕģŹÕ╣ČÕÅæÕģźķś¤ķĆĀµłÉń¬ŚÕÅŻķöÖõ╣▒’╝ē\nSET @from_ts := (\n    SELECT last_enqueued\n    FROM dwd_update_tracker_v2\n    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n        FOR UPDATE\n);\n\n-- 3) ńö¤µłÉµ£¼µ¼ĪÕģźķś¤µŚźÕ┐ŚID’╝łńö© to_ts Õø║Õ«Ü’╝īõŠ┐õ║ÄĶ┐Įµ║»’╝ē\nSET @enqueue_log_id := CONCAT('ENQ_', DATE_FORMAT(@to_ts, '%Y%m%d%H%i%S'));\n\n-- 4) ÕåÖÕģźµŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜRUNNING\nINSERT INTO dwd_task_execution_log (\n    task_name,\n    target_table,\n    batch_id,\n    water_from,\n    water_to,\n    start_time,\n    status\n) VALUES (\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output',\n             @enqueue_log_id,\n             @from_ts,\n             @to_ts,\n             NOW(),\n             0\n         );\n\n-- 5) Õģźķś¤ŌæĀ’╝Üprod_actual ÕÅśµø┤ÕĮ▒ÕōŹÕł░ group_output.id\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)\nSELECT DISTINCT\n    a.id                                   AS id,\n    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,\n    0                                      AS status,\n    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time\nFROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n         JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual b\n              ON b.actual_id = a.actual_id\nWHERE IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts\n  AND IFNULL(b.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\n                     -- PROCESSING(1) õĖŹµŖóÕŹĀ’╝øDONE(2) ÕģüĶ«ĖÕø×Õł░ NEW(0) õ╗źõŠ┐ķćŹĶĘæ’╝łÕ”éõĖŹÕĖīµ£øķćŹĶĘæ’╝īĶ¦üõĖŗµ¢╣ÕÅ»ķĆēķĪ╣’╝ē\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =\n                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,\n                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,\n                            0),\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =\n                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,\n                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));\n\n-- 6) Õģźķś¤ŌæĪ’╝Ügroup_output Ķć¬Ķ║½ÕÅśµø┤ÕĮ▒ÕōŹÕł░ id\nINSERT INTO dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2 (id, table_name, status, enqueue_time)\nSELECT\n    a.id                                   AS id,\n    'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'         AS table_name,\n    0                                      AS status,\n    @to_ts                                 AS enqueue_time\nFROM ods_mes_mm_task_group_output a\nWHERE IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') >  @from_ts\n  AND IFNULL(a.r_modified_time, '1970-01-01 00:00:00') <= @to_ts\nON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status =\n                         IF(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status = 1,\n                            dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.status,\n                            0),\n                     dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time =\n                         GREATEST(dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2.enqueue_time,\n                                  VALUES(enqueue_time));\n\n-- 7) ń╗¤Ķ«Īµ£¼µ¼ĪÕģźķś¤µĢ░ķćÅ’╝łõ╗ź enqueue_time=@to_ts ń╗¤Ķ«Ī’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET enqueue_count = (\n    SELECT COUNT(*)\n    FROM dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output_update_queue_2\n    WHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n      AND enqueue_time = @to_ts\n)\nWHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id  = @enqueue_log_id;\n\n-- 8) µÄ©Ķ┐øÕģźķś¤µ░┤õĮŹ’╝łÕÅ¬Ķ”üµ£¼õ║ŗÕŖĪµłÉÕŖ¤Õ░▒µÄ©Ķ┐ø’╝øÕż▒Ķ┤źÕø×µ╗ÜÕłÖõĖŹµÄ©Ķ┐ø’╝ē\nUPDATE dwd_update_tracker_v2\nSET last_enqueued = @to_ts\nWHERE table_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output';\n\n-- 9) µŚźÕ┐Ś’╝ÜSUCCESS\nUPDATE dwd_task_execution_log\nSET end_time     = NOW(),\n    duration_sec = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()),\n    status       = 1\nWHERE task_name = 'dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output'\n  AND batch_id  = "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1863:      "sql_preview": "\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õ║öµŁźŃĆæµĖģń®║ µ▒ćµĆ╗ĶĪ©\n-- =======================================\nDELETE FROM ads_gx_xs_18_01;\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼ÕģŁµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µ▒ćµĆ╗ĶĪ©’╝łµŚź/µ£łµ▒ćµĆ╗’╝ē\n-- =======================================\n-- µŚźµ▒ćµĆ╗\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)\nSELECT\n    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    di.date_id AS data_date,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    'D' AS period\nFROM\n    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE YEAR(date_id) >= 2025 AND date_id <= CURRENT_DATE) di\n        LEFT JOIN\n    (SELECT DISTINCT silicon_steel_product_category_name FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail where silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null  ) b ON 1=1\n        LEFT JOIN\n    ads_gx_xs_18_detail de ON di.date_id = de.data_date AND b.silicon_steel_product_category_name = de.silicon_steel_product_category_name\n\nGROUP BY\n    b.silicon_steel_product_category_name, di.date_id;\n\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_01 (silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, attr1, attr2, attr3, attr4, attr5, attr6, attr7, sync_time, period)\n-- µ£łµ▒ćµĆ╗\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7) AS month_date,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr2,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n    SUM(CASE WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»') THEN IFNULL(weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr7,\n    NOW() AS sync_time,\n    'M' AS period\nFROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail\nGROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, SUBSTR(data_date, 1, 7);\nwith ads_gx_xs_18_01_process1 as (SELECT silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n                                         SUBSTR(return_created_time, 1, 7)                                            AS data_date,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr1,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) /\n                                         1000                                                                         AS attr2,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr3,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr4,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr5,\n                                         SUM(CASE WHEN channel = 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»' THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) / 1000 AS attr6,\n                                         SUM(CASE\n                                                 WHEN channel IN ('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▒¤ĶŗÅÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µ▓│ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'µłÉķāĮÕ«ÅµŚ║', 'õĮøÕ▒▒Õ«ÅĶŖ»')\n                                                     THEN IFNULL(return_weight, 0) END) /\n                                         1000                                        "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1894:      "sql_preview": "-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õĖĆµŁźŃĆæµĖģń®║ µśÄń╗åĶĪ©\n-- =======================================\nDELETE\nFROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail;\n\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õ║īµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µśÄń╗åĶĪ©’╝łµØźµ║ÉõĖĆ’╝ÜĶĮ¼Õ║ōÕŹĢµĢ░µŹ«’╝ē\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\n\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       t.out_warehouse,\n       ti.cust_code,\n       ti.cust_abbr,\n       ti.batch_code,\n       ti.quantity,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       null                                                           iron_loss,\n       t.transfer_order_code,\n       t.transfer_order_date,\n       IFNULL(rd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       rd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       ti.quantity AS weight,\n       0.0,\n       ww.wh_name,\n       'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║'                                                  AS channel,\n       ti.contract_code,\n       CASE\n           WHEN DATE(t.transfer_order_date) IS NULL THEN date(t.approve_date)\n           ELSE DATE(t.transfer_order_date)\n           END                                                     AS data_date,\n       ti.receive_warehouse\n\nFROM ods_crm_sa_transfer_order t\n         JOIN ods_crm_sa_transfer_order_detail ti ON t.transfer_order_id = ti.transfer_order_id AND ti.STATUS = 1\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_warehouse ww\n              ON t.in_warehouse_code = ww.wh_code AND ww.STATUS = 1 AND SUBSTR(ww.wh_name, 1, 1) = 'B'\n                  and ww.wh_code <> 2098\n         LEFT JOIN ods_crm_sv_return_detail rd ON ti.contract_code = rd.contract_code AND ti.batch_code = rd.batch_code     and rd.return_detail_status in (20,30,40)\n\n         JOIN ods_mes_wms_batch_info bi\n              ON ti.batch_code = bi.batch_code and bi.`status` = 1 and t.tenant_id = bi.tenant_id\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info si ON bi.surface = si.surface and si.silicon_steel_product_category_name is not null\n\nWHERE t.transfer_order_state in (20, 40)\n  AND t.STATUS = 1\n  AND YEAR(t.transfer_order_date) >= '2025'\n  and t.tenant_id in (92,108);\n\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE a.place IS NULL\n;\nUPDATE ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n    JOIN (select distinct contract_code,receive_warehouse\n          from ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail where  tenant_id = 92  and receive_warehouse is not null and STATUS = 1) b ON a.contract_code = b.contract_code\nset a.place= b.receive_warehouse\nWHERE  a.place <> b.receive_warehouse;\n-- =======================================\n-- ŃĆÉń¼¼õĖēµŁźŃĆæµÅÆÕģź µśÄń╗åĶĪ©’╝łµØźµ║Éõ║ī’╝ÜÕ╝ĆÕŹĢń│╗ń╗¤µĢ░µŹ«’╝ē\n-- =======================================\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_detail\nSELECT si.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n       sdod.wh_code,\n       sdo.cust_code,\n       sdo.CUSt_ABBR,\n       sdod.batch_code,\n       sdod.weight,\n       bi.steel_grade,\n       bi.surface,\n       bi.grade,\n       bi.spec,\n       bi.iron_loss,\n       sdo.sales_delivery_order_code                                   transfer_order_code,\n       sdod.sales_delivery_order_date,\n       IFNULL(srd.actual_return_exchange_quantity, 0)               AS return_weight,\n       srd.created_time as  return_created_time,\n       sdod.weight  AS weight,\n       sdod.amount_in_tax,\n       ''                                                           AS wh_name,\n       'µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║'                                                   AS channel,\n       sdod.contract_code,\n       date(ifnull(sdo.approver_date,sdo.created_time)),\n\n       sdod.receive_warehouse\nFROM ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo\n         join\n     ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code = sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n         and sdod.status = 1 and sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50', '20', '30')\n         JOIN ods_"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1963:        "ads_sc_xl_13_process1"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1965:      "sql_preview": "\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined\r\nWHERE\r\n    data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 day;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined (\r\n    data_date,\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    surface,\r\n    attr1,\r\n    steel_grade_series,\r\n    group_manuf_line_name,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    lower_weight,\r\n    lower_quantity,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR) SELECT\r\n              dr.date_id AS data_date,\r\n              t.tenant_id,\r\n              t.plate_type,\r\n              t.surface,\r\n              t.attr1,\r\n              t.steel_grade_series,\r\n              t.group_manuf_line_name,\r\n              t.manuf_line_name,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.weight, 0) AS weight,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.quantity, 0) AS quantity,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_weight, 0) AS lower_weight,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_quantity, 0) AS lower_quantity,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length, 0) AS lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.MONTH, 'µ£¬ń¤ź') AS MONTH,\r\n              COALESCE(orig.YEAR, 'µ£¬ń¤ź') AS YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    (SELECT date_id FROM dim_date_info WHERE date_id <= CURDATE() AND date_id >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 35 DAY) AS dr\r\n        JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id, plate_type, surface, attr1, steel_grade_series, group_manuf_line_name, manuf_line_name FROM ads_sc_xl_13_process1 where data_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 350 DAY) AS t\r\n        LEFT JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_process1 orig ON dr.date_id = orig.data_date\r\n        AND t.tenant_id = orig.tenant_id\r\n        AND t.plate_type = orig.plate_type\r\n        AND t.surface = orig.surface\r\n        AND\r\n                                                CASE\r\n\r\n                                                    WHEN t.attr1 IS NULL THEN\r\n                                                        1 = 1 ELSE t.attr1 = orig.attr1\r\n                                                    END\r\n        AND t.steel_grade_series = orig.steel_grade_series\r\n        AND t.group_manuf_line_name = orig.group_manuf_line_name\r\n        AND t.manuf_line_name = orig.manuf_line_name\r\n;\r\ndelete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name ='TCM' and attr1 is null ;\r\ndelete from ads_sc_xl_13_defined  where tenant_id =92 and manuf_line_name in ('1#SACL','2#SACL') and attr1 is null ;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1979:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1980:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1983:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1984:        "dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:1987:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month\n;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month SELECT\n                                                                               a.tenant_id,\n                                                                               a.plate_type,\n                                                                               a.defined_manuf_line_name manuf_line_name,\n                                                                               a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                               CASE\n\n                                                                                   WHEN SUM(c.roll_length) = 0 THEN\n                                                                                       0 ELSE SUM(c.act_height * c.roll_length) / SUM(c.roll_length)\n                                                                                   END average_thickness,\n                                                                               substr(a.data_date,1,7) data_date\nFROM\n    dwd_mes_mm_task_group_output a\n        JOIN ods_mes_mm_task_prod_actual c ON a.actual_id = c.actual_id\n        AND c.`status` = 1\nWHERE\n   a.plate_type IS NOT NULL\n  AND manuf_line_name IS NOT NULL\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    a.plate_type,\n    a.defined_manuf_line_name ,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 ,\n    substr(a.data_date,1,7) ;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_avg_thickness_data_month AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.plate_type = source.plate_type\n        AND target.month = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND CASE WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN 1 = 1 ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1  END\nSET target.day_average_thickness = source.average_thickness;"

ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons     = 0,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_tons)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons     = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_tons)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n       data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_tons     = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_gg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_gg_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_tons)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, a.month ORDER BY a.data_date) AS\n                                                                                                      manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_gg a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_nam"

ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_product          = 0,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_product          = source.manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n       data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg_m AS source ON\n        target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n            AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n            AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n            AND\n        CASE\n\n            WHEN target.attr1 IS NULL THEN\n                1 = 1\n            ELSE target.attr1 = source.attr1\n            END\nSET target.month_manufacturing_finished_product          = source.manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.month_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg_m;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg_m\nSELECT a.tenant_id,\n       a.manuf_line_name,\n       a.attr1,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n       SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity)\n           OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id, a.manuf_line_name, a.attr1, DATE_FORMAT(a.data_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY a.data_date) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n       a.data_date\nFROM ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_gg a\nGROUP BY a.tenant_id,\n         a.manuf_line_name,\n         a.attr1,\n         a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined "

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2065:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg",

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2067:        "with_attr_value"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2069:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz SELECT\n                                                                             a.tenant_id,\n                                                                             b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                             a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                             SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                             a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 = '*' OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\n  AND a.rd_style <> '1101'\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.data_date,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_lz AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND case when  target.attr1  is null then 1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons = source.manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_output_quantity;\n\n\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\n\n\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_output_tons_jjg SELECT\n                                                                              a.tenant_id,\n                                                                              b.attribute1 AS manuf_line_name,\n                                                                              a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                              SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE weight END) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\n                                                                              SUM(CASE WHEN a.tenant_id = 80 AND a.wh_code = 'HNZZ6' AND a.rd_style = 0102 THEN 0 ELSE quantity END) AS manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\n                                                                              a.data_date,a.month\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND (b.attribute2 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 = '*' OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n     "

ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_product = 0,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = 0;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg SELECT\n                                                                          a.tenant_id,\n                                                                          b.attribute1 manuf_line_name,\n                                                                          a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1 attr1,\n                                                                          SUM(a.weight) / 1000 AS manufacturing_finished_product,\n                                                                          SUM(a.quantity) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n                                                                          a.data_date\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_01 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND (b.attribute2 IN ('*', '') OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 IN ('*', '') OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND (b.attribute3 IN ('*', '') OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n        AND (b.attribute4 IN ('*', '') OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4)\n        AND (b.attribute6 IN ('*', '') OR a.machine_code = b.attribute6)\n        AND (b.attribute7 IN ('*', '') OR a.other_machine_code = b.attribute7)\n        JOIN with_attr_value c ON a.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n        AND c.scene = 'BI-SC-KC-013-RD-FINISHED-DEFINED-JJG'\n        AND a.rd_style_name = c.attribute1\nWHERE\n    a.bill_type = 2\n  AND a.data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    b.attribute1,\n    a.bi_sc_xl_013_process_001_attr1,\n    a.data_date;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\n    INNER JOIN ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_jjg AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = source.manuf_line_name\n        AND case when  target.attr1  is null then 1=1 else target.attr1 = source.attr1  end\nSET target.day_manufacturing_finished_product = source.manufacturing_finished_product,\n    target.day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity = source.manufacturing_finished_product_quantity;\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz\nWHERE\n    data_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_finished_product_lz SELECT\n manufacturing_finished_product,\n                                                                         SUM(a.quantity) AS manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\n 'BI-SC-KC-013-WH-CODE-FINISHED-DEFINED-LZ'\n        AND (b.attribute2 IN ('*', '') OR a.wh_code = b.attribute2)\n        AND (b.attribute5 IN ('*', '') OR a.dept_code = b.attribute5)\n        AND b.attribute6)\n        AND (b.attribute7 IN ('*', '') OR a.other_machine_code = b.attribute7)\n        JOIN w"

surface_number,                   -- ĶĪ©ķØóÕÅĘ\n    grade,                            -- ńŁēń║¦\n    spec,                             -- Ķ¦äµĀ╝\n    last_enter_date,                  -- µ£ĆĶ┐æÕģźÕ║ōµŚźµ£¤\n    days,                             -- Õ£©Õ║ōÕż®µĢ░\n    batch_code,                       -- µē╣µ¼ĪÕÅĘ\n    quantity                          -- µĢ░ķćÅ\n)\nSELECT\n            CURRENT_DATE AS sync_data_date,\n            silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n            a.wh_code,\n            a.wh_name,\n            a.surface,\n            b.surface_thickness,\n            b.surface_number,\n            a.grade,\n            a.spec,\n            a.last_enter_date,\n            a.days,\n            a.batch_code,\n            a.quantity\nFROM dwd_mes_wms_current_stock a\n         JOIN dwd_silicon_steel_surface_info b\n              ON a.surface = b.surface\n         JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = 'µłÉÕōü'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n              ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                  AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\nWHERE a.tenant_id = 92;\n\ndelete from ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 ;\ninsert into ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1\nselect a.batch_code, a.data_date,\n       ROW_NUMBER() OVER (\n           PARTITION BY  a.batch_code\n           ORDER BY a.data_date ASC\n           ) AS rn\nfrom dwd_mes_wms_wh_enter_item a JOIN (\n    SELECT DISTINCT attribute2 AS wh_code, attribute4 AS sku_name\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_sc_xl_001_products_category'\n      AND tenant_id = 92\n      AND attribute6 = 'µłÉÕōü'\n      AND (\n        attribute2 <> 3021\n            OR (attribute2 = 3021 AND attribute4 = '0104020114')\n        )\n) w\n                                      ON a.wh_code = w.wh_code\n                                          AND (w.sku_name = '*' or a.sku_name = w.sku_name)\n\n                                          and  a.tenant_id = 92 ;\n\n\nupdate ads_sc_kc_19_detail a join ads_sc_kc_19_detail_process1 b  on a.batch_code =b.batch_code and rn = 1  set  a.first_enter_date = b.data_date,first_days = datediff(CURDATE(),b.data_date)\n\n;\n\n\n\nDELETE\nFROM\n    ads_sc_kc_19  ;\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_kc_19 (\n    sync_data_date,\n\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    surface,\n               surface,\n               surface_thickness,\n               surface_number,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'A' THEN  quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS a_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'B' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS b_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'C' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS c_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade = 'D' THEN quantity END) / 1000, 2) AS d_qty_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(\n                       SUM(CASE WHEN first_days BETWEEN 0 AND 90 AND grade IN ('A', 'B', 'C', 'D') THEN quantity END) / 1000,\n                       2) AS quantity_1_3m_ton,\n               ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN first_days >"

OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))\n    WHERE\n        a.bill_type = '2'\n      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©'\n        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date\nSET dest.wqx_out_quantity = src.out_quantity\nWHERE\n    dest.period = 'D';\nWITH temp_out_quantity AS (\n    SELECT\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        SUM(a.quantity) / 1000 AS out_quantity,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2\n    FROM\n        dwd_wh_output_item a\n            JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n            AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n            AND (\n                                          (b.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                                              AND (b.attribute3 = '*' OR a.steel_grade = b.attribute3)\n                                              AND (b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code = b.attribute4))\n    WHERE\n        a.bill_type = '2'\n      AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 IN ('µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©')\n    GROUP BY\n        a.tenant_id,\n        a.data_date,\n        b.ATTRIBUTE2) -- µø┤µ¢░µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09 AS dest\n    JOIN temp_out_quantity AS src ON dest.tenant_id = src.tenant_id\n        AND src.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕć║Õ║ōķóåńö©'\n        AND dest.data_date = src.data_date\nSET dest.xny_out_quantity = src.out_quantity\nWHERE\n    dest.period = 'D';\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09\nSET qx_practical_enter = qx_weight - qx_out_quantity,\n    wqx_practical_enter = wqx_weight - wqx_out_quantity,\n    xny_practical_enter = xny_weight - xny_out_quantity;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2245:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS xny_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║ÉÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.xny_pending_delivery_quantity = source.xny_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS qx_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.qx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.qx_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            a.tenant_id,\n            SUM(a.quantity)/1000 AS wqx_pending_delivery_quantity,\n            data_date  - INTERVAL 1 DAY data_date\n        FROM\n            dwd_tms_delivery_que_history a\n                JOIN `with_attr_value` b ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n                AND b.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæÕŠģķöĆÕö«ķćÅ'\n                AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND  (b.ATTRIBUTE1 ='*' OR a.wh_code = b.ATTRIBUTE1  )\n                and ( b.attribute3 = '*' OR  a.steel_grade= b.attribute3  )\n                and ( b.attribute4 = '*' OR a.sku_code= b.attribute4  )\n        WHERE\n            a.`status` = 1\n          AND a.tenant_id = '92'\n          AND a.order_status = '00'\n          AND a.is_handle = '0'\n          and a.hour=8\n        GROUP BY\n            a.tenant_id,data_date\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id and target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET\n    target.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity = source.wqx_pending_delivery_quantity\nwhere target.period = 'D'\n;\n\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2265:        "ads_sc_xl_13_defined"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2267:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name where  data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name (\r\n    tenant_id,\r\n    plate_type,\r\n    group_manuf_line_name,\r\n    manuf_line_name,\r\n    attr1,\r\n    data_date,\r\n    weight,\r\n    quantity,\r\n    average_thickness,\r\n    lower_weight,\r\n    lower_quantity,\r\n    breakdown_frequency,\r\n    planned_downtime,\r\n    unplanned_downtime,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n    manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n    MONTH,\r\n    YEAR)  SELECT\r\n               a.tenant_id,\r\n               a.plate_type,\r\n               a.group_manuf_line_name,\r\n               a.manuf_line_name,\r\n               a.attr1,\r\n               a.data_date,\r\n               SUM(a.weight) weight,\r\n               SUM(a.quantity) quantity,\r\n               '0.0' average_thickness,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_weight) lower_weight,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_quantity) lower_quantity,\r\n               '0.0' breakdown_frequency,\r\n               '0.0' planned_downtime,\r\n               '0.0' unplanned_downtime,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n               SUM(a.manufacturing_finished_output_length) manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n               SUM(a.lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length) lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n               '0.0' manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n               substr(a.data_date, 1, 7) MONTH,\r\n               YEAR(data_date) YEAR\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined a\r\nWHERE\r\n    a.manuf_line_name <> ''\r\n  and a.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 day\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    a.plate_type,\r\n    a.manuf_line_name,\r\n    a.attr1,\r\n    a.data_date;"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2290:      "sql_preview": "DELETE\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined\r\nWHERE\r\n    data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined (\r\n    `tenant_id`,\r\n    `plate_type`,\r\n    `group_manuf_line_name`,\r\n    `manuf_line_name`,\r\n    attr1,\r\n    `data_date`,\r\n    `day_weight`,\r\n    `day_quantity`,\r\n    `day_average_thickness`,\r\n    `day_lower_weight`,\r\n    `day_lower_quantity`,\r\n    `day_breakdown_frequency`,\r\n    `day_planned_downtime`,\r\n    `day_unplanned_downtime`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_output_length`,\r\n    `day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_product`,\r\n    `day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity`,\r\n    `month`,\r\n    `year`,\r\n    `rk`,\r\n    `remark`) SELECT\r\n                  d.`tenant_id`,\r\n                  d.`plate_type`,\r\n                  d.`group_manuf_line_name`,\r\n                  d.`manuf_line_name`,\r\n                  d.attr1,\r\n                  d.`data_date`,\r\n                  d.`weight` AS day_weight,\r\n                  d.`quantity` AS day_quantity,\r\n                  d.`average_thickness` AS day_average_thickness,\r\n                  d.`lower_weight` AS day_lower_weight,\r\n                  d.`lower_quantity` AS day_lower_quantity,\r\n                  d.`breakdown_frequency` AS day_breakdown_frequency,\r\n                  d.`planned_downtime` AS day_planned_downtime,\r\n                  d.`unplanned_downtime` AS day_unplanned_downtime,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_tons` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_tons,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_quantity,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                  d.`lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length` AS day_lower_manufacturing_finished_output_length,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product,\r\n                  d.`manufacturing_finished_product_quantity` AS day_manufacturing_finished_product_quantity,\r\n                  DATE_FORMAT(d.`data_date`, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH,\r\n                  YEAR(d.`data_date`) AS YEAR,\r\n                  d.`rk`,\r\n                  d.`remark`\r\nFROM\r\n    ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name d\r\n        join (SELECT tenant_id,attribute4 FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene in('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ','BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')  )b\r\n             on d.tenant_id =b.tenant_id and d.manuf_line_name=b.attribute4\r\nWHERE\r\n    d.data_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 35 DAY  ;\r\n\r\n\r\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_13_defined_manuf_line_name_combined AS target\r\n    INNER JOIN (SELECT tenant_id, attribute5 plate_type, attribute4 manuf_line_name, list_order FROM with_attr_value WHERE scene IN ('BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-LZ', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-JJG', 'BI-SC-KC-013-DEFINED-PLATE-GG')) AS monthly ON target.tenant_id = monthly.tenant_id\r\n        AND target.manuf_line_name = monthly.manuf_line_name\r\n        AND target.plate_type = monthly.plate_type\r\nSET target.rk = monthly.list_order;\r\n"

/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2312:      "sql_preview": "DELETE from   ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE ;\nINSERT into   ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' type,\n    case when qx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(qx_a_weight/qx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end a_rate ,\n    qx_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when qx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( qx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end qx_rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    qx_practical_enter UNION ALL\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' type,\n    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(wqx_a_weight/wqx_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,\n    wqx_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when wqx_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( wqx_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæ' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    wqx_practical_enter UNION ALL\nSELECT\n    a.tenant_id,\n    'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' type,\n    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round(xny_a_weight/xny_practical_enter* 100, 2 ) end  a_rate ,\n    xny_practical_enter weight,\n    sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END ) plan,\n    case when xny_practical_enter =  0 then 0 else round( xny_practical_enter / sum( CASE WHEN b.attribute1 = 'µ¢░ĶāĮµ║É' THEN b.attribute3 ELSE 0 END )* 100, 2 ) end  rate,\n    MONTH ,0\nFROM\n    ads_sc_xl_09 a\n        JOIN with_attr_value b ON a.data_date = b.attribute2\n        AND a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\n        AND b.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_PLAN'\nWHERE\n    `period` = 'M'\n  AND a.tenant_id = 92\nGROUP BY\n    a.tenant_id,\n    data_date,\n    xny_practical_enter ;\n\n\n\n\nUPDATE ads_SC_XL_09_YIELD_RATE AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            tenant_id,\n            a.month,\n            a.days/b.days*100 actually_rate\n        from\n            (SELECT tenant_id,month,max(day(data_date)) days from  ads_sc_xl_09 where period='D' group by tenant_id,month) a\n                join\n\n            (SELECT substr(date_id,1,7) month ,max(day)  days from dim_date_info  group by substr(date_id,1,7) ) b  on a.month=b.month\n\n    ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND  source.month  = target.month\nSET\n    target.actually_rate = source.actually_rate ;"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2330:        "with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2337:      "sql_preview": "-- Õ╗║Ķ««’╝ÜµĖģń®║ĶĪ©ńö© TRUNCATE µø┤Õ┐½’╝łµ£ēÕż¢ķö«µŚČÕåŹńö© DELETE’╝ē\nDELETE  FROM ads_gx_xs_18_06;\n\n/* µśÄń╗åµÅÆÕģź */\nINSERT INTO ads_gx_xs_18_06 (\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n    data_date,\n    cus_name,\n    surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity,\n    avg_amount_in_tax,\n    rk\n)\nWITH av_one AS (\n    SELECT\n        attribute1 AS place,\n        MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(attribute3), '')) AS attr3\n    FROM with_attr_value\n    WHERE scene = 'bi_gx_xs_018_detail_qx_downstream_customer_t92_di'\n    GROUP BY attribute1\n),\n     base AS (\n         SELECT\n             a.silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             a.data_date,\n             /* õĮĀÕÉÄń╗ŁµĆ╗µś»µŖŖÕēŹń╝Ćµö╣µłÉŌĆ£µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║-ŌĆØ’╝īĶ┐Öķćīńø┤µÄźń╗¤õĖĆ */\n             CONCAT('µ╣¢ÕŹŚÕ«ÅµŚ║-', a.cust_abbr, '-', COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(av.attr3), ''), a.place)) AS cus_name,\n             a.surface,\n             a.grade,\n             a.weight,\n             a.amount_in_tax\n         FROM ads_gx_xs_18_detail a\n                  LEFT JOIN av_one av\n                            ON av.place = a.place\n         WHERE a.silicon_steel_product_category_name = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæńĪģķÆóµłÉÕōü'\n           AND a.data_date >= DATE('2025-01-01')\n         -- Õ”éµ×£õĮĀÕÅ¬Ķ”üŌĆ£õ╗ŖÕż®ŌĆØ’╝īµöŠÕ╝ĆõĖŗķØóĶ┐ÖõĖĆĶĪī\n         -- AND a.data_date = CURRENT_DATE\n     ),\n     agg_detail AS (\n         /* µśÄń╗å’╝Üµīē cus_name + surface + µŚźµ£¤ ĶüÜÕÉł’╝łÕÉ½ a/b/c/d ÕÅŖµĆ╗ķćÅŃĆüÕØćõ╗Ę’╝ē */\n         SELECT\n             silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             data_date,\n             cus_name,\n             surface,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,\n             /* ÕÉ½ń©ÄÕØćõ╗Ę = µĆ╗ÕÉ½ń©ÄķóØ / µĆ╗ķćŹķćÅ * 1000’╝øķś▓ķøČķÖż */\n             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,\n             1 AS order_type\n         FROM base\n         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface\n     ),\n     agg_total AS (\n         /* ÕÉłĶ«Ī’╝Üµīē µŚźµ£¤ µ▒ćµĆ╗’╝łcus_name='ÕÉłĶ«Ī'’╝īsurface=''’╝ē */\n         SELECT\n             silicon_steel_product_category_name,\n             data_date,\n             'ÕÉłĶ«Ī' AS cus_name,\n             ''     AS surface,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'a' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS a_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'b' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS b_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'c' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS c_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade = 'd' THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS d_quantity,\n             SUM(CASE WHEN grade IN ('a','b','c','d') THEN weight  END) / 1000 AS quantity,\n             (SUM(amount_in_tax) / NULLIF(SUM(weight), 0)) * 1000 AS avg_amount_in_tax,\n             2 AS order_type\n         FROM base\n         GROUP BY silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date\n     )\n\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type\nFROM agg_detail\nUNION ALL\nSELECT\n    silicon_steel_product_category_name, data_date, cus_name, surface,\n    a_quantity, b_quantity, c_quantity, d_quantity,\n    quantity, avg_amount_in_tax, order_type\nFROM agg_total;\n"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2357:      "sql_preview": "UPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS qx_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'ÕÅ¢ÕÉæµłÉÕōüÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            date(sdod.created_time)) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.qx_product_shipment = source.qx_product_shipment\nWHERE\n    target.period = 'D';\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS wqx_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'µŚĀÕÅ¢ÕÉæµłÉÕōüÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.wqx_product_shipment = source.wqx_product_shipment;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JOIN (\n        SELECT\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS data_date,\n            SUM(sdod.weight) / 1000 AS fl_product_shipment\n        FROM\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order sdo join\n            ods_crm_sa_sales_delivery_order_detail sdod on sdo.sales_delivery_order_code=sdod.sales_delivery_order_code\n                and sdod.status =1 and  sdod.sales_delivery_order_detail_state IN ('50','20','30')\n                                                JOIN `with_attr_value` c ON sdo.tenant_id = c.tenant_id\n                AND c.ATTRIBUTE2 = 'Õ║¤µ¢ÖÕÅæĶ┤¦'\n                AND (c.ATTRIBUTE1 = '*' OR sdod.wh_code = c.ATTRIBUTE1)\n                AND (c.attribute3 = '*' OR sdod.prod_spec1 = c.attribute3)\n                AND (c.attribute4 = '*' OR sdod.sku_code = c.attribute4)\n                AND (c.attribute5 = '*' OR sdod.sku_name = c.attribute5)\n                AND c.scene = 'bi_sc_xl_009_WH'\n        WHERE\n            sdo.tenant_id = 92\n          AND YEAR(sdod.created_time) >= '2025'\n          AND sdod.sku_name IN ('õĖĆń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'õ║īń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'õĖēń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö', 'Õøøń▒╗Õ║¤µ¢Ö')\n        GROUP BY\n            sdo.tenant_id,\n            DATE_FORMAT(sdod.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ) AS source ON target.tenant_id = source.tenant_id\n        AND target.data_date = source.data_date\nSET target.fl_product_shipment = source.fl_product_shipment;\nUPDATE ads_sc_xl_09 AS target\n    INNER JO"
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2379:        "with_attr_value",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2381:        "dim_date_info",
/Users/lijun/Documents/Codex/2026-04-25/new-chat-2/warehouse-platform/deliverables/ads_sc_xl_13-chain-package-2026-04-26/docs/xl13-chain-evidence.json:2386:      "sql_preview": "delete  from ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 ;\r\ninsert into ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1\r\nSELECT\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name) AS machine_group,\r\n    a.attribute3 AS steel_grade,\r\n    MAX(a.list_order) AS list_order\r\nFROM with_attr_value a\r\n         JOIN ods_mes_mm_machine b\r\n              ON a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id\r\n                  AND a.attribute1 = b.machine_code\r\n                  AND b.status = 1\r\nWHERE a.scene = 'BI-SC-ZL-007-RK'\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    a.tenant_id,\r\n    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(a.attribute2), ''), b.machine_name),\r\n    a.attribute3;\r\nDELETE\r\nFROM ads_sc_zl_07_04 where data_date >= current_date - interval  30 day ;\r\nINSERT INTO ads_sc_zl_07_04 (tenant_id, machine_group, steel_grade, split_in_weight, net_weight,\r\n                             yield_rate, waste_rate, waste_t_weight, data_date, list_order)\r\nWITH recent_dates AS (\r\n    SELECT date_id\r\n    FROM dim_date_info\r\n    WHERE date_id >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAY and  date_id <= CURRENT_DATE\r\n)\r\nSELECT\r\n    av.tenant_id,\r\n    av.machine_group,\r\n    av.steel_grade,\r\n    SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS split_in_weight,\r\n    SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / 1000 AS net_weight,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0\r\n        ELSE SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0))\r\n        END AS yield_rate,\r\n    CASE\r\n        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) = 0 THEN 0\r\n        ELSE 1 - (SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0)) / SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)))\r\n        END AS waste_rate,\r\n    (SUM(COALESCE(m.split_in_weight, 0)) - SUM(COALESCE(m.net_weight, 0))) / 1000 AS waste_t_weight,\r\n    d.date_id AS data_date,\r\n    av.list_order\r\nFROM recent_dates d\r\n         JOIN ads_sc_zl_07_04_process1 av\r\n         LEFT JOIN ads_material_yield_rate_detail m\r\n                   ON m.tenant_id = av.tenant_id\r\n                       AND m.machine_group = av.machine_group\r\n                       AND m.steel_grade = av.steel_grade\r\n                       AND m.data_date = d.date_id\r\nGROUP BY\r\n    av.tenant_id,\r\n    av.machine_group,\r\n    av.steel_grade,\r\n    d.date_id,\r\n    av.list_order;\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n"
